name: Royce White
subject: I’m sharing this news with you FIRST, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I'm getting a head start NOW
|
---
Peter,

I have an important announcement, and you're the first person I'm reaching out to with it.

**I 'm running for Senate in Minnesota again, this time to take down Radical Leftist Tina Smith! [**Can you chip in to give me the head start I need?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=743e606e516a40459eba15e49a76b77d&_e=ZmhqM9QBP1JOi_wvWq-7ayBM6-Ei7fioXO4KiXijWqQTuG2IpyLju-Vfbzx1MPj-wKbHh9I4TFqPtcqG7cRXAZcz99etkd9uVxjRagHI2pJL4jaxjmpXS2yXLfV5Tz6UaMIfoJB80CEMa4F31cCP-wH9Uk5y_ttFspHcgLYRG7cW8_NEBVGtsP85t-0lLY1EApw82ACwFJu_lWPqYaQ1VUS2e1-pCWGk9gviHSinGWLuO5VdOMzPubI71sEzCXPg5yQBNvfZbJwJSDlUbKYsBqvyxhMTMX8IPKSF0KJiB-kW43i4_lU7iiOz23aBZxLFZE8E3ZIMWVrpLV0vAH3VYg%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=743e606e516a40459eba15e49a76b77d&_e=ZmhqM9QBP1JOi_wvWq-7ayBM6-Ei7fioXO4KiXijWqQTuG2IpyLju-Vfbzx1MPj-wKbHh9I4TFqPtcqG7cRXAZcz99etkd9uVxjRagHI2pJL4jaxjmpXS2yXLfV5Tz6UaMIfoJB80CEMa4F31cCP-wH9Uk5y_ttFspHcgLYRG7cW8_NEBVGtsP85t-0lLY1EUF3ZMizrb44zLHN-KnxOaOVElrSGVehEScqGZqT8Z7yIBAiXEeugknow754JUHXYFIEydVCA4vC-Dp3JFcHgH7gMUcXgH6MzEaPKdTAqYa2nhXJR0HipJ2sQeZFgLvpwRdG1eiOzqV2JunSGNIBL4g%3D%3D)
Now that I have two political campaigns under my belt, I understand what it takes to win. It's not easy for a Free-Thinking Black Republican to win in Minnesota. The Democrats control the media, schools, election integrity, and the areas with the most voter turnout.

_They want me to be a slave and servant to their politics. But I 'll never abandon my America-First principles._

For a Black Republican to win, it takes MULTIPLE runs at it, especially when you don't have help from the counter-MAGA RINO Republicans. First, you have to build a brand and get your name out there, then you have to endure the baseless attacks from the media and Left, and finally, you have to get your uncensored message out to voters.

**This takes time, but I 'm confident that in 2026, I'll defeat Tina Smith and become Minnesota's first Black Senator elected to represent Minnesotans.**

__The 2022 and 2024 elections were like pre-game warmups. If you don 't stretch and put up some shots before the game, you're going in cold, and you're bound to lose.

name: History Facts
subject: What $20 bought you in the 1950s
body:
The purchasing power of a dollar has changed dramatically from the early days of American history, largely due to the ever-increasing prices of the things we spend money on — that pesky reality we call inflation.
---
Receiving too many emails? [I would like less mail](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq3sbv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [What $20 Could Buy You Through History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sq3sbv&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

| T he purchasing power of a dollar has changed dramatically from the early days of American history, largely due to the ever-increasing prices of the things we spend money on — that pesky reality we call inflation. Here’s what $20 could comfortably buy at different times in U.S. history.

Town Hall Meeting on Zoom... 'cause it's cold outside.
Let's talk about recent congressional action, fundraising with PACs, and the Special Election in NY-21. Let's talk about how Democrats help people to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over heads!
I hope you will join us -- even if you are not in upstate New York!
[https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/i25Tn74ER0uyYshgNpioGQ](https://substack.com/redirect/a3f839fe-0184-4f7c-ae14-fb87b863f22f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Donate via ActBlue](https://substack.com/redirect/921d603c-46b9-4352-af37-94f467276604?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My Op-Ed in the Wall Street Journal today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=2458%2E4032634%2EgV7xJD

Starting
this year, I have the honor of serving as the leading Democrat on the
Senate Banking Committee. My life’s work has focused on reducing the
obstacles families face to build a better future. That’s why I came to
Washington in the wake of the 2008 financial crisis, started the CFPB, and
then became a senator. I want to thank this team and the people of
Massachusetts for sending me back to the Senate to continue this work in
this new role.

In an op-ed I wrote in the Wall Street Journal this morning, I laid out a
four-part plan on how the committee can work to rebuild the middle class,
advance our economic and national security, and fight corruption.

I talk about how we can approach lowering housing costs, putting an end to
corporate consolidation and price gouging, ensuring that our financial
system serves families, and preventing future failures from “too big to
fail” institutions.

[ https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2903?amount=28&t=1006&akid=2458%2E4032634%2EgV7xJD ]If the president-elect is as serious about helping the middle class as
he says he is, then we can actually work together to make this happen.
Please read my op-ed below, and if you support our vision of a government
that works to unrig the economy and make life more affordable for working
families, please pitch in
$28 or
anything you can to support our work.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Elizabeth Warren: If Trump Wants to Unrig the Economy, I’m In

The mission of the Democrats on the Senate Banking, Housing and Urban
Affairs Committee is to deliver what Americans have asked for in election
after election: unrigging the economy to make life more affordable for
working families.

I’m ready to work with Chairman Tim Scott, Donald Trump and business
leaders whenever they support policies that rebuild the middle class,
advance our economic and national security, and fight the corruption of
those who seek to use government to enrich themselves. We have at least
four specific tasks ahead.

First, we must lower costs and improve access to financial services. Last
year housing costs reached the highest level in decades. Conservatives who
believe this is a supply problem are right. Liberals who believe price
fixing and corporate landlords are culprits are also right. Congress has
been asleep at the switch on both fronts.

Our committee should pursue serious federal investment to create
incentives for home construction, establish partnerships with local
communities to cut red tape, and take on Wall Street landlords that are
squeezing families out of local markets. The Federal Reserve, after
driving mortgage rates to their highest levels since 2008, should cut
rates further. The Trump administration can help by transferring or
selling unused federal property to local actors to increase supply. We
should avoid anything that risks raising housing prices, such as
privatizing Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac in a way that rewards Wall Street
while inflating the cost of borrowing.

We should continue President Biden’s popular fights against junk fees,
corporate consolidation and price gouging. Mr. Trump one-upped Democrats
by proposing to cap credit-card rates at 10%. I’ll work with Republicans
to make it happen. If the president-elect is serious about protecting
consumers, he should support the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau’s
work to lower costs. Since 2011, the bureau has returned more than $20
billion to customers who were cheated by credit-card companies and
financial institutions, and it’s fighting to protect conservatives from
discrimination by banks. Outside corporate C-suites, it’s loved by
Americans of all political stripes.

Second, we must advance economic and national security. Our committee has
key responsibilities over export controls, sanctions, trade policy,
corporate transparency, domestic supply chains and other levers to support
our economic security at home and promote our values abroad. I’ll support
the Trump administration if it uses these tools responsibly. That includes
helping American industry grow and preventing terrorists from exploiting
our financial system—not doing favors for corporate lobbyists or countries
that don’t share our values.

Third, we must ensure that our financial system serves families and the
real economy. Community lenders provide the majority of loans to the small
businesses that power our economy, but these small lenders are getting
swallowed by too-big-to-fail banks. This consolidation stifles competition
and access to credit. Meanwhile, private-equity raiders continue to hollow
out businesses and communities by buying up everything from grocery stores
to hospitals—again killing competition.

Risk is building in the system. Too-big-to-fail banks are quietly taking
on riskier investments. The shadowy private credit market has loaded up on
highly leveraged loans. And after waves of catastrophic losses, the
insurance industry faces a reckoning that even climate-change deniers
can’t ignore. Without significant changes, another financial crash is
coming.

The committee must address these risks. We can pass the Recoup Act, which
would reduce incentives for risk-taking by clawing back compensation from
bank executives who got big paychecks while their banks failed. We can
build on the work JD Vance and I did in the Senate to hold bank regulators
accountable when their solution to bank failures is to arrange more
megabank mergers. And we can establish common-sense rules for artificial
intelligence, blockchain technology and fintech to promote stability and
ensure that innovation serves all consumers, investors and business—not
only billionaires and big banks, and certainly not terrorists.

And yes, we should simplify financial regulations. Republicans are right
that regulatory complexity can drive up costs and hurt smaller companies
that don’t have armies of lobbyists. Simpler structural rules such as
Glass-Steagall would eliminate a mountain of paperwork and end the need
for regulators to intrude into businesses. Clearer rules would create more
transparency and give Americans across the country simpler access to
public markets.

Finally, we must be vigilant against so-called reforms that make it easier
for Wall Street to rip off consumers or crash the financial system. Three
of the four largest bank failures in our history occurred in 2023. These
failures came in the wake of reforms that encouraged regulators to ease up
too much. Similarly, tariffs and sanctions are powerful tools that we can
use to protect consumers and our security, but they can also be exploited
to dole out corporate welfare to well-connected businessmen or protect
monopolies. Our job is to ask hard questions of companies, regulators and
officials who put their own interests ahead of the public’s.

When I was a kid, my daddy lost his job and our family teetered on the
edge of losing our home. My life’s work has focused on reducing the
obstacles families face to build a better future. That’s why I came to
Washington in the wake of the 2008 financial crisis, started the CFPB and
became a senator. I’ll continue that work in my role on the Banking
Committee.

Donate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2903?t=1009&akid=2458%2E4032634%2EgV7xJD

Facebook: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=1002&akid=2458%2E4032634%2EgV7xJD
Twitter: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=1003&akid=2458%2E4032634%2EgV7xJD
Instagram: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=1004&akid=2458%2E4032634%2EgV7xJD
YouTube: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=1005&akid=2458%2E4032634%2EgV7xJD

Paid for by Warren for Senate

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
Did you see our email from yesterday, Peter?

We’re facing our January mid-month fundraising deadline that ends TOMORROW at midnight, and we only need to raise $765 to meet our goal.

Our finance team did the math and if just 24 of our supporters from your area donate $10, we can easily hit our goal. Will you pitch in $10 right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25?amount=10]

This is our first deadline of 2025, and it’s important we kick off the year on the right foot. Make sure to read our email below!

––––Forwarded email below––––

Hi Peter — it’s the Texas Organizing Project PAC. Happy 2025!

On Wednesday at midnight is our January mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $1,500 before then. If that’s all you need to hear, you can donate any amount here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25]

But if you haven’t given to TOP PAC yet or are feeling overwhelmed by Trump’s upcoming inauguration and his MAGA buddies here in Texas, here are THREE reasons why you should donate today.

1. This is our FIRST deadline of 2025. Making a donation this month would make you a founding donor of 2025!
2. This deadline is your first opportunity to make a difference in 2025.
3. Donating today would send a strong message to extreme Republicans that Texans are fired up and ready to fight back.

Did we convince you? If so, can you pitch in just THREE DOLLARS ahead of our Wednesday deadline? Your generous donations will help elect progressives who will protect reproductive freedom, fight for immigrants’ rights, and advance the priorities of our most vulnerable communities. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25?amount=3]

And we’d say that’s something worth fighting for!

So if you want to be a part of the change to make Texas a better place for all of us regardless of race, income, gender, preferred language, or ZIP Code, will you donate $3 or any amount towards our mid-month fundraising goal today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25?amount=3]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Did you see our email from yesterday, Peter? We’re facing our January mid-month fundraising deadline that ends TOMORROW at midnight, and we only need to raise $765 to meet our goal. Our finance team did the math and if just 24 of our supporters from your area donate $10, we can easily hit our goal. Will you pitch in $10 right now? [] This is our first deadline of 2025, and it’s important we kick off the year on the right foot. Make sure to read our email below! ––––Forwarded email below–––– Hi Peter — it’s the Texas Organizing Project PAC. Happy 2025! On Wednesday at midnight is our January mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $1,500 before then. If that’s all you need to hear, you can donate any amount here. [] But if you haven’t given to TOP PAC yet or are feeling overwhelmed by Trump’s upcoming inauguration and his MAGA buddies here in Texas, here are THREE reasons why you should donate today. 1. This is our FIRST deadline of 2025. Making a donation this month would make you a founding donor of 2025! 2. This deadline is your first opportunity to make a difference in 2025. 3. Donating today would send a strong message to extreme Republicans that Texans are fired up and ready to fight back. Did we convince you? If so, can you pitch in just THREE DOLLARS ahead of our Wednesday deadline? Your generous donations will help elect progressives who will protect reproductive freedom, fight for immigrants’ rights, and advance the priorities of our most vulnerable communities. [] And we’d say that’s something worth fighting for! So if you want to be a part of the change to make Texas a better place for all of us regardless of race, income, gender, preferred language, or ZIP Code, will you donate $3 or any amount towards our mid-month fundraising goal today? To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. Democrats are determined to sink Pete Hegseth, President Trump's nominee to serve as Secretary of Defense. They don't want the Pentagon to be reformed and held accountable. ****[****Please use our free advocacy platform to send your senators a message to confirm Hegseth.****](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6c255b9ef854bc29f6d4940dd2d2f88&_e=ZHGH6JihEhwvtskm4UzggchRRwhTqzBOc3QhwLD56NVFAOMVSNhGFRZ0CoH-l9mDQrRPBaDYCKuMAGlr3Ybj9Bq7Q010CfwGU4ZoOeP_rgPJWbhggXuRlIab5jKm8TJ5Zkf_Ps__U_UneHw8OIiWI5YVmNTBWLiFkNkpwODnh_ZXKr3ex2K05vVbwz10hkQ2PBfxQt6h2XPRJyktIuYDycum0d04aKXoXmpmguxh8rnjtbihN92ZyrbWm2PW1syPXuttTAGj4yWTBSDPASupOqjtjBJuQ8TJqLDOdjbx0tnw959ciYJqmRhkMyO6QSow-HVUlWl85_hfCujNnMsIs1_S4gfYScFlyvL8YHebppnGUIs75Wq8mToOVgKICQ8RvU9i-HwgRX0C90B5MNAS3w%3D%3D)**** We need to send 10,000 emails to Senate offices in the next 24 hours to make DC listen! The next Secretary of Defense must prioritize rebuilding our military, focusing on readiness, accountability, and putting our national security interests above all else. For too long, the Pentagon has been plagued by inefficiency and mismanagement, risking the safety of our troops and the effectiveness of our operations. It’s time for a change. ****[****Send the Senate a message now!****](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6c255b9ef854bc29f6d4940dd2d2f88&_e=ZHGH6JihEhwvtskm4UzggchRRwhTqzBOc3QhwLD56NVFAOMVSNhGFRZ0CoH-l9mDQrRPBaDYCKuMAGlr3Ybj9Bq7Q010CfwGU4ZoOeP_rgPJWbhggXuRlIab5jKm8TJ5Zkf_Ps__U_UneHw8OIiWI5YVmNTBWLiFkNkpwODnh_ZXKr3ex2K05vVbwz10hkQ2PBfxQt6h2XPRJyktIuYDycum0d04aKXoXmpmguxh8rnjtbihN92ZyrbWm2PW1syPi7vnvg4PIzF9sCuFZKLxzLVN7DGY-zl7SdZe-7zt3UvZSKrZCACb99m6gPgNQVIJG580e72WXQ2CauhTh31SY8sZygUa6q6hw5RXKa4NTFGmdyKgyBCcxaTF7JY_ikK-8LTbXt-pUx964CF-EgmgNQ%3D%3D)**** Pete Hegseth is an ideal leader for this role. ▶︎ He's a combat veteran who understands the sacrifices of those who serve and the gravity of decisions made in Washington. ▶︎ He's committed to restoring accountability and transparency within the Department of Defense. ▶︎ He's focused on policies that prioritize combat readiness and strategic strength over bureaucracy and distractions. Our military deserves a leader who will champion its mission and ensure it has the tools and resources needed to protect our nation. **[**Please contact your senators today and urge them to support Pete Hegseth for Secretary of Defense.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6c255b9ef854bc29f6d4940dd2d2f88&_e=ZHGH6JihEhwvtskm4UzggchRRwhTqzBOc3QhwLD56NVFAOMVSNhGFRZ0CoH-l9mDQrRPBaDYCKuMAGlr3Ybj9Bq7Q010CfwGU4ZoOeP_rgPJWbhggXuRlIab5jKm8TJ5Zkf_Ps__U_UneHw8OIiWI5YVmNTBWLiFkNkpwODnh_ZXKr3ex2K05vVbwz10hkQ2PBfxQt6h2XPRJyktIuYDycum0d04aKXoXmpmguxh8rnjtbihN92ZyrbWm2PW1syPTE5t-5WQyLU9Vofu_AlEwuXH6-mejjFVH_bUx4DmJZPif7msKxtE8nrID7emi5ZmmvMfnI-lgxV3qe4QzNtv_ZRcDYVsgl5G8ThffD7uY3P71rTrVNlwgNXbNvA7RPs-7vaPMczy755bI5npIgR9CQ%3D%3D)** We need to flood the Senate will messages now.

body:

Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Coming up fast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The races listed below aren't all, folks. School boards, county officials, judges for lower state courts and county counts... the list goes on. We need to fight for our right to vote up and down our government, up and down the ballot, and not just focus on Congress or who is president.
Team, state legislatures are starting back up, these special elections are coming fast, and our efforts to defend voting rights across the board depend on you. RUSH $25 or more right now to make sure we have the resources to fight everywhere our right to vote is threatened >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011425_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011425_2&amount=25]
Team,
2025 is considered an "off year" for elections, but the reality is that there are a number of important elections on the ballot:
* Three special elections (so far) to fill vacancies in the U.S. House of Representatives

* Two special elections to fill vacancies in the U.S. Senate

* Two Governorships in Virginia and New Jersey, who will have the power to appoint judges

* All 100 seats in Virginia’s House of Delegates

* All 80 seats in the New Jersey General Assembly

* State Supreme Court seats in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin -- where legal challenges to mail-in voting have been heard and continue to be brought forward

* 10 major Mayoral races in big cities
And those are just the highlights. You can bet that opponents of voting rights are already targeting these races after their victories in 2024. We've got to match their efforts and help mobilize voters for these special elections and defend our right to vote .
Team: Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us prepare for these important elections, fight for voting rights in state legislatures, and so much more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011425_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=011425_2&amount=15]

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011425_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011425_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011425_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011425_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=eJeDWT2FQAnmKScBv69gEHNlSx%2F5RDKlCSQwHauySet84VOi44MhZwcWe8EInUSZxDY59ro2QuY5A86s3i6gK1pE6d7WtqVZIgsQHBptq9eu%2Fa1IkxC%2B3k7sY7%2F1opD9Bcv3nxCxOGwL2wWRFeAMC3uyQK233X%2Bjh5TTC0RbXKetjQWbMCB5MzTxzSo7OBV5seqYz7sG%2FoxEzjjF8w2gXZAxDwop5zezb27tA7WNHdtqGKpoc8VKSwoQvo87aD%2BrJMhhAF9j7jz1RnmKrNIYkgisd8xwET7I%2BPDX%2BkE6X8wN6ZBwmmONMMbuA6ZzpmJo2EXmXEyZ53CZsnt3L%2FcDTo03B8on8EozpztA%2FztONuwNAdrSDuukpcYUIK89WQVzZ2l9ZjMVZx0JEZToMM7eMd4gnZ8v0JwTGXtFN%2Bu78Ko%3D .

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: President Trump: “Save Rudy!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury!
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b5cb18694e754b019749256b8f434bbd&_e=RZWtF0ot615aSn04ErzzbR1fnjm_Bgd7R7B-psVL_XBiCbT5HkCYYKpBmLhFTC6YTqQWeZjifcvwOf55I53nwoBpMPXlnWyjbpsafsvJ9HOOccrcWsIo6QrpPQHDnpuTameYFCZZl9WX1W2W7LZDX2RioB-VfLOhmjrhdydjugN7DaZKjhYlIN5lhF6_gwusasrLdSiDTX4PLYE7V5Cfi1E-md_7qpoLU1FP1zq7d-z6H6aISFnuJ0O9Mvdl1WISK1iLWTB2IrggNNy10xX7n7s4KWmTfRuwTQpJJfV4byLA5nQsknYtA_z04C2u3NLg-Ihc7h-aK2g9DoGNpFN1IAyryvCda5jUM5OLFgP4PxwV-QSw1-Vy62NHrvekqPtg)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear...
---
**_“SAVE RUDY!”_**
---
On Thursday, I will be on trial – __without_ a jury, mind you_ – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights.
---
_But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial._
---
If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America.
---
**Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud.**
---
I had a choice to make: _I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true._
---
When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)
---
You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and __our__ Republic.
---
_Are YOU with me?_ Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?”
---
**[Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b5cb18694e754b019749256b8f434bbd&_e=RZWtF0ot615aSn04ErzzbR1fnjm_Bgd7R7B-psVL_XBiCbT5HkCYYKpBmLhFTC6YTqQWeZjifcvwOf55I53nwoBpMPXlnWyjbpsafsvJ9HOOccrcWsIo6QrpPQHDnpuTameYFCZZl9WX1W2W7LZDX2RioB-VfLOhmjrhdydjugN7DaZKjhYlIN5lhF6_gwusasrLdSiDTX4PLYE7V5Cfi69CkKLa34qckZOiCKT9pCRZ7-Rz-fKdowXczI3ElXtY7qHP-2pPZ-tf5Wq5vTuXw7X99MCAXmGW6fD5n2dsDFcqdrPsFtjsC7j-kV3FmsEwqVamOltgh5e5lYXgHeiLzb2EumFxZI5sax9Y8X7o8Wxdrscwl1ruhBDJQPq9GHLt) – as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in. **
---

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b5cb18694e754b019749256b8f434bbd&_e=RZWtF0ot615aSn04ErzzbR1fnjm_Bgd7R7B-psVL_XBiCbT5HkCYYKpBmLhFTC6YTqQWeZjifcvwOf55I53nwoBpMPXlnWyjbpsafsvJ9HOOccrcWsIo6QrpPQHDnpuTameYFCZZl9WX1W2W7LZDX2RioB-VfLOhmjrhdydjugN7DaZKjhYlIN5lhF6_gwusasrLdSiDTX4PLYE7V5Cfi_M2-kc1qBJeDW7yQY-gDckHUyF_ALa3-NQ5RjDNLulXVqPSzHlLljlOSWUTXCiNsOpgUHwfNZXiTaQCIEzKQ-U6F3cDQgtxyUvw42PuqHxMl61JsmEIUDYAqB6mU54G2pkc1W4qA4eNnkg6mouWTZ8dQyzw-L3ge8BBbSR0ZhJD)
__
---

clean_body: The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury! | Fellow Patriot, With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear... “SAVE RUDY!” On Thursday, I will be on trial – without a jury, mind you – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights. But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial. If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America. Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud. I had a choice to make: I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true. When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and our Republic. Are YOU with me? Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?” – as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

We must act now to ensure that our values and principles are represented in Congress. name: Powered By People
subject: Will you be one of the 552 folks to donate today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
In less than a week, Donald Trump will be sworn in as President. We are committed to fighting for a brighter Texas and country and we are going to have to fight back hard against Trump these next four years.
To be transparent, our fundraising slowed down more than we even anticipated this month. So far, we’ve raised $7,185 less than this point in December.
Since Powered by People is a grassroots organization, unexpected slowdowns in our fundraising really impact our work and future planning.
We did the math and if 552 folks each pitch in $13 today, then we’ll be able to raise $7,185 and make up that difference before our mid-month deadline.
[**Can you pitch in $13 today and be one of the 552 folks we need to chip in today?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250114.0sm2bI&refcode=ema20250114-239945&t=1&akid=239945%2E444211%2Ein-06t)
Thank you so much for your support,
Team PxP

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250114-239945-footer&t=2&refcode2=239945_444211_in-06t&akid=239945%2E444211%2Ein-06t)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239945%2E444211%2Ein-06t), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=239945%2E444211%2Ein-06t).

The comment period is now open. Urge the Biden Administration to reject pending LNG permits now!| | | Hi Peter, There's only a few days left until President Biden leaves office, so make sure you [**submit your comments to the Department of Energy (DOE) about the impacts of liquified natural gas (LNG) before it's too late!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404839/522686115/2087600797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230) Based on recent analysis, LNG exports are a climate disaster that drive up energy costs, endanger vulnerable communities, and put our national security at risk. ---
Hi Peter, The Biden Administration recently released its long-awaited analysis of the environmental, economic, and public health impacts of liquified natural gas (LNG) exports, and now we have just over 40 days left to act. This analysis makes it clear that LNG exports are not in the public interest, and could be a game-changer in protecting our climate and communities. Now it is time to push the Biden Administration to reject pending LNG permits! [**Submit your comment now and tell the Department of Energy (DOE) LNG exports are not in the public interest and urge the Biden Administration to reject new permits to protect our future!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404843/522686119/2087600797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
[**SUBMIT YOUR COMMENT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404844/522686120/2087600797?contactdata=C1FvbqLwEnxDt5v0wkejrqjYBhz47jkqpTVVTGIW8V6V416Bi45i7xmiVnOyUrUp08Q8sIQjH0pR3xiEONBUDJPrV0MOA7jMFy91sClTIEJe2+/fmOJVnZY9csoypI1h&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
Earlier this year, the Biden Administration paused new LNG export approvals to update outdated data and analysis. With the 60 day comment period that started Dec. 17th, we need to send a resounding message: LNG exports are a climate disaster that drive up energy costs, endanger vulnerable communities, and put our national security at risk.****[**President Biden should act on this analysis and reject all pending LNG export permits.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404845/522686121/2087600797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230) Here’s why your voice is urgently needed:
---
* **Climate devastation:** Projects like CP2 LNG in Louisiana could emit 190 million tonnes of CO2e (carbon dioxide equivalent) per year—equivalent to the pollution from 51 coal-fired power plants. We can’t let these carbon bombs move forward.
* **Health impacts in vulnerable communities:** LNG facilities are concentrated in areas already suffering from pollution and climate change. This leads to higher rates of cancer, asthma, and heart disease for people who’ve suffered enough.
* **Environmental destruction:** Heavy dredging and construction for LNG facilities damage ecosystems, devastate local economies reliant on fishing and tourism, and threaten biodiversity.
* **Higher costs for families:** LNG exports raise energy bills for Americans while padding the profits of oil and gas CEOs. We need policies that protect people, not corporate profits.
* **National security risks** : With LNG demand in Europe declining, U.S. rivals like China are increasingly buying up American LNG, using our resources to strengthen their power.

---
| | [**TAKE ACTION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404846/522686122/2087600797?contactdata=C1FvbqLwEnxDt5v0wkejrqjYBhz47jkqpTVVTGIW8V6V416Bi45i7xmiVnOyUrUp08Q8sIQjH0pR3xiEONBUDJPrV0MOA7jMFy91sClTIEJe2+/fmOJVnZY9csoypI1h&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
This analysis from DOE can solidify President Biden’s climate and environmental justice legacy, make it legally difficult for a future Trump Administration to advance more LNG export projects, and provide a solid foundation for bold action now. This is a critical moment. Hundreds of thousands of Americans—including consumer advocates, national security experts, frontline community leaders, and healthcare professionals—have already spoken out and were a critical piece of winning the initial pause on LNG export approvals. President Biden has shown he is willing to listen and lead. Now, it’s up to us to ensure the final analysis is utilized and empowers the Biden Administration to take decisive action to stop LNG exports. [**Make your voice heard by submitting your comment today and demand that the DOE stand up to Big Oil and Gas!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404847/522686123/2087600797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
[**SUBMIT YOUR COMMENT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404848/522686124/2087600797?contactdata=C1FvbqLwEnxDt5v0wkejrqjYBhz47jkqpTVVTGIW8V6V416Bi45i7xmiVnOyUrUp08Q8sIQjH0pR3xiEONBUDJPrV0MOA7jMFy91sClTIEJe2+/fmOJVnZY9csoypI1h&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)
---
In solidarity,
---
---
Britney VanCitters _(she/her)_ OLCV Political & Organizing Director
---
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404849/522686125/-472054105?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404850/522686126/-1738660593?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100404851/522686127/-848318159?next=%2F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyMmNiMjEzLWRlZDItZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KJsGao7dYvTGvuKm-icBRp1IMI1rJfCfs9lWrcjUwf0=&emci=85c7fd79-d4d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=622cb213-ded2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=2107230)

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Did you see the exciting news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Like Alexandra announced this morning, Justice Democrats has officially
launched our 2026 Candidate Recruitment Campaign!

As Campaigns Director at Justice Democrats, my job is to oversee our whole
operation for candidates, from recruitment, to launching campaigns, to
seeing them through Election Day.

You may be wondering what candidate recruitment means specifically at
Justice Democrats. We’ll be looking at congressional districts across the
country to determine which out-of-touch corporate incumbents we’ll
challenge with working-class candidates in the 2026 primary elections, and
we’re asking everyday people to nominate community leaders they trust to
run for office.

Justice Democrats recruited Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in 2017 after her
brother nominated her to run a primary campaign against the long-time
corporate Democrat who was then representing NY-14. Our candidate
recruitment efforts and the progressive members of Congress that follow
have the power to dramatically change and transform the Democratic Party
from the ground up.

Candidate recruitment takes serious resources, and money has always been
the #1 thing holding us back as an organization because we refuse to take
a cent from corporate PACs.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250114-3?refcode=em20250114-36321&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36321_1203867__CM1Yg&akid=36321%2E1203867%2E_CM1Yg ]We’re relying on grassroots supporters like you,
Peter, to help us reach our goal of raising
$100,000 by February 1. Will you help us find and elect the next AOC or
Summer Lee or Rashida Tlaib by contributing to our 2026 Candidate
Recruitment Fund right now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250114-3?refcode=em20250114-36321&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36321_1203867__CM1Yg&akid=36321%2E1203867%2E_CM1Yg ]Contribute $5

This last year, we faced an unprecedented amount of spending from AIPAC
and its super PACs, which successfully ousted Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman
using tens of millions of dollars from corporate and billionaire GOP
donors. I won’t lie, those losses hurt.

I also believe this last year showed us that we must double down on our
mission to elect leaders who will fight for human rights and freedom for
Palestinians, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and the most pressing
needs facing everyday people nationwide.

The unprecedented spending we face is a sign of our strength. As the
working class built power in the halls of Congress with the support of
groups like JD, it was inevitable that corporate and special interests
would respond. Those interests want us to give up. It is more important
than ever that we fight back and continue to build.

Congressional races are becoming more expensive than ever before and
there’s no surprising the establishment anymore. Corporate Democrats and
their billionaire backers know we exist and know we’re doing everything we
can to defeat them.

With your support, we’ve taken on the Democratic establishment and won
crucial House races since 2018. But now, we need a groundswell of support
to recruit and elect a new slate of working-class champions over the next
two years to strengthen our bloc and root out the Party’s corporate
corruption in 2026.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250114-3?refcode=em20250114-36321&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36321_1203867__CM1Yg&akid=36321%2E1203867%2E_CM1Yg ]If you believe we need a Democratic Party that fights for the
interests of working-class people and not corporate donors, please support
our candidate recruitment efforts today with a $5
donation.

I’m ready to get to work to find and recruit the next slate of progressive
champions who’ll fight for us, and I hope you’ll join me in this critical
work.

Thank you so much for everything,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250114-36321-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36321_1203867__CM1Yg&akid=36321%2E1203867%2E_CM1Yg

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36321%2E1203867%2E_CM1Yg

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

The unprecedented spending we face is a sign of our strength. As the working class built power in the halls of Congress with the support of groups like JD, it was inevitable that corporate and special interests would respond. Those interests want us to give up. It is more important than ever that we fight back and continue to build. Congressional races are becoming more expensive than ever before and there’s no surprising the establishment anymore. Corporate Democrats and their billionaire backers know we exist and know we’re doing everything we can to defeat them. With your support, we’ve taken on the Democratic establishment and won crucial House races since 2018. But now, we need a groundswell of support to recruit and elect a new slate of working-class champions over the next two years to strengthen our bloc and root out the Party’s corporate corruption in 2026. [ ]If you believe we need a Democratic Party that fights for the interests of working-class people and not corporate donors, please support our candidate recruitment efforts today with a $5 donation. I’m ready to get to work to find and recruit the next slate of progressive champions who’ll fight for us, and I hope you’ll join me in this critical work. Thank you so much for everything, Geoff Simpson Campaigns Director Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: Time Sensitive Petition Request >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Add your name by midnight.
| **FACT:** Pete Hegseth is UNFIT to serve as our Secretary of Defense ⬇

_He’s been _accused of sexual assault,_ he wants to _end DEI measures in the military,_ and he has _basically ZERO leadership experience!__

**FACT:** Only a SURGE of pressure on the Senate can stop him ⬇ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pete_hegseth_confirmation/?source=VPP_20250114_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18568%2E878179%2EegTMYJ) | [ADD YOUR NAME: DEMAND THE SENATE VOTES AGAINST THE CONFIRMATION OF PETE HEGSETH AS SECRETARY OF DEFENSE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pete_hegseth_confirmation/?source=VPP_20250114_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18568%2E878179%2EegTMYJ)
---
The Secretary of Defense is one of the _most important members_ of the Cabinet:

They manage **MILLIONS of military personnel,** they have a budget of over **800 billion dollars,** and they oversee the United States’ **nuclear capabilities!**

Pete Hegseth, a far-right former Fox News host, is NOT qualified for ANY OF THE ABOVE!

[**That’s why we’re urgently calling on the Senate to withhold confirmation of Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense, and we need 20,000 signatures by midnight: Add your name immediately! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pete_hegseth_confirmation/?source=VPP_20250114_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18568%2E878179%2EegTMYJ)

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18568%2E878179%2EegTMYJ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18568%2E878179%2EegTMYJ).**

name: =?utf-8?b?4p2MIE1pc3NpbmcgKHZpYSBGRlIp?=
subject: we know you support expanding Social Security
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
you must have missed our original message
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)
---
Hello,

Last week, we sent you an urgent poll asking if you support expanding Social Security benefits after President Biden signed a major Social Security bill into law!

But our records indicate that you still haven’t responded. **You’re one of the last [21] Democrats from your state that we need to complete our data!**

**[_Social Security provides support for millions of senior citizens, we can’t understate how important this is. Please complete now »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)** | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)
---
We’ve attached the original message below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

— FORWARDED MESSAGE —
Subject: re: Expanded Social Security benefits in your state
From: Review by 11:59PM [FFR]
**ACTION REQUIRED: YOU MUST SUBMIT RESPONSE BY 11:59 PM**
[]()
**[_Do you agree we need to expand Social Security and save it from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=9&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)** | **[Yes, I agree! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)**
---
**[No, I don’t agree »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)**
**[I’m not sure »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=12&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)**
**_WE NEED 150 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 01/15/2025, 11:59 PM ET_ **
Look, President Biden and Democrats know this is a critical program for millions of Americans.

We’re SO glad to have a President who cares about our nation’s Seniors, unlike President Trump who tried to GUT millions from Social Security when he was in office!

To make matters worse, once Trump takes office, making CUTS to Social Security is one of his TOP priorities. _NO!!!_

**We have absolutely NO DATA on how top Democrats feel about this, so that’s why we’re reaching out to you.**
**[_Do you agree we need to expand Social Security and save it from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=13&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)** | **[Yes, I agree! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=14&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)**
---
**[No, I don’t agree »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=15&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)**
**[I’m not sure »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-poll25?source=FFR_20250114_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS&t=16&akid=22754%2E4449941%2Eb-0vmN)**
**_WE NEED 150 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 01/15/2025, 11:59 PM ET_ **
We can’t let MAGA Republicans demolish our earned benefits.

We really need you to speak up, team.

Fight For Reform

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100405309/522691699/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGEzNTI2ZS1mMWQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJS_W70OGHClXscwHj-mcAJQgM8JjlraB_dyuCCN2X4=)
---
| Dear everyone — it has been a tough week for Californians. We commend the bravery and dedication of California’s firefighters and first responders who are working around the clock and risking their lives to get multiple wildfires under control. _And they are making encouraging progress_. **But the danger is not over.** We urge everyone in affected areas to heed evacuation orders and take every precaution to protect themselves and their loved ones. The safety of our communities is the top priority. There has been so much loss in this climate disaster. Our hearts go out to all those affected by the devastating wildfires raging across our state. We are grateful for the support of the Biden Administration in sparing no expense to contain these fires and protect our families. President Biden has announced that for the next six months, the federal government will cover 100% of the cost of measures to protect lives and property in Southern California. If you or someone you know lives in an affected area, visit **[DisasterAssistance.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100405310/522691700/1598658696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGEzNTI2ZS1mMWQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJS_W70OGHClXscwHj-mcAJQgM8JjlraB_dyuCCN2X4=&emci=10291b91-c5d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=eda3526e-f1d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=560478)** or call (800) 621-3362. Likewise, the California Democratic Party stands ready to support those affected and to continue advocating for the necessary climate action to mitigate the underlying cause of these escalating climate disasters. **If you are safe and able, you can also help us deliver aid directly. We are working to raise money for on-the-ground organizations that are delivering relief to impacted Californians.** **[The link here will allow you to automatically split a donation between The Los Angeles Fire Department Foundation, United Way of Greater Los Angeles, and the Los Angeles Regional Food Bank. Now is a time for us all to stick together and support each other and our first-responders.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100405311/522691701/-1177202371?refcode=20250114_STU_45DO_Wildfires2&amount=90&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGEzNTI2ZS1mMWQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJS_W70OGHClXscwHj-mcAJQgM8JjlraB_dyuCCN2X4=)** [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100405312/522691702/-1177202371?refcode=20250114_STU_45DO_Wildfires2&amount=90&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGEzNTI2ZS1mMWQyLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJS_W70OGHClXscwHj-mcAJQgM8JjlraB_dyuCCN2X4=) Please stay safe and know that we will stand with you in these difficult times. Sincerely, — CADEM HQ

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: How My Father's Journey Taught Me About Faith and Resilience
body:
It was November of 1989.

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2hbaq62qqcc2atll2tj05lj396alhs3t9pahbvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj68or2c1h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo16337ndu32m4fum5ov856453cc6g6kgfgcoevg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj68or2c1h2bs)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zin8mbn7ptu25cj5qcu43mkmss5i1eilgt2ij3h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj68or2c1h2bs)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z76uit079qpqcaja0t98ltl6vslh7o5rdkb41pqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj68or2c1h2bs)
---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjrimmctnkfiicq6ff47ai64bq53kl8v7q4j46s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj68or2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkt3nkv9p3sae292uqf87ihcoe41jnf9884pvcqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj68or2clh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zip7siu639e389ft4ljkliunf00m0enl09bfrr68_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj68or2clh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgf651ns2jb1c3njilm096nv9fubfplpjrs92mpo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj68or2clh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. **_CNN: “[Republicans] will oversee _narrowest_ House majority in nearly 100 years” _**

Trust me, I understand just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.

_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: How My Father's Journey Taught Me About Faith and Resilience
body:
It was November of 1989.

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztj7morvoileoel6us4u4kl1rt1kl9impjlfu34g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cth2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7c6rs4r3a6moqf3oeum3j1ks0ppr0ngr68gsak0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cth2bs)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg0765u8hbtq6ipu4srg68hu80c5bfhpo4uu49po_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cth2bs)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsvrvrl4vbvtehijgc4kkjbu1f7nt0ttqdt6va98_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cth2bs)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Dueling Populisms—Urban Equality vs. RuralLiberty—free report
body:
Populism is nothing new to world history.

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think about American politics as being divided between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdmt8uigs9n6gk3t16088mepnp52iv30usnag4k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think about American politics as being divided between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat and Republican establishment.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlu0vuvcdq3807gjbcd03d0alq93vbn6ibton2i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6c3h2bs)
---
| | And believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back to Roman times.

That's why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks: **[Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrqvaait0jlvgtov6d354icf914f2ugmnor4k9a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6c3h2bs)**.

Hanson is a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important eBook, you'll learn more about:
* What we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that rebel against both the establishment--and each other.
* The important parallels between these ancient movements and their modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative populism.
* What lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our culture.

You can get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziejeg05itpdu3ctia8vqgtrqfs4g04pk7kj0geg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6c3h2bs)**.

And please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.
Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zem3n3422l9vjbputos1gqj5v26ial7lvd042hn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsuc4dkp7v0d7k4dpbmu2t73o6r17bdpd1hfq0n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cdh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfsqq60gd0n0q4ts5bahafpj41q42cmqmvr70ic0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cdh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztkslr103b3a5fin4osdokr6ci2qqblj8c0jno40_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cdh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z36mdidp4t5cqaltq4nrqptabiatj894ichq4bs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cdh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3all4avat2v2n8ie72g1ambdh7o61ui8dhhmpj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj6aoj6cdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Dueling Populisms—Urban Equality vs. RuralLiberty—free report
body:
Populism is nothing new to world history.

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think about American politics as being divided between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different.
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z74g0cm74i40evpkl4omubpce53p293no3ukis10_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj61o73cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think about American politics as being divided between the Left and the Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat and Republican establishment.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrebr8sump8eb2ki9713e42nu06a9bfqppo0a9b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj61o73cth2bs)
---
| | And believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back to Roman times.

That's why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks: **[Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2a9krircs6urcs4v1f4nfrovbl1be72skuic5c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj61o73cth2bs)**.

Hanson is a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important eBook, you'll learn more about:
* What we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that rebel against both the establishment--and each other.
* The important parallels between these ancient movements and their modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative populism.
* What lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our culture.

You can get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z901va704t40vfgncoln602b6q9g2qg8hpju541g_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjj61o73cth2bs)**.

And please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.
Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: C.S. Lewis Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsuh3hqci463jkf2vrs3vf6s67j37j631om7fp9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgm8pb4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8tvp6q3ofo9i9j3716lshmli76kao25lj0ls8hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgm8pb4cph2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5hp275mdsgo5ajqchcadno8dolei9ij5otid7l0_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgm8pb4cph2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcbbo20ntb2iq9oli08arjak4esgtc2ml1b83fho_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgm8pb4cph2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvuqoved6bjh5pqrkrsfdb9g3j5thfv4i8vbl6o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgm8pb4cph2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6qpermlsbh4tbhimlg4has38q2jvohujcepqojo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgm8pb4cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

subject: Biden Removes Notorious Communist Country From State Terror Watchlist
