name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Real Ameican Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z2l407tuda71ovjsja45g34cco6u8qj9c7d1ep30_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgmcpj2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zark0chl290mnaeflh8ielre0g0p88i0vrv8bnqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgmcpj2c1h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zp0p1848qbh62osecfibopu2sgpi6783rcbpfdko_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgmcpj2c1h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zov3neskge301qlvv5dg1jj6qip3hl2bgpvngl98_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgmcpj2c1h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z15u6gn9qnfe2dub5a1vbqv1p87937idjqfth2ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgmcpj2c1h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfusgv9gn6b6b1k248aaornj732gscfqe098i258_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjgmcpj2c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

President Joe Biden removed Cuba from the list of state sponsors of
terrorism, according to a White House announcement Tuesday. The White

# The End of the American Dream: How BRICS Will Destroy Your Retirement Savings

---
|
---
For nearly a century, the U.S. dollar has stood tall as the world’s global reserve currency—a symbol of trust, power, and stability. But history tells a grim story: global reserve currencies don’t last forever. Portugal, Spain, the Netherlands, France, Britain—each dominated the global financial system for about **80 to 100 years** before crumbling into economic irrelevance. The U.S. dollar has now reached the end of that cycle, and BRICS—the powerful alliance of Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa—is ready to pull the trigger on the dollar’s downfall. **The BRICS Digital Currency: The Silent Assassin** BRICS is actively pushing for a new digital currency designed to bypass the U.S. dollar entirely. [BRICS Is Coming for Your Retirement—Get Your Free Protection Guide Now!](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19763/6374453/45886ca6a72b921f263d500fcd5f890f255d957e/b1e0bf580766680b502f6ea72f09c9ceceeb885a) Just recently, India began dumping the dollar in favor of local currencies for a **$37 billion trade deal**. Central banks around the world are piling up gold and other currencies at a record pace, while the U.S. dollar’s share of global reserves has plunged to a **30-year low**. Imagine waking up one day to find that the dollar isn’t the world’s dominant currency anymore. Without its reserve status, the value of the dollar could collapse, leading to skyrocketing inflation, wiped-out savings, and a stock market crash of unprecedented proportions. What Robert Kiyosaki calls the “**Everything Bubble** ”—stocks, real estate, and bonds—will burst, leaving retirees and investors devastated. [History Repeats—Protect Your Retirement Before the Dollar Collapses! Free Guide Inside](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19763/6374453/ffb228ad4658faf0a087e90d7efd90230c7e2c6e/b1e0bf580766680b502f6ea72f09c9ceceeb885a) **A Perfect Storm for Economic Disaster** Even former President Donald Trump has floated the idea of devaluing the dollar to boost U.S. exports. But devaluation means one thing: the dollar in your pocket, your retirement savings, and your investments will all be worth less. Combine that with the BRICS nations abandoning the dollar, and we have a recipe for total economic collapse. When the dollar loses its status as the world’s reserve currency, demand for U.S. assets will plummet. The Federal Reserve will be powerless to stop the ensuing chaos. Your stocks, your retirement accounts, your carefully saved nest egg—all could be obliterated in the fallout. [Warning: BRICS Digital Currency Could Obliterate Your Savings—Download Your Free Guide](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19763/6374453/186ab9c5057916d19cace3c5ffe439f6795c6005/b1e0bf580766680b502f6ea72f09c9ceceeb885a) **Don’t Be a Victim—Protect Your Wealth NOW** The writing is on the wall. The U.S. dollar is on borrowed time. If you want to protect your savings, your investments, and your future, you need to act NOW. Gold and silver have stood the test of time for over **5,000 years**. They are immune to currency devaluation, immune to the whims of governments, and immune to geopolitical chaos. When currencies fail, gold and silver soar. In every financial crisis, precious metals have been the ultimate safe haven. While the dollar collapses, the value of gold and silver will rise, preserving your wealth and ensuring that you can live out your retirement with dignity. [The U.S. Dollar’s Final Days: Secure Your Wealth with This Free Guide](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19763/6374453/346c003612d0e43ca6df685115086d4a3f4c8fee/b1e0bf580766680b502f6ea72f09c9ceceeb885a) **Don’t Wait Until It’s Too Late** This isn’t fear mongering—this is history repeating itself. Reserve currencies fall. Economies collapse. But those who hold gold and silver endure. Protect your savings today before BRICS pulls the final trigger on the U.S. dollar. Remember: **If you don’t prepare, you become a victim.** Act now to safeguard your retirement and secure your future. **Why Choose Monetary Gold For Your Precious Metals:** With over 100 years of expertise, **Monetary Gold** offers retirees a trusted way to safeguard their savings. Grab this [Complimentary Guide.](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19763/6374453/92e56dac17f29c9c18d6542a510f514d4ec3c4cb/b1e0bf580766680b502f6ea72f09c9ceceeb885a) It explains how to move assets into Gold and shield wealth from market volatility. Time is running out. Don’t wait until your savings are gone. Call **[(888) 411-GOLD(4653)](https://links.zerolethal.com/a/1537/click/19763/6374453/15c81fb1b243cab619e8c5e48b46956e45c5f82e/b1e0bf580766680b502f6ea72f09c9ceceeb885a)** today to secure your guide and take control of your financial future. body:

subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430iMYg3G0NBCsYOjejyRwkqOliMcsM1lNTr_LoDMV9E04gfIJk3qGW86ouMR0SZzIFLO47ka3LjS9-DMyemmkfGxkJnkbPo9CzMYeoNoHYkE99qT9Oer_2Hc_TulBywE7-6BSaHu2SUM5p22Uy4SIQj4%3D)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430qjPCPnaV0Ebu-cUYZquvDC-bra9Eku5sFUWq5IUOUGUwCkg-kbX4tVstHnifoMrXtcHQVwZVz8FcfLduVbUekcdfNz4IUDH7bTatXIfqiLMmm65HlYEBiE0LQYUt_LlUxNFHDH8KxYF4yckH4Pxtq0%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430t0x0CXAvbs6Y1CDdKMFWI-yLEdYuWCAfj2_LbVi-qiWmGq4VGUSSfm7ReShwSVgzSXx0_f7D6MBV4Dmvc8UPEZSerY2vwqV34uf80S33xKIfZHLNX8WvSd_BnaBkF8DGpMdNRKhfIOL-yN19HqFgzY%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430vrvdcOh3U_uRTEEmehmPOSCDbyXmF2XwuY5wS_h9h6fWEsVvXHhDbB9DNSZT-ZRiVLqeCFMSAmbPTSvF4IS7MXZtrVqu8llJ9EjlF29XvER6DlLjZ1QNuZbX_PNhAjn-3SX23muPgPEi_ShhxhDcyw%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430oETwZPn9WwpweuG9Ya8oUoGOUY2MpF8IkBiPKkmrN651CCXVwrl-RMpOfQcZa-GBXcJ3EXpOmOnlkIp0Hqjq7IVJprqKKEH8h1hD8L6bNFWN72_hOsSfRVQFBeXbM4IICzUkwZbFkoYiHKsNKGEIso%3D)
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430oF3qb8yBEpDHeutLd0Latf9DEgKNnktZmAy3mFZN3SXgUZH_qpuPZCS4UdW0SK2E1NuJGwfjqqeUjkSEwv1eXZq8HijknvAYQej9hyOHe4HMv9h0JzYEckyYNs5_ZoLeu8MyOiZ7e-tczrzJZOjy90%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430nlpIbAW-9JBKrB9RG6HhHliIa4wloZQ2OiHJlSidm-vL17Sz9wW4wEu7iW0LNqE_z6Ay4G1Cz4gb8QRmpA0VAGwsUw8qfvqXuavztJshOGGvK9zq5bANMbtz6HKLL4wTnOvKkuY5KBwHqUMIAGJrug%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430sSXjcrJ0yFEZqjK45RqoNgOFSGchPw34tHXtx6u1wkNL56oFLZAGtG0IdBHWwZduUtjcmqW1ZET3oUX0yTreE7gFUSkRgk3oEfKTvXhXHZee0n_y7d-_wGMkBSmfONvhhNQ3-pcKY6LdBn2vEuvH7A%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430j3FFHwRjruUI9x3jYoBjWx_mN3qjFI3EhVTkxVqUv3nacc-V716VJYpITR9daSlN11jQ_3RRMLrSlUSozDcMB_yexZrmMRllYCSPHwe68JZILrrQZwDQCmatiFO5Ytau6hI5D313P2wBxV3YwnPODg%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=111144b9e9b64a828b5ce450b3035c0a&_e=qbeGvGjnUzYJAHdAqxkJubyXc0lhGnu6a0G6aQZaHe2E4Oec6YHOnaOclC_wH8nUg8r1wHbMhPFe9kF-UEwAjEnKIGrHBWVMJvVeX_7a4CB0AZsjkldv-ieskqjz-HX4m8HsLE7dMUTnVBh-VtJHe2Wdi6FCDJ-O-AJu8iia7-Y-QXX3-k37rijBbs1-oSBV1fCIpt_qZ6QvuaFjsIBXFTK4asP6daquujFrFgigwEwkfzNc4SVJVUOuTnb-GJYDHdQNwceuK9TKuStTBcVVT-ly2znZvxRvhfiRXkHcmk1SlsJMDuYAM-a8NFCAlO8l3IlXgOo_yMgI3rlKKx430kpG2yXi0olFSgHSLLki6T8wu5hY3P0T6bQB4v9KDIKJKg1JAdSbQSLF8WYMEjeTmWpFYD9zNQmRJvsxJp9nOtQQV2d9n4JywzLB_ZhRHNJtLcB6j8GYUJmR-pXKuPNrDPm3yEqolrnpu4WlcY2kG7k%3D)

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4af06248f61c473dbddbd70c8b8997a6&_e=N0yWgN8IFsydT4BizZvRx9rxN7ENzRtW9a-sggWBlcRljUMi8NQiBC0VVTZnmVYYK8cd9mkf6s0qYwXo1rP-Ej0szonVJS-6SEGjdpK6-oKdzIyJ7O7upa2iuU8gxz4Oe71_1_puT_nYI0n1q28fypNywq5YyV1IE8HaKlozfWwN-yjIDzFdUFCSAYNg8RhSLmU3giejN73tLJ7La4AmjBmA5o4S1AwAGJafp6gdKymN1bJsvWR0TJMMokgDgKn5FnDdLr4xNFVbu11gkmerMjSg4KmY3d-oYZOzv67nYOEIxLAOXMwIMKQsqkKitMBKa0QzgRo9Qp3K32ME9nht8KK7b_3JQ1TcLtdnS1v_m-o1amX0KrChE3SFcyzEvbQ2fMSjpdtL1ZZCF1QrU-SpG0DHor-zgpusNrZumweqKTazTq1kfvlXric6oZSIdGWq)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4af06248f61c473dbddbd70c8b8997a6&_e=N0yWgN8IFsydT4BizZvRx9rxN7ENzRtW9a-sggWBlcRljUMi8NQiBC0VVTZnmVYYK8cd9mkf6s0qYwXo1rP-Ej0szonVJS-6SEGjdpK6-oKdzIyJ7O7upa2iuU8gxz4Oe71_1_puT_nYI0n1q28fypNywq5YyV1IE8HaKlozfWwN-yjIDzFdUFCSAYNg8RhSLmU3giejN73tLJ7La4AmjBmA5o4S1AwAGJafp6gdKymN1bJsvWR0TJMMokgDgKn5FnDdLr4xNFVbu11gkmerMjSg4KmY3d-oYZOzv67nYOFYSZ1rc3mzpVVSQIPUp5ecMTMuG43RHP3BWarNnD16Hmn3p89NvnVPf2j5M8rLFv8ylJFBUvm9CbU4KLvdynqcb6VWslV4Dea3DliTOBaXMaZzrvMQHuZXkL-fjZH6eSUl4Xn0s7HcvfoML1Ejnfsl),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LdBwp4DrxdUmvs3-SjqXK4IHDMas82i7WchZTGVKG3BXmjx9-cL6sKqs0gCi_ojr9m8t5Wj8gmdajAqAk7puBxXuOa672J-eDiAVnp8xLJMQ3XNwG2YkvT5AKyj5lbLsTK8q14F4YDr0TG6BW6iVLF8%3D)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LUG8Z6vhXwyrJn4qgHg-PcrKA77FyicGKzym_4o802FMHBtGBiOJSPiqgcbWXXPSWk9TOvUFU4CciBMvt_GHq6WqHK2fR7gXfsCzm9giGoOAb7FvHSchb_nAgHOowseqQbKaiZaxf_bd4Ee2zGp7VdY%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LWRdmPx1AccCe23aQ_HuwhVsNETzbzEwFboEhpZBD-so-6f0cRC9lhM3I9_u2JGLg14LZ44eK3sUQN7QnbaM5ttNutpBBrTpO_cMq7AQFNJfZZo6QPPtZE5LBHCTjsdsDcP_9K7hIpmn5poUQkS_7N4%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **[hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LaZ2Zdz06g--Whg2lkUEC87HXeA7zSkzcTci6SmEcUZEU2w21-LssttLChbZVFZ-FW0K0eu6qs-JRXVV1C_hrVQbhZDBwC9Dse8mDQuR7iuVB1QWHOCV-1KLPj8F9DE36ta7zHNOXUY38xuMZxLnWfo%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LUOlNlEjG5UbckWw8OwclwyKd0PpwpuNPqW8PIQGBZeVjqAIM7Z1bRZhTZJoOLvY5cuc8JyPf8_DovHojefvoNjlfjGSX1L6bOBnUTQXDgZs2oWI2V2-wlnNn3LF6c0LadBWxk14ZEDxpt30BzjDME4%3D)
[ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LcSULc52Ky15fGkVdwyVYcdMzz6_qlLu6LDVTkxHN7CsRdgHk8ksNXBojWyNXLNkIrUJvmdVA4mjUkhu-Jm7ySn9925iOJ0U_Z1iN-WcY1VBVPaGsxzd8VBqDjKEI2VSuM5f7ohcDt2B3ZFlcd3s_zI%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LVNDXKNM9ziifgMNMU9nvKTeDvf1QAJHsr-PfNSngtN8NUuW9OMSavUtYs7yFPHQBRtwtMKWvwi-aQ_ucxyUtuic4N7fwLiNCwkRkYP1doNcB2d4FgTOjb-Pr7cIjqr8fd9_AfoHENHZM2wuZT_wQ3I%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it's the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LXlX2Ox9ng2AIpSTSpvagM0awggwBXCivZw5itereAQSvV0LWl_yQTrDAIXvCfFqbNggxxjSISy2MzwpZjsDU2aHiaIc5wgV6gDUkfoHkuvMwzVbQV_xqUM7LJWYs14MXlJF00A2H5UiVb_nQzz6QIc%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains [hear.com's](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--LdXPXpZTWvXan_q2bw8N_VzM9KLLD1Ci-4E4QTQNGs3rNsr1a43zmkaj7qHzZMCwuwXJmoxHQ7ndvgrV618WGAuKGIMvZ4hu0rqm4_z_UsXxpj8r0BnLh-80aqFiShtB86TSYVKmFmDhD0ygYm0GIUg%3D) founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f89d69b871944adcbf724690db613310&_e=mEA_LpOZ1Erh4avb7zIm8sD0vFz8TWf_NG3jHjnZ78pBSwcJW9_sWnjPyFf2z1VgUpw1eTpe-8Mw-oG3Z1D6B1X4F4ZW9PhNqyF8m6zBN4SaKGBcXjTl5q7tXmdVF7fNwFHeALjk6du7GRW2er6qigIom38JIhUVnH4aOwd66qxCOBM0pxoP20-Ynkbbq-GbZPFJwv8EZH1J-CrfaAyGDXsSoeYWr0c-QtgLCSSInghUP0C4CUaxlfXZqIB6SIi0swKicXigu37PB7eHoL4DLzgWi3kPJphTg2QVXWLP_3SNg8fQWZz58SzzELAMCwr7fvi-pWz9MeRqi4MAjd--Ldn4Z3FnNLLEC6-CKQZPsSWEmSEYiGTU6z2UGgPxr1oCGVZiGmG7N65eAKVnaDGnLVP9UDsUZzu8UxOyRGzEALUk98-kB7dyJEwSmEswKR3Eb8wbRa9Qc3re4f24EKs4V5LemO-cr-kIPMIS0Cx5fRs%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=236dd3ac05ca41ab9bd268ee92014df4&_e=wP2rnP8XH-bBPsA7gChpb666yr57jMlurrP-RwZI1jE4RC4GDBHDExZM73Y3EYYq26zVjhfQP0ruLzdFfoCS0wcG-sfO_o_f5PFqOUS9N7ynOu-_jKRVIE6jdxL4VvYWd-hnTcRdAeRG0zixS3uU7_ROEmY-oWmjIBswNG09aOQNbpWfsMKLctAhea3HwNfTSOUDkRJz7RSxtA9GZGGoNaAzWzjJPE5vHIOeL80Cg56YlWp0bOXr1LlGh8yYSbOags7NpYmFSBRpc5RC75lj7ibyNV-KEMP2d_uRbkIyAfph_qVifLuhFTuMsbaQ-xSsvrGuxws3gqrkBuRgwUUbDyMkgzd-7e-RLRv1CEvBZ9UhR0we3BxDphMNwh0nAzoapOHdukAIzpkgTN1jl0jcpseU2kQnM4Y-cPokWsTc6mBM3jEnKmebA2SJMsy5Qp1C) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. name: Tim Scott
subject: Friend, I want to make this the best January ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
your early investment in victory

Friend, I officially became NRSC Chairman a couple of weeks ago.

**_[The goal for my first month is simple: Make this our best January ever.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkT2P3CAQhn8N7ljx6Y_CxUmWu42iNCkRAbyekwELxnfKv4_YzfXXIWDeeZ6Z33dzt3BAevywMcwlmlJNKtWZmBPu1FbqdgvFCCY0ZZxybWTn534Sw8i7MPNB9pOSkrNun7VVyk0qaDdtW--2yQ1s0E76MQw6-K2DueUwzjVnatTs5tg0bt4OI7OC8eCJYiWc158DnE3RvucC-PeWAnbHvCOelcg3IlYi1hrcVcLtE1IJ_uZyJGJt4ESs7zYJTSN4-pLASgM9bauT64XRxODhikQuIVo4iOjbZc1XcYHIJYv4GkEreT45G08Lj0Tk8p9fmWRNcbT9i-CffXhr9MHNzzeD1WVE8-J5RqAjcvl1p1_-X8k5YUhI5LJdyRcLFdKDiL40u9LOcsFyBSJ6G_HMFRBy41Bdmf35CccBtR-IYo-m0ubQ4XfX-DGLfwEAAP__J86nmQ)_**

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pO1PRvcdCBTszFY5te3U2A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpajAkP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDExNVcDc3BjQgpnf42Th2fq3AygUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pO1PRvcdCBTszFY5te3U2A~~/AARclAA~/RgRpajAkP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI1MDExNVcDc3BjQgpnf42Th2fq3AygUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te86054fe-3995-4ff5-bb0a-e3c584544d07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, First, Donald Trump announced his plan to change the name of the Gulf of Mexico to the Gulf of America... Then, MAGA Marjorie Taylor Greene introduced a bill to switch the gulf’s name. Now, other far-right Republicans are joining the bandwagon to change the name – even though this area has been called the Gulf of Mexico for over 400 years. So we want to know: **Should the USA rename the Gulf of Mexico?** [**[YES!]**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf91a422-3700-43fd-8446-7dd594494e9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[**[NO, that's ridiculous!]**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfee0db63-83ad-4066-8028-30947ec6eaaa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, changing this water’s name goes against hundreds of years of precedence – and some world leaders will refuse to accept the new name, especially since the United States shares the territory. Not to mention, it’s totally nonsensical! But we want to know if you think the change would be worth it, so please take our quick, one-question poll and let us know! **Should the USA rename the Gulf of Mexico?** [**[YES!]**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61aabb73-988b-4141-9bf5-9c01c568e4ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[**[NO!]**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te68086ae-999c-472c-bc0e-f4a86a27ef4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbaae82d-6408-4821-a6bd-22d868acd2c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B2hLEPYFMM3T20G5si3qYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpajHSP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTE1VwNzcGNCCmd_2paHZ-r5SkJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B2hLEPYFMM3T20G5si3qYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpajHSP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTE1VwNzcGNCCmd_2paHZ-r5SkJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B2hLEPYFMM3T20G5si3qYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpajHSP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTE1VwNzcGNCCmd_2paHZ-r5SkJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B2hLEPYFMM3T20G5si3qYw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpajHSP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjUwMTE1VwNzcGNCCmd_2paHZ-r5SkJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The Power of Attitude: A Life-Changing Message
body:
Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good.

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father.
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0255a2ee986b4f53bfa82cd6cd3296c8&_e=hdrFrl6hZgbHWhDbT7-6SywMzL5iL5SKNT2DxBsC8JK3tp8at8xgJUxuzFgdvBw6eO6nkRxpzdUVR2l5Yjx6-TYerYhIHmVAxAqWPvUyKbcPKS71s58wPO5RDwoQ2hH305iWt_ck7V7Aa7urJl_TjARLGXMYbjh537fb_FRRBRnLWk3kq93NHBc4wovh6NlK1wqUVSuV2_VLm2E2vdoxfoMtRV0TTBaM0gAwGKntwDLbFvSR-XJw0c-XR__9RbdKAjbWOSIvQxXEU-i_PAaMkyUwnXaxXC_nzfna0x-Gn5n1uYNMArXkXvJEBCwyInXbvRGmjnkTosJRH6Z32IqrCeR4DwHDo0xCJWfjp01UxDzOqK8x5WdxQozoTZvAqutlSZgcSxQ2TWXUHZpptJ4k52PM0gpHIwxmuSu3TJc8HkDCM3B7XbJRV0OntiIHEGJ_)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0255a2ee986b4f53bfa82cd6cd3296c8&_e=hdrFrl6hZgbHWhDbT7-6SywMzL5iL5SKNT2DxBsC8JK3tp8at8xgJUxuzFgdvBw6eO6nkRxpzdUVR2l5Yjx6-TYerYhIHmVAxAqWPvUyKbcPKS71s58wPO5RDwoQ2hH305iWt_ck7V7Aa7urJl_TjARLGXMYbjh537fb_FRRBRnLWk3kq93NHBc4wovh6NlK1wqUVSuV2_VLm2E2vdoxfoMtRV0TTBaM0gAwGKntwDLbFvSR-XJw0c-XR__9RbdKAjbWOSIvQxXEU-i_PAaMk0o44dNJKCIMiyVYsr12JHAHQ3RCCrvwt7X4b4yXXb6ZtWzp8o17DipkMz3j4eJbRJeU20EDD7Q-qeJydV4jj20qDsqjnbs0bvgKncCg562tdm4NmSH8Pr5SMMABzNDXMLc-1veMIabEXESr7c_8-dGuWOf3Y-vJDkiWQIRODbJm)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0255a2ee986b4f53bfa82cd6cd3296c8&_e=hdrFrl6hZgbHWhDbT7-6SywMzL5iL5SKNT2DxBsC8JK3tp8at8xgJUxuzFgdvBw6eO6nkRxpzdUVR2l5Yjx6-TYerYhIHmVAxAqWPvUyKbcPKS71s58wPO5RDwoQ2hH305iWt_ck7V7Aa7urJl_TjARLGXMYbjh537fb_FRRBRnLWk3kq93NHBc4wovh6NlK1wqUVSuV2_VLm2E2vdoxfoMtRV0TTBaM0gAwGKntwDLbFvSR-XJw0c-XR__9RbdKAjbWOSIvQxXEU-i_PAaMk494T4JVBhHAvt9wVqLnjboU12u2rmLfGvjd4VROSHDPjWzDJXMXAMoONb3weX94pK5rqzQXHANJ7Gt_TBvx_mCHz4GDhiARI2_e15eq8T4Uc8BUYGzhwXU_7ZVnXQAVLN0fycXQi7-me82qjZhNRCQ4rkPx7a3-pL0n7xrgH4oX)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. clean_body: Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. | | | Hello Friend, It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do." Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything." That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life." That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like: Purpose over aimlessness Perserverance over defeat * Faith over worry My book, Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to Pathway to Victory's ministry work this month. Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices. | | To get your copy of Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life , you can give a gift of any amount here: I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer! Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: New Speaker, Allstate Sued, and a Giant Astronaut
body:
Texas House members elected Rep. Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) as their next speaker yesterday, concluding two months of deal-making to determine who would succeed Dade Phelan (R-Beaumont) in the role. The election followed a November GOP caucus vote in which Rep. David Cook (R-Mansfield) emerged as the winner, while Burrows claimed the backing of a majority of the full chamber’s 150 members.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8-KszAUBfCnSXZK7s0fPxdZfDC4GGhn0ULdSTRXDcRJ0bS2bz84-9kdOIcfnNupO7kQw_d0dgvZ_BpThwJ1IaAA3XkX4rtT3Nte-Bo4WaikqZWopOSzVaMSlcIKdI09aQAn0HjtFfaDMcbwYA9MAGgAKZQu0Y2oyQz_3IjSkWdKkA85rWWeKdPLbWN8pyet5ZAWHu2c831j8j_DhmGz73s5PQoa0nL0DBuUF6P11Rzxcmvbz_OxlM326IHJj2vbfPHV-vseYgybqZgS0-JC_OXzn3-fFn8CAAD__6WOU_0) | |

**Good morning!** On this day in 1939, the [Texas Memorial Museum](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zzGO6yAQgOHTQGeLGcA4BcVr3OW1W1okDDFaMBGQOLn9atPvBb5f_9d5PbuY4n777zLZ_gplRYF6EDCAXr2L6b0q7u1F-BNwsmDkdFLCSMk362Ey-hTAAxHMHslfZ8Jg1BxIGxN4tL-YANAAUig9oguoabrOLqB05JkS5GMvdewbdXq5FtK7PKmO15J5slvv98bkP4YLw-U4jrG3zZU9xZ3GUm8Ml83t_lLKN8OF9l4jNYbLhxoy5VKjS0N-NHpkXq2_HzGl2CbDlLhlF9Mn1P88f1r8CQAA__-01l2G) opened on the University of Texas campus in Austin. Established by the Texas Centennial Celebration Bill of 1935, the museum houses more than 5 million specimens today, including the remains of a pterosaur with a 40-foot wingspan. The Texas House [chose a speaker](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngc0W9wJxGBi6sKVrR4vAJUEldmSIHb995eydj_Qd_T-X8eJzydPt2z_ItneaRxSoOwEd6DH6XPZR8WivIhrgZGGQJ6PEICW_Wy3SGRWZYTgnMEBGSB-iCUjJQKDAsz0wAaABpFC6R59Q0ymcfULpKTIlKOY2L327U6O3r6ns80pLH-YHL_be2rMy-cXQMXTbtvW_4RqPkaE7bIZOAEMHiqH7AF2hW67Ft9dCXZinlSaqXXtRjX5n6Phi43PLpeR6GpgSt4fP5XPX_u1fLf4FAAD__4hEXGk) yesterday, ending two months of speculation about who would succeed Dade Phelan in the role. Check out the story in today's _Roundup_ section, and let us know what you think about the news by replying to this email. If you have confusing medical bills or have been denied a claim, it helps to have someone advocate for you. ## Texas House Elects New Speaker
Texas House members elected Rep. Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) as [their next speaker](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAUheGngc0W9wJxGBi6sKVrR4vAJUEldmSIHb995eydj_Qd_T-X8eJzydPt2z_ItneaRxSoOwEd6DH6XPZR8WivIhrgZGGQJ6PEICW_Wy3SGRWZYTgnMEBGSB-iCUjJQKDAsz0wAaABpFC6R59Q0ymcfULpKTIlKOY2L327U6O3r6ns80pLH-YHL_be2rMy-cXQMXTbtvW_4RqPkaE7bIZOAEMHiqH7AF2hW67Ft9dCXZinlSaqXXtRjX5n6Phi43PLpeR6GpgSt4fP5XPX_u1fLf4FAAD__4hEXGk) yesterday, concluding two months of deal-making to determine who would succeed Dade Phelan (R-Beaumont) in the role. The election followed a November GOP caucus vote in which Rep. David Cook (R-Mansfield) emerged as the winner, while Burrows claimed the backing of a majority of the entire chamber’s 150 members. Rep. Ana-Maria Rodriguez Ramos (D-Richardson) was also a candidate for speaker, but Republicans hold an 88-62 majority in the chamber. She was [eliminated from the running](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OhCAURp8GOyZwwb-CYhu72XZLw8hVyaAYuP7M22_cfuvvy8nJ-Xn2T-uDX6dvu6Cha4w9CCi5kFyWvbM-fHpdOPMSrpUFGlmrqtWiVqqYzVBb7VpRCd3KtpbYjCheNVhVKYCmUYU3N0xIWUqphC4fYEcosRoaO4Ky6JgW6DzF9KAZCS-bx_CJB6bHEJcimJloy0x9MegYdO8xXnTcE4NuxTMz6EIcbGDQJdy42zP5lb_2lOKZ-REJHaeLz3HPyPOG9o2J348QT06R-zXvacKV-BQ3vsQDF1ypSMZtpw_B56pmWkyL9eFPiP4tdBj4DQAA__-zjmti) after the first round of voting, in which she received 23 votes while Cook got 56 and Burrows 71, short of the majority needed to be elected. During the second round of voting, [Burrows received 85 votes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGnMZ0je2wTKFzchi633RINMMbWGhzh2ZC8_Srptz7Sd6T_6zbeMOW0r_9xI8_PUEZQ4KTSUrtxwZRfo20WP6ml1w15fTVtb9XVmCb6EDqrcNZ6AksW-tmFRYfZYNuFXuHUJP_GlNZOa6OsuwAGcNTOHQYwSIuwipbE5bhwJKYn1pBf5UHHZS5bk31kvldh_gkYBAwcKaac35uAIZaNdjqrgKEyMskTeY4CBqc654ySH0_G8lNJUqaZq9zplPVO-E2HnHI5JRcZ8JBHWiPLM-2rgKE5_HI_U86ptldh1bph-pw2_Gehh4ffAAAA__8KqWow), Cook received 55, and nine Democratic members abstained. Burrows won the support of 49 Democrats and 36 Republicans, while Cook received votes from 52 Republicans and three Democrats. Burrows [called for unity](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngS3WcXCmHhi6eEvXjtbZHAkSCVFMbeftq3Tv_uuT_u_zdOZc8v3yxTcJ7Uh1QkA6gTkZmiLn8pqcjmGGOBgtwXjbDw68tfoaZmFaPNHMmIhdjD7NTpyfh2EBBNA5vDEwhoyx4KhDTkjSLx-c0LJE5UBibvXZtas0OXhN5VU3eXZLvekSrq09VmU_FY4Kx33fu1QPzz9ry_d3onDccpSqcDTkexpQP0N87LmUvPZeObjcOJc_rf27twX8DQAA__-3llGp) after the vote, promising members that “whether you voted for me or not, my office door will be open to you.” The Republican Party of Texas, meanwhile, has vowed to censure members of its party who backed Burrows after he failed to secure the caucus nomination.
## Texas A&M Backtracks on Race-based Event after Abbott Threat
Plans to send staff and PhD students to a [conference that restricted attendance based on race](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAQBeBfgx0GBnHXguIau732SjPK6E4OxQDR3X9_cfvrJpnkey_v5zE8kANvyzeu5MprjgMosFJpqe3gkcN7aCrvRuU7XZHTN9N2jboZUz3dZIjgPupOofdWtQAwGWuM7ebxbjRW7C5MaW21NqqxNeAMltrpjjMYJC8aRZ5LTHV5UqEX5jm840GpnuJaBfcsZc_CfAnoBfTneda_Y3ldTwH9ZQvolRbQ60ZA_wEkrlnuiTJ72opMlPe4-Sw9sRxxkwfHgIXjJjEEWj5nljgXSnKJh8RxjKVkOSUuPHG-kqrk_H5yCJzbm2jUsiKHT8Xy72aHg78AAAD__6csb9A) were scrapped by Texas A&M after Gov. Greg Abbott threatened to fire university President Mark Welsh on Monday. After conservative activist Christopher Rufo [shared an email](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUQOGngS3WvZf_gaGLt3TtaGGDYyRcR0BS5-2rdO96hk86X9fpGnLJ37fPsCffz_WYCEhdAC-ophhyeU2SRz9DdMiTRyO0k2CE4JsnOztppJ0NzuSc1TCD0qAVaGedlTz7NwaIClGAVAOFlVTSiw0riZAik5Bi7kcd-pZ6OkNby-t4pjosx86L33q_NyY-GI2MxvNdGY01hbJsNbf6WA9GY-uhPxqjEa2xVmuyJJxDcEoKXn28_-RSctOGSbjtIZc_vf-7-_T0GwAA__8noVOt) from the university inviting students and staff to apply to attend the conference, Abbott was asked if the activity complied with state law prohibiting diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs at Texas public universities. “ _Hell, no. It’s against Texas law and violates the US Constitution. It will be fixed immediately, or the president will soon be gone_ ,” [Abbott responded](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD3PnDAQhH-N6Rb5g49QuMhb0L2RUqVEa7yAFWOfzB7c_fuI61NNMdI8o-fP9_SNIYa0_sKdLL-WPGmpW5AKVDt5DPE9NZW3TvpBVWRVb7qhkb0x1WZ7Nw_OzXIwnZkbY2bvqHG49K3v0A9LFew9JpVqlTKyaWuNi26pm3_gog2SF40kHziXmjdieuGxxHc-qdRz3qtoN-bHIcxPoUehx-u66v1Idyf0SAmeh9BjouuOzBsVocc1n7AWWgGdy8zAWyFkSgdwhiWXmSA_GT4wQNjhUegInhLDDQaMkVby4CmAwwRnyBE55CT0iAW-vlQpv9Xfqlj_uEKM4eh60ch1xxA_r_m_Gk-r_wUAAP__ieB4jQ) on social media. Following Abbott’s threat, Welsh announced that the university would not send anyone to the conference. _“I don’t believe we fully considered the spirit of our state law in making the initial decision to participate,”_ he explained.
## Missing Hiker Rescued
Border Patrol agents and a helicopter crew [rescued a missing hiker](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2yqyAURp8GOxzY8mMKitvY5bandEC2kQkKgxiTtz9j-lOv-dZ8s37u492GGLbHf7uiqe85jcBAUsYpl6O3IX5G0XjjmL_xBg3XnboJpruuWQzX0mlQzjol-KyE73Xfg2Kuc7MGOTXBXDLGueS8Y0K2YGeQqKbeztBZ9EQw9KGm0tYFK77tPsdPemFpp7Q20Sy15p10_wgMBIbzPNtn3dcLEhg2PHcCw3dGYJhcpgvGMKVcsVCXisdCs60lxQtkWnCfDqRLeGKhYaOPw3obj4x0TcdWbdguT1OMz2eIMexKE8Eeqw3x-6f-Gehl4DcAAP__byRquA) in Guadalupe Mountains National Park on Sunday, battling below-freezing temperatures, snow, and limited visibility. The hiker had become separated from his group on Saturday after [reaching Guadalupe Peak](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQRp_GdKDxmN_CxTZ02XZLNMEDjNZghE0Ib3-V9Lf99Ono6Px7DA8SL9v8l1a26T2FAQGrHHSuq8GR-HsoM2ef4DqdsdWNqbsSGmOyxbZNx8-R2oYmaOuWR5hqM-JzBKiasu0ysR8YaF1pbaCsCqQJK67HliY0xE6VwE5SOIq0cOI3xcnf4cVHMYY183ZJaY_K_FHYK-yv6yrWO9JGWwqbhM9JYe9l4phuzwr7cCYXwhEV9nQkGb_jKjHKNueL_Ocjn09y5M-d8zWcWyLZYo4AxlQNFvuyZ4d1-yXeS6wbVcK8kvivT_o10MviTwAAAP__7lZqfw), the highest natural point in Texas, with an elevation of 8,751 feet. The following morning, a CBP Air and Marine Operations helicopter crew located the hiker. One team member was dropped off nearby to conduct an initial assessment. Border Patrol Search, Trauma, and Rescue (BORSTAR) agents then hiked two hours to get to the rescue location, where they treated the hiker for hypothermia symptoms. Once stabilized, the hiker was transported to a lower elevation and evacuated to a hospital by helicopter. _“I am very proud of our AMO crew and the U.S. Border Patrol BORSTAR team for their efforts in this rescue during very challenging winter conditions. Our agents’ training, preparation, and conditioning really made a difference during this rescue,”_ [said Efren Gonzalez](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGu4yAQgOHT4A6LGTBOCopt3GXbLa0JjG202FjAxsntV-_17wK_fn1_HvODYorH-pt2du295BkVDlKBhGEOFNNnNl1wTxXu0LGDUdu7UaPW3ebQEuN4t7xYDWq0AZCtAWXI3DSA76L7iimAAUArM_RICw5s_Y0W1MRBGMUhtlz6tnHjN9UlffKLS-_z3iW3tXZWoX8JnARO13X1_nn2a34JnA6-asl5Fzil7CnJnUMkWTgxVRY40Z7lxin6fDYu0he-JB1BPnOpjYqklY9WZeHq_7Hc4l8uXXHhvGJKsdpRGLXuFNP3S_sR5-XwfwAAAP__WQNo-A), El Paso AMO air branch director.

[HealthLock](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8-KszAUBfCnSXZK7s0fPxdZfDC4GGhn0ULdSTRXDcRJ0bS2bz84-9kdOIcfnNupO7kQw_d0dgvZ_BpThwJ1IaAA3XkX4rtT3Nte-Bo4WaikqZWopOSzVaMSlcIKdI09aQAn0HjtFfaDMcbwYA9MAGgAKZQu0Y2oyQz_3IjSkWdKkA85rWWeKdPLbWN8pyet5ZAWHu2c831j8j_DhmGz73s5PQoa0nL0DBuUF6P11Rzxcmvbz_OxlM326IHJj2vbfPHV-vseYgybqZgS0-JC_OXzn3-fFn8CAAD__6WOU_0) has existed as a **private service for high-net-worth individuals** for over a decade. Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) as yesterday, concluding two months of deal-making to determine who would succeed Dade Phelan (R-Beaumont) in the role. The election followed a November GOP caucus vote in which Rep. David Cook (R-Mansfield) emerged as the winner, while Burrows claimed the backing of a majority of the entire chamber’s 150 members. Rep. Ana-Maria Rodriguez Ramos (D-Richardson) was also a candidate for speaker, but Republicans hold an 88-62 majority in the chamber. She was after the first round of voting, in which she received 23 votes while Cook got 56 and Burrows 71, short of the majority needed to be elected. During the second round of voting, , Cook received 55, and nine Democratic members abstained. Burrows won the support of 49 Democrats and 36 Republicans, while Cook received votes from 52 Republicans and three Democrats. Burrows after the vote, promising members that “whether you voted for me or not, my office door will be open to you.” The Republican Party of Texas, meanwhile, has vowed to censure members of its party who backed Burrows after he failed to secure the caucus nomination. Texas A&M Backtracks on Race-based Event after Abbott Threat Plans to send staff and PhD students to a were scrapped by Texas A&M after Gov. Greg Abbott threatened to fire university President Mark Welsh on Monday. After conservative activist Christopher Rufo from the university inviting students and staff to apply to attend the conference, Abbott was asked if the activity complied with state law prohibiting diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs at Texas public universities. “ Hell, no. It’s against Texas law and violates the US Constitution. It will be fixed immediately, or the president will soon be gone ,” on social media. Following Abbott’s threat, Welsh announced that the university would not send anyone to the conference. “I don’t believe we fully considered the spirit of our state law in making the initial decision to participate,” he explained. Missing Hiker Rescued Border Patrol agents and a helicopter crew in Guadalupe Mountains National Park on Sunday, battling below-freezing temperatures, snow, and limited visibility. The hiker had become separated from his group on Saturday after , the highest natural point in Texas, with an elevation of 8,751 feet. The following morning, a CBP Air and Marine Operations helicopter crew located the hiker. One team member was dropped off nearby to conduct an initial assessment. Border Patrol Search, Trauma, and Rescue (BORSTAR) agents then hiked two hours to get to the rescue location, where they treated the hiker for hypothermia symptoms. Once stabilized, the hiker was transported to a lower elevation and evacuated to a hospital by helicopter. “I am very proud of our AMO crew and the U.S. Border Patrol BORSTAR team for their efforts in this rescue during very challenging winter conditions. ## Hegseth Battles Through Four-Hour Hearing
Pete Hegseth, President-elect Donald Trump's pick to lead the Defense Department, endured a four-hour [Senate confirmation hearing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQBb_GdEb22j6gcJGG7tKmRHt4gY2MjbBz6P4-uvSpn_RmNF_36Y4cOa2fuJOvS55AgZNKS-2mgBxfk22CX4iATENed-Y2WDVo1Wx-eASre5ix7zuDzqFxnQUipZ0ZDJqG_ftNae20Nk5BuwwGZyJrcOkpPJywigLXfLbfmVPdaImv_KSznfPeRL_VehRhPgSMAsbrutr5URJd5b0LGCM_Sf4cASsVAeNBleRGa6G6yTmnhc8dK-ckN8KT0yrfOgLG5vThuDhGLrdOWLXuyPGPWf9r8PTwGwAA__8rO162) Tuesday, fielding questions about his qualifications, personal conduct, and military policy. Senate Armed Services Committee Democrats criticized Hegseth, alleging that the veteran and former Fox News host held a [negative view of women](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00Ltu7CAUheGnwR0Wm8vMoaA4jbtJm9LCsBkTcbHsnbHm7SOnT72kb0n_52N--Fxye374io5Sn6WQhgvgYOboc3nPeoguIUpUAzq4q5vVwoIYVqcAlui1ACPVTQSbogVjvbmDUTaYZcju0gSAAVBGyDFZ5QOiVj79w7gYpgXGTH0fv3putGIq7_7CfQy9DsWtRNvB1H8mJyan8zzH0JZwjUxOF83kJIDJCTSTE-3fdeMbEvIVnwfSyiMmbAfyA5sn5KG3lPfqKfc2rlTLsLu4nbmUfNzuTItn9bn8ntNfMV5O_gQAAP__p1tgow) in the military and accused him of degrading female soldiers. GOP lawmakers and officials praised Hegseth’s temperament and his ability to handle personal attacks while staying on message. Former White House Press Secretary Ari Fleischer described Hegseth as “refreshing” for [remaining focused on policy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1urDAUBOCngc7IfyxQuLgN3d42JTqxj-FExl7ZXghvH5E-9egbjebjuTyBAsX1P-xoqk-L5LJnXDDRLw4oXItunfGIElWLRgzqMWk-Cd5uxgpUvR4BBq8eWrhxstBb56fBce3GoSVzt3EheiFUz2XnJwUWUSvwI7rPvtEcHdWUu69EsW7ow5UOzJ1NexvMVuurNOpfI-dGzud5dj59RzzLnTdyfqVAlWxp5GwDQmYHFUqR2RQL5gMqHVhYhhAuBjm9o2MbrgXrxmx-l43iyjxhvm7hKe9Qb74hZIprm417nRQClcfQaL7uQOF3Wf3rqcPInwAAAP__iqJwVg) instead of playing politics. Confirmation hearings will continue through the week with lawmakers scheduled to question Department of Homeland Security candidate Gov. The Justice Department [released Volume One](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8Gd1j8OY4Litu4y223tAgM8WQxWDCJN2-_SvotP33S0dH5uiwXhwnz7b_bwFIsixJq4EJyOSzBYXotpgs2AijQHVg56tNkxCRFt9rgVVAxqjBN4qrPBoRTp3F0oxkmbcy5Q_umCSkHKfUgVB8n7TyA0S6eIVwHZgQEpFL7e8FMK8T0Kk-ovS9bl-xKtDem_zE1MzUfx9HH8pPhaO-fqXkvCQl9Y2oO5c4rJHANGm87eHSJ-_LIDRK_O__N24a0Nl5hL5U45ic0wpsjLJlTfWw7hwT-MzET1AgVsgfuXYOu2rAfmBK208iMuG0O00eS_or2tOo3AAD___Cmc9E) of former Special Counsel Jack Smith’s report on his investigation into President-elect Donald Trump’s alleged efforts to overturn the 2020 election. Trump responded to the report through [a series of social media posts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAQxfGnwR0RM0BsFxS3octtt7SIGWKyfFiGJMrbr7L91kf66ej_dVkuLqZYbv9dJtNDXVCg5gI46MW7mN6LGrwJREhyIAOjPM9KzCCGzWgltNcBR3kGOQFdScxSwjTJMXhY_RDNRxMAGkBqgacwS7cSKenCRP6qmRLkY6_H6V5j6RuF9K5POk5rzUMyW-97Y_IfQ8vQlvdeW_9MDO0HZmgFMLSgGNpH44VejaHtxyPvvCWXG_d0uHIjz5PLdD1cLLzttEaX-FofpVHid7d-85Zj3xja4TB-f8WUYjuPTIlbdjH9vul_1Xka_AkAAP__VvRmWg), labeling Smith as "deranged" and proclaiming his innocence, stating, _“The Voters Have Spoken!!!”_
## Starbucks Ends Its Open-Door Policy
Starbucks announced Monday it is [reversing its 2018 open-door policy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3oj4NwwMXbKla0cLXy4xLTYW4ER5-yrdO376pKOj83Wbbz7ltN8__YauxzJzyhWhjDA1B5_ya5ZjcBGRoxjRsUloK6lldFydtpwh5eC9kT4AUi0napSNHCOgtGNybxplTDEmFOWXaIUHRCl8NBgWNUiKIfVSL98l7X3FmF_lgfUCZRuzW3s_2iA-Bn4d-NUfOz7b-3qP2hNkHPi1dV-XE34agbP1smFt5DgrrL4hqdh6LWUjUAISKHs4oRNhJr1QZblkJgoagVkvUWkjDQZulrG6cDxTzqnpaZD0vvmU_5z6f40ejv8GAAD__3jfaWM) and will now require purchases for customers who want to hang out in the cafe or use its restrooms.

The new rules reverse an open-door policy put in place in 2018, after two black men were arrested at a Philadelphia Starbucks where they had gone for a business meeting. They bought nothing and the store ended up calling the police, leading to an outcry against the company. The [new code of conduct](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1u8yAYRq8Gb1j8JwwM3-It39rR4uclpiXGBRKUu6_cvdsjPdI50vm4rTebctrv_-0DTI9lZYRJTCimcg025fcqpmAiAAM-gaEXrrQgmpJpM0Lq6GhU7qpE8EpG57QjF-Uc155EPyVz0gilklIuCZuj5tYDCG7jFYKTSBAIqZc6f5a09w1ifpcX1NmXx5TN1vvREP-H2ILYMsaYvWs7jHb-iC3nRGxp3Vb39F8NlwN2HEqp-Cg5-Teu8ILabMbHs_rNNsB7GbjC9zNVCIgtUzXhGCnn1NQFCXJ_2JR_9f2vHC_DfgIAAP__4mxlSA) prohibits activities including discrimination, drug use, and panhandling, with violators facing potential removal and law enforcement intervention. The policy shift comes under [new CEO Brian Niccol's leadership](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSrCAURL8GM63LBXUICF5CNi_d0EK5KLsoljBj-fdbTr5RJ6e6u87Xc3jaEMM2_7cr6eLTgIBtDbzm7eBsiNcgK6c9EZKoSPNedEqC4lAtWonJo4IRPOddb90IrXp4ISVYEsK5Kui7DThvORctYOOVsBORFNY_yI0tk0AulHQ03ylsZSEfr_Smo5nSWkW9lLJnJv4xNAzNeZ7NK9uSnL1ugKHJJR0XQ7Omje685xga4AwNlx_AHuNr-sl12mmrXUpHvacYpqueFrvNlBmavu8equsUQM_QVId2-xliDLnrmYR5tSF-DpW_BL01_gYAAP__w9tllg) as the company aims to prioritize paying customers and address safety concerns that have led to store closures.

The 174-page document contained a letter from Smith to Attorney General Merrick Garland in which the special counsel asserted that the evidence presented would have been sufficient to secure a conviction. . The new rules reverse an open-door policy put in place in 2018, after two black men were arrested at a Philadelphia Starbucks where they had gone for a business meeting. They bought nothing and the store ended up calling the police, leading to an outcry against the company. The prohibits activities including discrimination, drug use, and panhandling, with violators facing potential removal and law enforcement intervention. name: Shelby County Republican Party
subject: Shelby County Republican Party News (January 2025)
body:
Happy New Year Shelby County Patriots!

After a grueling Presidential Election year, and a much-needed respite over the holidays, it is time to get back to work.

Our next meeting is next Tuesday, January 21st at 6:00 p.m. at Calvary United Baptist Church, 9480 County Rd 25A, Sidney, Ohio 45365. Please join us if you can!

It should be an upbeat and celebratory meeting because, as you know, we will finally have an America-first President after being without one for a long and arduous four years.

We were planning to have Adam Josefczyk, the Co-Founder & President of Forge Leadership Network, come present at our January meeting, but circumstances beyond his control are preventing him from attending. We are trying to reschedule him soon.

A few news highlights:

Mark your calendars for the evening of Thursday, March 20th, for our annual Lincoln Day Dinner at the Shelby Oaks Golf Club. More details will be out soon, but Ohio’s Attorney General Dave Yost will be the keynote speaker. AG Yost served two terms as Ohio’s Auditor of State and is on his second term as our Attorney General. He has also announced that he is running for Governor in 2026. It is our goal to get every Republican candidate for Governor to Shelby County in 2025, so stay tuned for upcoming opportunities to hear from each gubernatorial candidate. Mark your calendars now for Thursday, March 20th, 2025.

Call for nominations: Steve Knouff has agreed to head up our annual awards program this year. If you would like to nominate someone for Republican Central Committee Member of the Year or Republican of the Year, please contact Steve. Attached is the list of our current Central Committee Members with contact info.

If you look at that Central Committee roster, you will see that we have some vacancies. Jim Liggett has agreed to lead the charge to get those vacancies filled. We had some folks express their interest during the busy election season. If you were one of those and you don’t hear from Jim soon, please reach out to him. We were all a bit overwhelmed during the election season and we don’t want anyone who expressed interest to fall through the cracks. We need all the help we can get to help President Trump Make America Great Again!!!

We will be kicking off our annual 200 Club Membership Drive very soon. If you are unfamiliar with it, this is the primary way we fund the operations of the Shelby County Republican Party. Quite frankly, we believe we are much better at effectively using your contributions right here in Shelby County than the Ohio Republican Party or the Republican National Committee could ever hope to be. So, please consider setting aside some of your political contribution money for the local party right here in Shelby County, Ohio.

That’s all for now! Hope to see some of you at our January 21st meeting.

Cheers...Dan
(937) 206-2970
[cecilda.usaf@gmail.com](mailto:cecilda.usaf@gmail.com)
clean_body: Happy New Year Shelby County Patriots! After a grueling Presidential Election year, and a much-needed respite over the holidays, it is time to get back to work. Our next meeting is next Tuesday, January 21st at 6:00 p.m. at Calvary United Baptist Church, 9480 County Rd 25A, Sidney, Ohio 45365. Please join us if you can! It should be an upbeat and celebratory meeting because, as you know, we will finally have an America-first President after being without one for a long and arduous four years. disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Weston D
body:
I just departed Denver, CO for Washington, D.C. thanks to you! Here is the latest...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dbNxPY_ALV5g1_dKpeg1mYbA_xmKNMe7BvVsfQf54QG4QKO7r7oi1C-AXdoXw9b2Ybn594AFwf6D7QNhVp8-A1yFxFJq6GZqJuDkggREvjnhwVHGVNRAqflz14ZCFY7QwigKioeQ2iEeC4Ls3a6g-wyDUfS0GbAT_OLjs5kYJLuC7KaMSlN81vXJA4Y003IROeVSa29hV_A=&c=xo75xtdJkHdkSmQBomKpnYr-Zx_8w5uaZca-72XC9hCcMsO91daVTA==&ch=0H6Hcq0XuXrWrMYZotfcxL8GJhyET1hw5KpWfpUKD63NoOKmEiNfhw==)
---
Patriot, I have just taken off from Denver, CO, for Washington, D.C., for the RNC Winter Meeting and the 60th Presidential Inauguration!
As I boarded the plane this morning, I cannot express the joy, and love of country that I felt as I left home to celebrate the dawn of the "Golden Age of America!"
This week in D.C. will not only be historic but will be the culmination of over 8 years of dedication, hard work, and countless hours of volunteer work I have given to this movement.
If you have received any of my prior emails, you know that I have been fundraising to help cover the costs of the 8 days I will be in Washington.
This has been a massive undertaking for me as a 21-year-old Gen Z political activist who has volunteered my time to every campaign I have ever worked.
If you are able, I humbly ask for your support as I kick off day one of 8 in our nation's capital by clicking the button below.
If you contribute to the Inaugural fund via the link below, I will randomly select one of you to receive a FREE Trump-Vance Inaugural Lapel Pin pictured below.
---
| [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dbNxPY_ALV5g1_dKpeg1mYbA_xmKNMe7BvVsfQf54QG4QKO7r7oi1C-AXdoXw9b2Ybn594AFwf6D7QNhVp8-A1yFxFJq6GZqJuDkggREvjnhwVHGVNRAqflz14ZCFY7QwigKioeQ2iEeC4Ls3a6g-wyDUfS0GbAT_OLjs5kYJLuC7KaMSlN81vXJA4Y003IROeVSa29hV_A=&c=xo75xtdJkHdkSmQBomKpnYr-Zx_8w5uaZca-72XC9hCcMsO91daVTA==&ch=0H6Hcq0XuXrWrMYZotfcxL8GJhyET1hw5KpWfpUKD63NoOKmEiNfhw==)

---
You can contribute by clicking any image on this email or the linked button.
---
| History will be made very soon in Washington, D.C., and I am eternally grateful for the opportunity I have been given to represent my generation and fellow Republicans on the national level!
As I finish this chapter in my story, I could not be more excited to complete it by witnessing the culmination of 8 years of hard work, with the most incredible comeback in American history coming to a close.
I am humbled to have had supporters like you, and I look forward to speaking with you soon.
#MAGA!
Best,

body:
What's the one thing Democrats fear most?

| [ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HGgdPDoEB9uvwmJECfzYaw~~/AARclAA~-KUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Fellow Conservative, **[President Trump just made a bold statement that has Democrats shaking in their boots:](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AxkoGOR5vZLmVlUihTB-9g~~/AARclAA~-CoYdn8Qw_ilIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**
## "I will be DEMANDING THAT VOTER ID, AND PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP, ARE A NECESSARY PART AND COMPONENT OF THE VOTING PROCESS!"
The Left will stop at nothing to block Voter ID, because they know that when elections are secure, they can't cheat. But we can't let them get away with it. [We must stand with President Trump and demand that our elections are fair and secure.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HGgdPDoEB9uvwmJECfzYaw~~/AARclAA~-KUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) | | [ STAND WITH TRUMP ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AxkoGOR5vZLmVlUihTB-9g~~/AARclAA~-CoYdn8Qw_ilIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
_[Elon Musk recently slammed a new California law that prohibits requiring photo identification when voting, saying it was passed](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HGgdPDoEB9uvwmJECfzYaw~~/AARclAA~-KUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ "to make voting fraud unprovable."
It's **[outrageous that Democrats are trying to make it easier to commit voter fraud!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HGgdPDoEB9uvwmJECfzYaw~~/AARclAA~-KUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

body:

| | | Get a load of this...
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=187ae41e9b00483dbc874706f3a3bd6f&_e=X6Q_kBpcqLLhT-4hqk3RTkYw7iwmLauWRBr-8KJeeJ1avpyjUHdCnNEmH1T79k4vXXeJXWwG2qmbN_GCE6UJjIWDvVAUTcoYPu__-euwq23kJjqNypsgwojz_rQibttdPnV6xyjI3oBVWu_u-1CdhI-FX6R4y23IYEFUXbR3s8PdJRanFIMsTVdkr-qaxpUKwm0PVAFG9gO16NWAQpZDVmpY7rQkAMAwBjP3vyMU5bsFMwrN8-syX07XcrUPo8SYQe_S_jV9S2783JhFkFEcyMFO15RFcnfzXl-pdsiF2GLFhtupbzQC4xOOQ8qNTjxMLmpGlwwCIidNxxdp-H58OSy6Oqva51ZFj0igWKph18NcIsHVtidEvEbJGqcaxntglCMmSGfgWbRjG22JBehd4Ipud-1ry9ElY6uPu3pZGRbxYyGJQbyFCRSNr1LpdsC8N_D8t3ooLNCUputguiWBMw%3D%3D "Gavin Newsom and California Dems reach $50M deal to Trump-proof the state")
---

subject: I'm Trump's guy in the FL-01 Special Election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body:
And I’ll continue Matt Gaetz’s legacy in FL-01. Early voting is
about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush with you:

I love President Trump – I’m humbled to have earned his
endorsement.

I love the Sunshine State – I’m honored to serve as Florida’s
CFO and State Fire Marshal.

My name is Jimmy Patronis. I’M TRUMP’S GUY RUNNING IN THE SPECIAL
ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ'S SEAT IN CONGRESS.

Early voting is about to begin here so I won’t beat around the bush
with you:

Republicans control the House of Representatives by a RAZOR-THIN
margin. I’m the cavalry coming in to grow our Majority. But I
can’t fill Matt Gaetz’s seat without some more help.

THAT’S WHY I’M PARTNERING WITH HOUSE MAJORITY LEADER STEVE SCALISE
TO RAISE $50,000 – BEFORE MY ALL-IMPORTANT SPECIAL ELECTION – TO
HELP WIN KEY RACES LIKE THIS.
[https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/jimmy-patronis-p/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250113_WAMA1.113512_t1594521-1756&ex_tid=20250113_WAMA1.113512_t1594521-1756&utm_term=active]

_So, if you can, I respectfully ask you to pitch in here: _

PLEASE DONATE NOW
[https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/jimmy-patronis-p/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250113_WAMA1.113512_t1594521-1756&ex_tid=20250113_WAMA1.113512_t1594521-1756&utm_term=active]

#
[https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/jimmy-patronis-p/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250113_WAMA1.113512_t1594521-1756&ex_tid=20250113_WAMA1.113512_t1594521-1756&utm_term=active]

Look,

The timeline here is tight. Governor Ron DeSantis immediately called
this Special Election so we could quickly fill this seat with an
America First Conservative.

It’s a perfect plan to help ensure we deliver on President Trump’s
agenda ASAP.

BUT THAT MEANS EVERY SECOND COUNTS BETWEEN NOW AND THE PRIMARY IN A
FEW SHORT WEEKS.

Steve Scalise and I are partnering up today so Republicans are
perfectly positioned to win this seat for President Trump. If that’s
what you want too, I believe I’m the right man for the job.

I’d be honored to have your support right now.

PLEASE DONATE NOW
[https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/jimmy-patronis-p/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20250113_WAMA1.113512_t1594521-1756&ex_tid=20250113_WAMA1.113512_t1594521-1756&utm_term=active]

To victory,
_– Jimmy_

JIMMY PATRONIS
Trump-Endorsed Candidate, FL-01 Special Election

-------------------------

subject: Our Party’s biggest priority?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We want to hear from YOU, friend

Friend,

Last week, President Trump and Senate Republicans met on Capitol Hill to discuss their legislative agenda for 2025 and outline the MAGA movement's **[TOP PRIORITIES](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4W1Rsb6AoK20KG3tD6sq2g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpaj__xaSHZ-uOeplSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** moving forward.
