name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0a12b8dabf64470a001d2cc79cc9d2a&_e=VlXeODggt9CXypeMcvpbEVhMikxp_LLgxIOuXRBhA2w6F5GoRgHhXNjFY4JGor9iIqBohXVwn0Gphf3E6frI2y6lBogEFpkvTfMXWbNlnSr5dstwCeNrI3B9qDQuVg7CqWPv0-MDLmE2z2s_df7mUMYrvGNiuIuk6FGFMt-ZtCmB38uAKUBN6VQuM_U9gOZ6i5HIMhBMug4yTD2PbN6Ew8HrPU121G8Smg76MkxPGu--ubyU8BdNGgpu9pE-tLVHu4KylAgumhp9plzVALWCfA6RFA0v6_xewuCf7wJchaUHZ49ysJqOE3tvNJWGVFv6iaBcOOwj1cDyjHPMr7rmioRGCr8Q0ramgj3zpt1fLGXCXR3h4_TkDfKmrEpx2Qle26uALvsde7UC30mQ1ohnAA%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0a12b8dabf64470a001d2cc79cc9d2a&_e=VlXeODggt9CXypeMcvpbEVhMikxp_LLgxIOuXRBhA2w6F5GoRgHhXNjFY4JGor9iIqBohXVwn0Gphf3E6frI2y6lBogEFpkvTfMXWbNlnSr5dstwCeNrI3B9qDQuVg7CqWPv0-MDLmE2z2s_df7mUMYrvGNiuIuk6FGFMt-ZtCmB38uAKUBN6VQuM_U9gOZ6i5HIMhBMug4yTD2PbN6Ew8HrPU121G8Smg76MkxPGu--ubyU8BdNGgpu9pE-tLVHHtmxGu1AeloHC3QectHcrnCvoxqR2aKNdfLQ115_Vnpoyc8-JUxIjkmKJlpyzXQk3knv_w-ZzEA68RRR2HMgGbvCPfQG_fjOajto-eOJjdT6mwsILunWBKRMp5BNylg7vJjIh0ZhJCFh-bl1VfW1Cg%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. clean_body: 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. please don’t ignore this!
| **🚨 URGENT 🚨
Trump Has Sights Set on Prosecuting Political Rivals — Including Jack Smith ** Friend, despite Jack Smith announcing he’s stepping down, Donald Trump is STILL out for revenge. **ESPECIALLY now that Smith says his evidence was enough to convict him!** [**We need 99 more Democrats in your area to sign our letter thanking Jack Smith for his work and standing with him against these vile attacks! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86149?t=6&akid=18566%2E878179%2EsSYV_v) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86149?t=7&akid=18566%2E878179%2EsSYV_v)
---
To: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_I am FURIOUS that Trump is seeking to prosecute you!_**

Trump is running scared after you exposed his crimes.

He’s even promising to be a _“dictator on day one,”_ hell-bent on avenging anyone who has held him accountable.

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your amazing work over the years to bring Donald Trump to justice! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86149?t=8&akid=18566%2E878179%2EsSYV_v) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86149?t=9&akid=18566%2E878179%2EsSYV_v)

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18566%2E878179%2EsSYV_v). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18566%2E878179%2EsSYV_v).**

body:

He knows Trump and Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into these upcoming special elections, and he knows it’s going to take all of us banding together to lead Democrats to victory. Mike Johnson spent $141 MILLION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] to buy back the House Majority and put Donald Trump back in the White House.

AND NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Jamie just called on all of us to step up and fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda:

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.

## Secretary of Transportation Nominee Sean Duffy on the Docket – RedState
President-elect Donald Trump’s nominee for U.S. Secretary of Transportation, Sean Patrick Duffy, will go through his confirmation paces on Wednesday in the Senate Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) is Chairman of the committee and will lead the proceedings, along with ranking member Sen. Maria Cantwell (D-WA). ## How Biden Tried to ‘Trump-Proof’ Federal Telework
As taxpayers have spent billions to pay for mostly vacant federal office space, President Joe Biden’s administration worked with federal employee unions to lock in telework levels to help “Trump-proof” agencies, according to a congressional investigation. Judicial Watch announced recently it received a spreadsheet
from the District of Columbia Board of Elections revealing that 388
noncitizens voted in DC’s November 2024 general election.

While federal law prohibits noncitizens from voting in federal
elections, states and localities may allow noncitizens to vote in
local elections. In 2023, the DC Council amended the District of
Columbia Election Code of 1955 to allow all noncitizen residents,
including illegal aliens, to vote in its local elections.

Read More
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71913&L=34253&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMzg4LW5vbmNpdGl6ZW5zLXZvdGVkLWluLWVsZWN0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=63b25aeca36166374864d34458a3a517390aea38aaad3f6862347a8b353b2f99]

Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [article-image] [] Judicial Watch announced recently it received a spreadsheet from the District of Columbia Board of Elections revealing that 388 noncitizens voted in DC’s November 2024 general election. While federal law prohibits noncitizens from voting in federal elections, states and localities may allow noncitizens to vote in local elections. In 2023, the DC Council amended the District of Columbia Election Code of 1955 to allow all noncitizen residents, including illegal aliens, to vote in its local elections. Good morning from Gay Valimont, candidate for FL-1. __With April 1st around the corner__ , it is important to monitor the climate of Congress to make the best decision possible when choosing a candidate to support for this special election. Sadly, Congress has become a heated, partisan environment thanks to individuals like Rep. Mace (R, SC), who thinks invitations to brawl resolves disagreements. _I need**your** support to get another Democrat into office, and it starts **now**. Without **you** , tensions will only rise within our legislative chambers._
---
---
Just hours ago, Rep. Crockett (D, TX), pictured above on the right, was the victim of a threat to physical violence from Rep. Mace (R, SC), pictured above on the left. Being invited to “take it outside,” Crockett was put in a position where her time to speak was disrespected and robbed, and her ideas silenced by the loud ignorance and stubbornness of the Republican representative. If this is the case moving forward, we need to double down on our efforts to ensure our Democrats are not being intimidated and silenced on Capitol Hill. **But we are in a position to act early.**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: President Trump: “Save Rudy!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury!
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14f484b4adf045aeb913d8fef2d3ae78&_e=DGBelmyoLfRBpy7Cv7RVKB1wT1CpriMNAsOGX9lF4672LKp5_f3WC5D9sceqAuHjZ_wd06GBHIEr0XV41lRgbgddR4rnNJQ3v2HaF1mRbFWKiNfuBMZSY8o5-_I52YoEKnrEwt-4G7aRrXtazJwG9HGpZMn9Z4fv_CeHQM0ByZd2h5ZrAxKhFXrqkTKYWiNNhWITWlkx46S2_AjvJpOSw0bh6yi2XEdQnLxirq1acMZW4TMwsB2T-kZJXlmKiaj5OARRB7Eb7zlS44DjBIRu7o6ndD6U4E_ftTq3X0qAPGdzgddm7TkAVQ6BL06HzJCM6kMD7c0KLXLi21_Qz_nbsdu2xNt_RK9G4a7MaxwsFIgJLrZw9clbsWO2Bbl4xTx7)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear...
---
**_“SAVE RUDY!”_**
---
On Thursday, I will be on trial – __without_ a jury, mind you_ – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights.
---
_But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial._
---
If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America.
---
**Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud.**
---
I had a choice to make: _I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true._
---
When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "_For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul?_ " (Mark 8:36)
---
You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and __our__ Republic.
---
_Are YOU with me?_ Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?”
---
**[Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=14f484b4adf045aeb913d8fef2d3ae78&_e=DGBelmyoLfRBpy7Cv7RVKB1wT1CpriMNAsOGX9lF4672LKp5_f3WC5D9sceqAuHjZ_wd06GBHIEr0XV41lRgbgddR4rnNJQ3v2HaF1mRbFWKiNfuBMZSY8o5-_I52YoEKnrEwt-4G7aRrXtazJwG9HGpZMn9Z4fv_CeHQM0ByZd2h5ZrAxKhFXrqkTKYWiNNhWITWlkx46S2_AjvJpOSw6GB0IZSklsolad31M5V22tiBh3ULVPyiYNMFr-3eOLLAYcZ1xzPXku1tXIhCXmYVa9adT7VPMWfd2GURF4snKN22eBFfnqhN939743VxMOrnGEJOYu5nq3cp1muGlCttnGz6LX44JQGBROQVtFuCUbWwfI5t6NrRnkIeonof7Te) – as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in. **
---

clean_body: The trial of my life begins this week. And I don’t get a jury! | Fellow Patriot, With the trial of my life set to begin, President Donald J. Trump just said two powerful words for the entire nation to hear... “SAVE RUDY!” On Thursday, I will be on trial – without a jury, mind you – to determine whether or not I still have a home to live in. It’s a trial to save my home and a trial to fight for my basic freedoms and rights. But more than that, our nation’s very system of justice will also be on trial. If the Radical Left Democrats can get away with destroying me in a weaponized court without a jury – and possibly imprisoning me – solely because I served as President Trump’s lawyer, then the rule of law is DEAD in America. Just last week, a bloodthirsty left-wing judge threatened me with contempt and imprisonment if I didn’t recite her dictated false version of covered-up massive evidence of voter fraud. I had a choice to make: I could recite the state-sanctioned propaganda like an obedient little dog and be rewarded with a pat on the head. Or, I could have the courage to stand for what I know to be true. When I remind you of this Bible verse, you’ll know exactly which choice I made: "For what shall it profit a man, if he shall gain the whole world, and lose his own soul? " (Mark 8:36) You see, I refuse to give up on America. That’s why I’m going on trial to fight to save my home, my liberty, and our Republic. Are YOU with me? Will you join the cause to “SAVE RUDY?” – as I prepare for the trial that will determine whether I still even have a home to live in. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:
Get set for January 20th – it’s time to END the Biden Border Crisis!

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVZvd3MtdG8tQ3JhY2stRG93bi1vbi1Cb3JkZXJfMjAyNTAxMTUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DcnV6LVZvd3MtdG8tQ3JhY2stRG93bi1vbi1Cb3JkZXImdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTQmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/69SkwnquckIl7FAEswU--Q)

| | Fellow Conservative, A couple weeks back I joined President Trump at Turning Point USA's annual AmericaFest conference in Phoenix. _My message was clear and direct_.

Starting on January 20th, we're going to secure the border. We're going to end catch and release and the other failed Biden-Harris policies that have created the worst border crisis in U.S. history and led to our citizens being victimized.

**And to all of the illegal aliens residing in our country, PACK YOUR BAGS NOW because you 're getting the hell out!**
**[LET'S GET THE JOB DONE AND SAVE AMERICA >>>](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9DcnV6LVZvd3MtdG8tQ3JhY2stRG93bi1vbi1Cb3JkZXJfMjAyNTAxMTUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DcnV6LVZvd3MtdG8tQ3JhY2stRG93bi1vbi1Cb3JkZXImdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NTQmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/BCkXGKeF96iHLeTbhgFDSQ)** This isn't going to take a year. It's not going to take six months.

**Illegal immigration is going to PLUMMET in the next 60 days once President Trump is sworn in and we get to work to make the 2025 America First agenda a reality.**

It can't come soon enough. Every single day, Americans are being murdered, assaulted, raped, and robbed by dangerous illegal immigrants the Democrats have released into communities across our country.

It's time to get ready to roll. We need all the help we can get.

I appreciate any support you can send to support our critical efforts at Team Cruz!

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

Peter, When President Trump gets back to the White House on January 20th, one of our top priorities will be securing our border. And with the absolute **_DISASTER_** the Biden-Harris Administration left us, we can’t start soon enough! We have the opportunity to implement **BOLD, SWEEPING LEGISLATION** to not only secure our border, but keep it that way far into the future! **[**Can you take a minute to answer a few quick questions on how we should tackle this crisis?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=b0e8c83342f84f7fbf04f8acc596312d&_e=3fF76dpZMI7NGcItjdYIBOdB4ac_6ldFloIwDCIaYky-_jeL_9SMCVUCI3Owk_w8LAhHuk4fo171GCVbNqiiJyfWbDWF94Bic6tEPHJLsCLZudQKx5irUODRhFyVNgge4xd-K4Bb_0Hg2jZN31HBciCtac7czNIy56ppWG1qL75nceL32g7kcryelzEpMrRHrzGchm1oYWDDHLwD6XJCSN2FXJj_E3oqsgo2BpOroT4bZxV_gZSf9dIxnZHS4xtFRynF9z0AkcKYSCs4I0FCFT7QQ2gr6Ee0vKwo9eyOzN6pbuOouDGgkSvq_8pmR7FTffLPCn19I63pQqxK80HpTsseqI0ULamtdrtPeujFFNFFiPKXofb7FozSBv_WUyirA4X16hGNPzmwDTASCqwP3pkr2I-_VJySrM9dCo48w0uBl2x29WlIGiS21YN1p9_I8f9QhJUu8elXUrbANtSZs7l9JPdotUxw9hAfCqBCnFOl2bC4CfZyEH8EQsXNPLERzBhkU1JxLwLQEY85zWVoMhuSBKA1_sPRlTfitFyR-qI%3D)** It won’t take long, but it could make all the difference in ensuring our border is secure!

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T010d66c6-4b34-4660-9a69-8a031c74fc3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: SIGN MY LETTER [From Steve Scalise]
subject: TO: Pete Hegseth, Tulsi Gabbard, Pam Bondi, Kash Patel…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
“Good luck with your confirmation hearings!”

| |
---
| | | Friend - the confirmation hearings for President Trump's all-star Cabinet picks are officially underway!

I know several of them quite well. I can personally attest that they're America First warriors, Patriots, and total workhorses. _They 'll serve President Trump - and the country - with honor and distinction._

But the Radical Democrats will do anything and everything to derail President Trump's chosen Cabinet.

_**[That's why I worked with my team to put together a letter of support for President Trump's strong Cabinet picks. If you agree with everything on this card, please show your support by adding your name below:](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z60rtd6ae2bgue680if9tmbqgk387rm6aauvc730_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjjmcp74cph2bs "That’s why I worked with my team to put together a letter of support for President Trump’s strong Cabinet picks. If you agree with everything on this card, please show your support by adding your name below:")**_

---
_TO:_ Pete Hegseth, Tulsi Gabbard, Pam Bondi, Kash Patel, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., Kristi Noem, Marco Rubio, Sean Duffy, John Ratcliffe, et al.

_FROM:_ True American Patriots
* * *

**Good luck with your confirmation hearings - we stand with you and President Trump 100%!**

We have no doubt that YOU are the right men and women for the job. We trust you to serve President Trump and our country well.

We know the Radical Democrats will do everything in their power to tear you down, tarnish your reputation, and stonewall your confirmation. But please know that we have your back through it all.

The American People are with you through this very important process.

God bless you and God bless America.
| | [ADD YOUR NAME HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg80j5sm21l5l992do35qilmud5hdlt3s36dgkqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjjmcp74cph2bs "ADD YOUR NAME HERE")
---

I believe in President Trump's nominees. And they have my full and complete endorsement.

Would please join me and wish President Trump's Cabinet nominees luck while their hearings get underway?

Thank you for all you do,

Steve Scalise
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME HERE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztpmhlhl1kj7oh9thr8l4mfar2g8qs00uorg1p68_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjjmcp74cph2bs "ADD YOUR NAME HERE")

---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znbcoi8eqermravhk13rlmti0j854f9sh6kkvauo_rp22sh2s8i6epj3cjjmcp74cph2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

* * *
Pete Hegseth's nomination for Secretary of Defense represents a significant threat to our national security, the foundational values that define our nation, and veterans’ health!
Hegseth has a troubling history that includes allegations of alcohol abuse and sexual assault, raising serious concerns about his character and judgment. More alarming is his promotion of Christian nationalist extremism, which threatens the very principles of our democracy.
Perhaps most distressing is Hegseth's blatant disregard for disabled veterans. His dismissive comments about their health care needs demonstrate a shocking lack of empathy for those who have sacrificed for our country.
**We cannot allow someone with such a dangerous record to oversee the defense of our nation.**
**Our national security and the well-being of veterans with disabilities are at serious risk. As Americans, our safety and core values are under threat. Call the Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and tell your Senators: REJECT Pete Hegseth for Defense Secretary!**

Pete Hegseth's nomination for Secretary of Defense represents a significant threat to our national security, the foundational values that define our nation, and veterans’ health! Hegseth has a troubling history that includes allegations of alcohol abuse and sexual assault, raising serious concerns about his character and judgment. More alarming is his promotion of Christian nationalist extremism, which threatens the very principles of our democracy. Perhaps most distressing is Hegseth's blatant disregard for disabled veterans. His dismissive comments about their health care needs demonstrate a shocking lack of empathy for those who have sacrificed for our country. We cannot allow someone with such a dangerous record to oversee the defense of our nation. Our national security and the well-being of veterans with disabilities are at serious risk. As Americans, our safety and core values are under threat. Call the Capitol switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and tell your Senators: REJECT Pete Hegseth for Defense Secretary!** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. # [A Big Week for Freedom!](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=154851100&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0ODUxMTAwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY5NTYyNzYsImV4cCI6MTczOTU0ODI3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-88R0IkBBV8PFTbpejxcxjClR11U4XwQnpb7WyN40AM)
### Introducing the new Maryland Freedom Caucus
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---
| Jan 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@sfcn)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=154851100&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU0ODUxMTAwLCJpYXQiOjE3MzY5NTYyNzYsImV4cCI6MTczOTU0ODI3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-88R0IkBBV8PFTbpejxcxjClR11U4XwQnpb7WyN40AM)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvc2Zjbi9wL2EtYmlnLXdlZWstZm9yLWZyZWVkb20_.WUVcDs2fXIcpNAckWKXKDPnxY7BZkUiZvOhDS2dJyYc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/a-big-week-for-freedom?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
With states gaveling into their 2025 legislative sessions, we anticipated that this would be a big week and our state freedom caucuses didn't disappoint. We launched in a new state and publicly supported efforts to stop non-citizens from voting in American elections. Several of our states announced their legislative priorities for the year, and some publicly responded to their respective governors' "State of the State" address. And to boot, we got national coverage in the _New York Times_ , the _Associated Press_ , and _Fox News_. So grab some coffee because we have a lot of updates to share with you.
**MARYLAND FREEDOM CAUCUS**
I traveled to Annapolis, Maryland on Tuesday to help launch the Maryland Freedom Caucus with House Freedom Caucus Chairman, Congressman Andy Harris (who represents Maryland's first congressional district). **Maryland is the 13th state that the Network has helped launch.** The MDFC will be lead by Delegates Matt Morgan (Chair) and Kathy Szeliga (Vice-Chair). The Network also hired Ali Rak, our amazing Maryland state director who is going to help the MDFC amplify the voices of the forgotten men and women in the state who have been ignored by the Democrats for far too long. Economic freedom, reducing the size and scope of government, and fighting the Democrat Governor's tax hikes will be top priorities.
HFC Chairman Andy Harris (LEFT), SFCN President Andy Roth (MIDDLE), and MDFC Chairman Matt Morgan (RIGHT)
The _Baltimore Sun_ newspaper [covered the event](https://substack.com/redirect/af6a4026-86f9-4a34-9df1-20f7a16a8927?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> "This isn't a red agenda, blue agenda -- this is an American agenda that is based on promise, and we're going to continue to push Maryland to be safer, freer and more prosperous," [MDFC Chair Matt Morgan] said.
**STOPPING ILLEGALS FROM VOTING IN AMERICAN ELECTIONS**
Several of our state freedom caucuses have already helped to ban non-citizens from voting in our elections - namely Arizona, Louisiana, South Carolina, South Dakota, Missouri, and Oklahoma. But even more importantly, we need to pass the SAVE Act in Congress, sponsored by House Freedom Caucus member, Rep. Chip Roy and Senator Mike Lee. So all of our state freedom caucus chairmen signed a joint letter and delivered it to Congress. [Fox News](https://substack.com/redirect/f70f2f3d-871d-42b7-9541-5b6ba0690719?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) had the exclusive:
> Twelve state chairs of their respective State Freedom Caucuses, part of the State Freedom Caucus Network, are writing to members of Congress and urging them to pass the [Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act](https://substack.com/redirect/ac3a22aa-6260-47a3-b76a-2329eb5398d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
> "Illegal immigration was a top electoral issue for millions of voters and their message was heard loud and clear with the election of Donald J. Trump as the 47th President of the United States. Now it's time for Congress to listen," they say in a letter to lawmakers, obtained first by Fox News Digital.
**THE WYOMING FREEDOM CAUCUS IS IN CHARGE!**
For the first time in history, a state freedom caucus - the Wyoming Freedom Caucus - holds a majority of the members in their state house. On Tuesday, WYFC member Chip Neiman was sworn in as Speaker.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b2424f16-bd13-446c-bef5-d7c08c0d734a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**STATE FREEDOM CAUCUS PRIORITIES**
One key aspect of a state freedom caucus is to be very public and intentional about what its priorities are, so that voters can understand its goals and rally support around them. This is in stark contrast to the Swamp, which often hides its agenda or uses smoke and mirrors to deceive the voters. Below are just some examples of what our states are doing - the South Carolina Freedom Caucus even reminded the public that their priorities are explicitly listed in the SC GOP platform. So the Columbia Swamp can't wave them away as not important. Cutting taxes and spending, expanding school choice, safeguarding elections, judicial reform, and much more are included:
Georgia, Missouri, South Carolina, Illinois, and Montana Freedom Caucus 2025 Priorities
**MEDIA COVERAGE**
All of this activity by our state freedom caucuses was made possible because of **YOU**. And the media picked up on it. In addition to _Fox News_ , the liberal _New York Times_ wrote a lengthy profile piece about the Wyoming Freedom Caucus. The NYT interviewed several WYFC members, U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis, the liberal Republican governor, the RINOs who were defeated by WYFC-endorsed candidates, and others. The article ends with [this quote](https://substack.com/redirect/6ce20df9-f794-403a-8ea2-163eae7a1c10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> [WYFC member and incoming Speaker Chip] Neiman and his leadership team said they were humbled, as business owners and political neophytes, to steer their state.
> "I give the Lord credit for the success we've had," said Mr. Neiman, a cattle rancher, speaking from a government building in Casper, after meeting with the Republican caucus. "I honor him in my decision-making, and I just rely on Him to guide my actions and thoughts."
> Mr. Neiman opened a handsome wooden box. Inside was a ceremonial gavel, made from a cedar tree on his ranch, courtesy of Representative Bill Allemand, a Freedom Caucus member.
> "Elections have consequences," Mr. Neiman said.
The _Associated Press_ also weighed in on the Wyoming Freedom Caucus's success, but it also looked at the growing success of your State Freedom Caucus Network. [Excerpt](https://substack.com/redirect/bd971aca-e370-47ef-b86b-fb4f98579e49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> **A Washington Movement Into The States**
> The Freedom Caucus has been active in the U.S. House since 2015, gaining widespread attention when some of its members helped topple former House Speaker Kevin McCarthy during the last session of Congress.
> An outgrowth of the group, the State Freedom Caucus Network, launched in 2021 in Georgia and has been spreading to other states since then. It has about 175 members this year -- up more than a quarter since the 2024 elections, Roth said.
> The Freedom Caucus nearly doubled its ranks in South Dakota after last year's elections and now counts the House leaders -- though not members -- as allies who "see things in a very similar light as far as legislation goes," said Rep. Aaron Aylward, vice chairman of the state's Freedom Caucus chapter.
> In Wyoming, the list of incumbents ousted by Freedom Caucus-endorsed candidates included House Speaker Albert Sommers, who was attempting to move up to the Senate, and House Speaker Pro Tem Clark Stith.
**BOTTOM LINE**
We couldn't be more proud of the amazing work that the State Freedom Caucuses have done so far this year. And as supporters, we hope you are too. But do you know what is even better than all of this The best is STILL YET TO COME!
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/a74bf3cd-949f-4886-9548-29e9a9e81ba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

_Andrew Roth
President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider [a contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/a74bf3cd-949f-4886-9548-29e9a9e81ba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
#### Invite your friends and earn rewards
If you enjoy State Freedom Caucus Network, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe.
[Invite Friends](https://substack..A7rPyFTMsnLiWrSpgrl30j9nkBzIH9T5JI09yksyvSc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

Introducing the new Maryland Freedom Caucus | | | Jan 15 | | | | | | | | Friends, With states gaveling into their 2025 legislative sessions, we anticipated that this would be a big week and our state freedom caucuses didn't disappoint. We launched in a new state and publicly supported efforts to stop non-citizens from voting in American elections. Several of our states announced their legislative priorities for the year, and some publicly responded to their respective governors' "State of the State" address. And to boot, we got national coverage in the New York Times , the Associated Press , and Fox News. So grab some coffee because we have a lot of updates to share with you. MARYLAND FREEDOM CAUCUS I traveled to Annapolis, Maryland on Tuesday to help launch the Maryland Freedom Caucus with House Freedom Caucus Chairman, Congressman Andy Harris (who represents Maryland's first congressional district). Maryland is the 13th state that the Network has helped launch. The MDFC will be lead by Delegates Matt Morgan (Chair) and Kathy Szeliga (Vice-Chair). The Network also hired Ali Rak, our amazing Maryland state director who is going to help the MDFC amplify the voices of the forgotten men and women in the state who have been ignored by the Democrats for far too long. Economic freedom, reducing the size and scope of government, and fighting the Democrat Governor's tax hikes will be top priorities. HFC Chairman Andy Harris (LEFT), SFCN President Andy Roth (MIDDLE), and MDFC Chairman Matt Morgan (RIGHT) The Baltimore Sun newspaper : "This isn't a red agenda, blue agenda -- this is an American agenda that is based on promise, and we're going to continue to push Maryland to be safer, freer and more prosperous," [MDFC Chair Matt Morgan] said. body:
Yesterday, the Senate began deciding whether a scandal-prone former Fox News host should be our next Defense Secretary.
| | |
---
**🔴 LIVE POLL: RESPONSE NEEDED**
**Do you think Pete Hegseth is a good choice for Secretary of Defense?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100436613/522758029/1989883408?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=jtk5431-su-nd&code=jtk5431-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2Q2YzcyOS01YmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-67p4QTokVJtlnVBU0i4pQybj1Bfdmmxtdk7hpByzY=&emci=19529f95-aed2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=37d6c729-5bd3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=3800590)

_**Please respond now. This poll closes soon.**_
|

Friend: Yesterday, the Senate held its confirmation hearing for Donald Trump's nominee for Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth.
**In case you haven’t heard much about him, here are a few things you should know about Hegseth:**
Until very recently, Hegseth was a Fox News host and has said _women shouldn’t serve in the military_ , that Black troops are “promoted simply based on their race,” and that transgender soldiers shouldn’t receive medical care.
Hegseth has successfully pushed Trump to pardon war criminals and urged him to commit war crimes abroad without congressional approval. He also supported sending our military into U.S. cities to suppress protests.
Hegseth has been credibly accused of _sexual assault_ and received multiple complaints from work colleagues. A former colleague filed a complaint that he reportedly chanted “Kill All Muslims! Kill All Muslims!” while intoxicated.
Given these troubling facts about Pete Hegseth’s background and his record, it’s clear that the Senate needs to take its responsibility seriously to vet this nominee and hold him accountable.

**But we also want to know if Democrats like you think someone with Hegseth's background would make for a good Defense Secretary. Right now, we’re still waiting on another 74 responses to our poll in your area – and yours is one of the ones we’re missing. Please, tell us now:**

Electing Judge Crawford could be our first major pro-choice victory of the year. The Wisconsin Supreme Court has agreed to take up a case in which it will rule directly on whether the constitutional right to abortion exists in the state. This decision _will_ decide if the rights of Wisconsinites remain protected for years to come.

That is why we need to elect pro-choice champions like Judge Susan Crawford. Sending Judge Crawford to the Wisconsin Supreme Court will show anti-choice Republicans that our pro-choice movement is not taking a single day off from the fight.

name: Team Trump
subject: They labeled Trump a felon!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

body:
Not in 100 years...
Two years of fighting could be for *nothing* in just two short months.
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM1u4jAUhZ_G3hHF145NFl6QQWExQjOlgrZLY183Vp0Q8kfTp6-glO3Rd-_5dEzdxuBnTVRBAKrgegJA-IoAjAM_mP1-282Lt_NmceGA15jAnzs5wYNtrHnd7kb5VRV94Z76Yve3mdiDHuYWH-y9MsHahHhN1Zo6LcAwbylqprjMs2UGQCstjwolQ2W8Rc8wT3lmPfKcgYCjyxUNGlLIUsYyJkGlIhGYKeeW1itmlBeeiPRWlPgOcahC84GdMyHOiT3VNOpqGNr-JlYSKE_umDSjjTj2P1f2VBMo78oEyolA6Qfwq8__7YskvLxNxteHf5tncS447bRrLyHG0EtFRPr--4VOGr4DAAD__1f4bjI)

| **_AN EMERGENCY BRIEFING FROM THE DESK OF JIM JORDAN_**
---
Patriot:
---
I’m not one to raise the alarm without good reason, so I hope you’ll spare just a moment to hear me out.
---
I’ve received word that the Democrats’ midterm plan to STEAL the majority now hinges on this inescapable reality:
---
**_CNN: “[Republicans] will oversee _narrowest_ House majority in nearly 100 years” _**
---
And now, the Democrats know they’ll get their chance to crack our “narrow” majority in just a few short months...
---
**It’s a simple calculus: With multiple special elections on the books for early this year, the “narrowest majority in a century” could __already__ fall to a mere _TOSS-UP_.**
---
After such a historic victory in November, the Left is hoping, begging, that we’ll rest on our laurels and become complacent so that they can **FLIP** the majority! _We cannot let that happen. Period._
---
That’s why I’ve prepared this briefing to urge every America First patriot to keep their eyes peeled. Don’t let the Radical Democrats take advantage of this feeling of victory.
---
Trust me, I understand just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.
---
_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._
---
**But I REFUSE to allow all our hard work over the last _two years_ be unraveled in just _TWO SHORT MONTHS_. So now, I’m looking for _2.5 MILLION patriots_ to join me!**
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size toward our FIRST goal of the year to match my commitment to DEFEND our new House majority that could soon fall to a mere TOSS-UP.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcGOmzAQhp_G3ILwDNjkwGEpIlK30bbp7qY9RY49XtwCYY1JlD59BUK5fv6sf_4Z1Q2ts_eCyZIBNM6MDIDhEwOYAr6rt7e9v29-f-42NwSaMYMvq3mFh9tr9Wt_mMS_phxL82MsD8_9lT_scB_o4a6RMXXKtTOVVWSKFBS3OqKCSxTbLM8AoqbQaMBazM9EyljMpThvc0pQ6bPcGqEjV0ACWcJ5xgXIJI1TyqQxubaSK2lTy9JkCYqtJwqN6_-SN8q191hfuqgtmhCGcRmsZlCPpCdP8c31nsxsMKgDqW7z5-KN6hnUIt8KecZccK4ya9X8D-spdCetukG5j55hBQmkCefIQMwvHRk3dQyrtfICA_kZ2WD4SsbL5DUxrA7HU7kyfekD9YFh9fJt_52BOPWtMwyrp9fj193r8bmBBS6Xw-r9Zfcz_Swx8oUZbq5t3SgkS5OPZQVz42sB_wMAAP__97yZMg)

Instead of rushing humanitarian aid to homeless California wildfire survivors, House Speaker Mike Johnson wants “conditions” designed to hurt Democrats before disbursing funds.
Rep. Ralph Norman even says “We’ve got to get a _pound of flesh_ on any dollar spent on California," demanding bitter sacrifice from families who still have not buried their dead.
**Cynical California Republicans like Reps. Young Kim and Ken Calvert pretend they’re fighting for wildfire funds while their own party believes only red states should get help.**
For years, Republicans have voted against disaster aid for blue states while greedily accepting aid for their own districts.
_This must end now._

name: Eleni Kounalakis
subject: Wildfire relief resources
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
body:
#

Peter,
As firefighters and first responders continue to battle the devastating fires in Southern California, my thoughts are with all those who have been evacuated, lost homes, sustained injuries or lost family members. If you are in the vicinity — I hope you and your family are staying safe.
I’ve been working closely with the governor’s office as well as federal, state, and local relief efforts and I wanted to share some resources that you might need as we continue to deal with these deadly fires.
First, please bookmark this page: [**https://www.ca.gov/lafires/**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100437822/522761841/-1637945786?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTZkZWFmNS01ZGQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JreOVgM9yXoG_pLjX5nFQXowwNlXtGHadBT-0XASX8=&emci=92dfacce-c2d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=be6deaf5-5dd3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18887817). It’s got up-to-date information on the fires, evacuation orders, and links to apply for assistance.
Then, if you have an immediate or serious need for support as a result of the fires, apply for assistance from FEMA. You can do that by:
* Going to [**disasterassistance.gov**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100437824/522761843/1598658696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTZkZWFmNS01ZGQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JreOVgM9yXoG_pLjX5nFQXowwNlXtGHadBT-0XASX8=&emci=92dfacce-c2d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=be6deaf5-5dd3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18887817)
* Calling 800-621-FEMA (3362)
* Using the FEMA app

FEMA provides immediate money to replace essential items and displacement assistance for those who lost their homes. If you’ve been impacted, please don’t wait to apply.
Thank you, and please stay safe.
Eleni
[**P.S. If you’re not in the area impacted by the wildfires and are looking for a way to help, consider donating to the California Fire Foundation. They provide critical support to surviving families of fallen firefighters, firefighters, and the communities they serve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100437826/522761846/-65409609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTZkZWFmNS01ZGQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JreOVgM9yXoG_pLjX5nFQXowwNlXtGHadBT-0XASX8=&emci=92dfacce-c2d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=be6deaf5-5dd3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=18887817)

clean_body: Peter, As firefighters and first responders continue to battle the devastating fires in Southern California, my thoughts are with all those who have been evacuated, lost homes, sustained injuries or lost family members. If you are in the vicinity — I hope you and your family are staying safe. I’ve been working closely with the governor’s office as well as federal, state, and local relief efforts and I wanted to share some resources that you might need as we continue to deal with these deadly fires. First, please bookmark this page: . It’s got up-to-date information on the fires, evacuation orders, and links to apply for assistance. Then, if you have an immediate or serious need for support as a result of the fires, apply for assistance from FEMA. You can do that by: Going to Calling 800-621-FEMA (3362) Using the FEMA app FEMA provides immediate money to replace essential items and displacement assistance for those who lost their homes. If you’ve been impacted, please don’t wait to apply. Thank you, and please stay safe. Eleni Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026 2443 Fillmore Street #300 San Francisco, CA 94115 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but to unsubscribe.

subject: Tell Congress: Hands OFF climate protections!
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100437878/522762030/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWEyYWQ0OS01ZWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Lyj54oKpMUM9iBuHzIXfDEfI6iiLOLLes_NFQ3Umfs=&emci=8aa2ad49-5ed3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8ea2ad49-5ed3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)

You already know we’re in the middle of a climate crisis, folks.
But while fires rage out west and people freeze in their houses in the east, Trump and his MAGA followers are calling climate change a hoax.
Worse yet, we’re just _days_ away from Trump retaking power, and you can bet he’ll do everything in his power to weaken climate protections and favor his big oil buddies.
Congress has the power to stop him from completely undermining climate solutions, and they need to hear from us BEFORE Trump retakes office. [We’re partnering with our friends at Climate Action Campaign to spread the word. Add your name RIGHT NOW and demand that Congress stand up against any attempts to undo climate protections!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100437879/522762031/-420373564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWEyYWQ0OS01ZWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Lyj54oKpMUM9iBuHzIXfDEfI6iiLOLLes_NFQ3Umfs=&emci=8aa2ad49-5ed3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8ea2ad49-5ed3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)

We’ve made so much progress in the last few years for our climate. The Inflation Reduction Act is a game-changer, creating green jobs, investing in renewable energy, and reducing greenhouse gases nationwide.
_And just a few days ago, President Biden announced a permanent ban on offshore drilling for over 625 million acres of land!_
But despite this progress, Trump is more interested in lining the pockets of his billionaire backers than keeping us from climate disaster.
[Preserving the progress we’ve made in the fight against climate change is going to take a group effort. Add your name and let Congress know they have a responsibility to stop Trump from taking those protections away. We can’t afford to be silent.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100437881/522762033/-420373564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWEyYWQ0OS01ZWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Lyj54oKpMUM9iBuHzIXfDEfI6iiLOLLes_NFQ3Umfs=&emci=8aa2ad49-5ed3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=8ea2ad49-5ed3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)

name: Team Jay
subject: Jay Jones is who Virginia needs, folks
body:
www.jayjones.com [www.jayjones.com]
Folks,
Our team is working hard to get Jay Jones elected this November as Virginia’s next attorney general. Our state’s current attorney general, Jason Miyares, is a MAGA hardliner who has used his office to advance a right-wing agenda – even at the expense of Virginians.
If you’re already fired up to replace Miyares with an attorney general for ALL Virginians, can you please chip in $10 today so we can win big in November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]
DONATE $10 NOW → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]
If you’re not quite ready to pitch in, can you spare a few minutes to read more about why your contribution is so important right now?
Right after his election, Miyares unexpectedly fired EVERYONE working in the conviction integrity unit, a special office dedicated to investigating and overturning wrongful convictions. In the few months the office was fully operational, its staff had already begun working on overturning four wrongful convictions – but Miyares’ elimination of this office effectively put an end to Virginia’s dedicated efforts to right miscarriages of justice.
He later founded an election integrity unit to ensure the “legality and purity” of Virginia’s elections – even though there’s no evidence of voter fraud being an issue in the state. It’s concerning that he can use this office to threaten our residents’ voting rights and ability to freely participate in their democracy.
He’s even reversed his predecessor’s support for abortion access and ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment, which would constitutionally prohibit discrimination based on sex.
Folks, Virginians can’t afford another four years with Jason Miyares in office. With Donald Trump back in office in a few days, we know that Miyares will try to align closely with the Trump’s administrations’ dangerous policies, even if they threaten our freedoms.
But Jay Jones will fight back against MAGA extremism and any effort to weaken or destroy our democracy. He’ll work tirelessly to defend reproductive freedom, keep Virginia’s natural resources safe from harm, and take on predatory lenders and landlords who are driving prices up for Virginians.
Folks, there is a lot on the line in this race – and we’re going to need everyone we can get in our corner if we’re going to kick Miyares out and stop MAGA politics from hurting the state we love. Can you please chip in any amount you can right now to help us to victory? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=250]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=other]
Thank you for being with us in the fight for a better Virginia for ALL.
- Team Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
PO Box 2501
Arlington, VA 22202
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YqPmCIa7-kyhl9zzn7GjiQ2?unsubscribedata=CstH8LQbTER3DnMuPzCo5y6PmTMoHrGyjDpn1dwQBmPIiyGNEy4iShvDt1%2Bk5rIog3z1hWIiURrEOYVZ9y8efWZhlAPpiIqBJR6%2F%2F%2FKdjt6yVzFo44uDjHVmMS8V7bb%2FaK5gYIQc2Wq1K3gvBuohm4GP6fgfoxN9HsbktZ6wSSFVINTn%2B5Jnzd4Ot618t5R%2FOeFpju1kpalEGBp66kZXCnXW%2Fvq66UcgGIg767%2F%2FNJVmWidGEtmfA202TW4RsHHTX3%2FsXNAY81VtJYAiAJJF51SKk8paIn3B7aAKtLJvnZCHBXKq4khIVmEC25v4kGA%2BUgPsUQpQ%2FfjXR7x6sRgqOfWf43z%2F9lpsKETX8tZ5xt2etRyyM0o8mEPFND5ZZKmJA8ly%2B7rZEW63ybLZpSC1HKQi1X7leUcXR2w8vJKCw2nXx0nAvtiseAdWCqXTrEWJ .

name: James Carville
subject: I'm about to talk your ear off -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey y'all, it's James Carville here. I won't lie, I'm about to talk your freakin' ear off -- but you need to hear every bit of it. **If you need to cut out early, here's the gist:**

We need the Senate back. ASAP. The GOP won't just roll over and let us win, so I have to ask: **[Will you chip in $5 (_tripled to_ $15) before tonight's mid-month deadline to fight for a Democratic Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/20985?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250115-JamesCarville-CarvilleLongFormFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250115-JamesCarville-CarvilleLongFormFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19368%2E9716520%2EGoJzsC)**

_Here are the two most important things you need to know now:_

**DEMOCRATS HAVE A STRONG SHOT AT TAKING BACK THE SENATE.**

We've got BIG special elections coming in Ohio and Florida. A _weak_ GOP majority on defense. Loads of Trump's lackeys up for re-election. **Do I say it'll be "easy"? Hell no. Do I say it's right there if we fight for it? HELL YEAH!**

_But here's the snag in our strategy:_

**REPUBLICANS ARE CHOMPING AT THE BIT TO OUTSPEND US.**

Republicans just shelled out over _half a billion dollars_ to take _away_ our majority -- and they sure as heck won't hold back now that they're in power. Right-wing special interest groups and MAGA megadonors will pour _millions_ more into bankrolling the GOP.

_So here's the bottom line:_ Our early investments will be game-changing to compete with their cashflow and fight for _every_ opportunity on the map.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas lawmakers will have $194.6 billion to spend for the next budget, comptroller projects,** " Texas Tribune's**Pooja Salhotra** -- "Texas is projected to have $194.6 billion available in general revenue to fund the business of the state over the 2026-2027 biennium, a slight decrease from the last budget cycle, Texas Comptroller **Glenn Hegar** said Monday in his [biennial revenue estimate](https://substack.com/redirect/96b2f1b6-2396-442f-994d-e47641a62069?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to state lawmakers and leaders.

The estimate comes one day before the Texas Legislature convenes on Tuesday for the start of the 2025 legislative session. The only thing lawmakers are constitutionally required to do during the 140-day session ending on June 2 is pass a balanced budget, one that spends no more than what is estimated to be available.

This year's estimate reflects a 1.1% drop from the amount of funds available during the 2024-25 biennium, when lawmakers were flush with a ["once-in-a-lifetime"](https://substack.com/redirect/77c9b31b-b74f-4999-8af9-674c1bf32193?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) cash balance, Hegar said. The drop is attributable to a smaller beginning balance compared to the previous budget cycle, not a drop in state revenue. Tax collections are projected to rise, and for the first time, the state's Economic Stabilization Fund -- also known as the rainy day fund -- is expected to exceed its constitutional cap. As a result, lawmakers have more money than is typical for general purpose spending.

Still, Hegar said lawmakers should make thoughtful financial decisions that focus on improving Texans' lives.

"Despite positive economic numbers, many of our residents continue to feel the higher cost of groceries, housing and other necessities. And the lingering impacts of persistently rising prices mean many are struggling to ensure a bright future for their children," Hegar said in a Monday statement accompanying the budget estimate.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/7cf5bc56-2523-4299-81ca-5eb858c557b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/7cf5bc56-2523-4299-81ca-5eb858c557b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The estimate includes an anticipated $176.4 billion in new revenue, most of which comes from sales and energy tax collections and can only be spent in the upcoming budget cycle. Sales tax collections are projected to increase by 9% from the previous two-year period, reaching $94.2 billion the next two years.

The estimated funds also includes $23.8 billion expected to be leftover from the 2024-25 biennium. Part of those leftover dollars include $4.5 billion that were earmarked for public education and education savings accounts but were not used because lawmakers [failed to reach a compromise](https://substack.com/redirect/3d1d884d-d25f-427f-a991-5103e411ddbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to enact a voucher-like program.

This year, lawmakers are expected to prioritize passing a private school voucher program that uses taxpayer dollars to help pay for students' private schooling. Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick** , who presides over the Texas Senate, has [called on](https://substack.com/redirect/4478f78c-5cfb-404d-a8b2-2093b625b063?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Gov. **Greg Abbott** to declare school vouchers an emergency item to give lawmakers a jumpstart on pushing the bill through the Legislature. Lawmakers cannot pass any bills within the first 60 days of the session unless it has been labeled an emergency item by the governor." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/2c996635-0096-4462-baf2-23ed52db3165?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . » Read this morning's (free) edition . > SUBSCRIBE HERE: . ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Texas lawmakers will have $194.6 billion to spend for the next budget, comptroller projects, " Texas Tribune'sPooja Salhotra -- "Texas is projected to have $194.6 billion available in general revenue to fund the business of the state over the 2026-2027 biennium, a slight decrease from the last budget cycle, Texas Comptroller Glenn Hegar said Monday in his to state lawmakers and leaders. The estimate comes one day before the Texas Legislature convenes on Tuesday for the start of the 2025 legislative session. The only thing lawmakers are constitutionally required to do during the 140-day session ending on June 2 is pass a balanced budget, one that spends no more than what is estimated to be available. This year's estimate reflects a 1.1% drop from the amount of funds available during the 2024-25 biennium, when lawmakers were flush with a cash balance, Hegar said. The drop is attributable to a smaller beginning balance compared to the previous budget cycle, not a drop in state revenue. Tax collections are projected to rise, and for the first time, the state's Economic Stabilization Fund -- also known as the rainy day fund -- is expected to exceed its constitutional cap. As a result, lawmakers have more money than is typical for general purpose spending. Still, Hegar said lawmakers should make thoughtful financial decisions that focus on improving Texans' lives. "Despite positive economic numbers, many of our residents continue to feel the higher cost of groceries, housing and other necessities. And the lingering impacts of persistently rising prices mean many are struggling to ensure a bright future for their children," Hegar said in a Monday statement accompanying the budget estimate. The estimate includes an anticipated $176.4 billion in new revenue, most of which comes from sales and energy tax collections and can only be spent in the upcoming budget cycle. Sales tax collections are projected to increase by 9% from the previous two-year period, reaching $94.2 billion the next two years. The estimated funds also includes $23.8 billion expected to be leftover from the 2024-25 biennium. Part of those leftover dollars include $4.5 billion that were earmarked for public education and education savings accounts but were not used because lawmakers to enact a voucher-like program. This year, lawmakers are expected to prioritize passing a private school voucher program that uses taxpayer dollars to help pay for students' private schooling. Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick , who presides over the Texas Senate, has Gov. Greg Abbott to declare school vouchers an emergency item to give lawmakers a jumpstart on pushing the bill through the Legislature. Lawmakers cannot pass any bills within the first 60 days of the session unless it has been labeled an emergency item by the governor." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Free subscribers will need to become paid subscribers to receive full story summaries. TX TRIB: "The Texas Legislature is back. name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: Launching our critical 48 hour fundraising drive
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We have taken on Donald Trump and his MAGA allies in the House and Senate once before, and we can do it again. But not without you.
#

Big news: Today we’re launching our critical 48 hour mid-month fundraising drive.
**If you already know you’re ready to give, please use this personalized link to add a contribution:**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Jan2025/dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250115-1-b&t=1&akid=9819%2E3935704%2EfpPaqM)
Here’s why your donation today is so important:
This is our first fundraising drive of 2025, and it comes at a critical time. In just five days, Donald Trump will be sworn in again as President of the United States. Yet even before he has taken office, MAGA House Republicans are carrying out Trump’s agenda by attacking our gun violence prevention movement. Last week, the House GOP introduced a bill pushing for national concealed carry reciprocity AND another bill that calls for abolishing the ATF.
We know you may feel concerned when you think about the next four years and what it means for our gun safety movement. We completely understand that. But remember, the only way we’ve made progress in the past is by overcoming obstacles that we once thought were impossible to conquer. During Trump’s first presidency in 2017, we fought against a national concealed reciprocity bill—and won.
We have taken on Donald Trump and his MAGA allies in the House and Senate once before, and we can do it again. But not without you.
[**Will you please make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC to help us build the resources to take on Trump and his MAGA allies? Your well-timed donation ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline on Thursday is so critical.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250115-1-b&t=2&akid=9819%2E3935704%2EfpPaqM)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jan25.3xfxGv&amount=3&refcode=em250115-1-b&t=21&akid=9819%2E3935704%2EfpPaqM)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jan25.xCIqU-&refcode=em250115-1-b&t=22&akid=9819%2E3935704%2EfpPaqM)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan25.zfvo3C&refcode=em250115-1-b&t=23&akid=9819%2E3935704%2EfpPaqM)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan25.YOf15l&refcode=em250115-1-b&t=24&akid=9819%2E3935704%2EfpPaqM)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan25.Eu0hgI&refcode=em250115-1-b&t=25&akid=9819%2E3935704%2EfpPaqM)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: We’ve budgeted to train 15 candidates, but we received a record number of applicants. Help us meet the moment.
body:
We’ll train candidates on the fundamentals of running a grassroots campaign. | | |
---
Friend, Working people are fired up and ready to fight back in 2025. **Next month, we’ll launch our Rooted in Community Campaign School****―****a free in-person program to train progressive candidates running for local or state office.** Our Campaign School focuses on training women of color and BIPOC* candidates with the lived experience needed to serve our communities. And while we had planned on training 15 candidates, we received a record number of applicants. **We’re interviewing folks right now and want to expand February’s cohort to include 20 candidates.** While the Campaign School is completely free for candidates, the program costs $400 per attendee. [**Can you help us expand this year’s Rooted in Community Campaign School to train more working-class candidates? Rush a donation today and help expand the number of candidates we can train this February and March.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1FhjC74f-7xzn1i_ZbTyxsrGe0FQfn3SreZ65kcq1EEXdRLP0BDRZlDnkDzvP-Q8W9jsx-u_b05lzVzYA6vpumWwqPS3XAQ3BbMryZHNnY72JvvJ0VGp9wx35F7nhWuuGt-CrFVXy8Rp8OThrxntPpGBDEjaxekbb1bbAxZnrizloGZXlQpJkYlBQENd2Z9___sXCpXrAe9wkCLWR_ybCoaI5lviHWi98598IQ6YlLbryP_VjRiffxhZKLLUv9TMGb8DrWnvhBuT_7lYZAn3pcH4Svui25f6kqBF3CULx7M63g0MkgltkRWmedyqC-Rkjv4WsPo7ITmOJO6idky7SmVvPUIClbwXLFJIoH5YP3oU8hdFAUepZyPyHX33cKdMG9f2yUI4Yt33GEpeq9zf4VbQZpClu6d6Eifr_LFVcaI718QvDYvQoDGgEAywBr_PSMrzbPqaXb0vc5NwPQUCHVGsbEE8bOniPmxx1lde4B_KpKnA_yIpZBp2WEPyEgPmZPH/4d6/iT1LvOUTQyGAUJ1z5GG5OQ/h0/h001.V2ZCLgf_yVL1dxN0VGWYagnhkjTiriOCYbw6Yq8tP5c) | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1FhjC74f-7xzn1i_ZbTyxsrGQEQIEk0HcnmnYG0d3zZDZkP1PB2llcqHUeY9CPE4oVOvNoiBpvxaProXoo5skSDVUWHD0uerQ42NosoFX8JotU-RbNBJdPdqgeihaKrCUTedl7z3c7YGyLp_m_PdzQcnXfJWdBjFaPLFL-oZ1D_lnZzdOIGwi3jcEifIx-1hn3-ARUOGlrZgsDAnr8Lx8ZxuMVFOTlyAOngLANSjEQN4qs0x3IGNdokF15_5QFj61wqAGog-bcD_QdPpDyfRDXToBapskPeknxqaukocmQE_lD2yVeBFPBHUwBFeSIvElk2CdlmzwaBVAGSqrwMtH7_3TEUm8sni_7_-CxTD728SpuoQ21qxBuWVkJ92TQq3sWu_nVnL0BsxsUCgEhxe2Nu4CzEbLmN595_qaQwWA5nNkOZfgRHiN-SEsD4qni2JbWpqfPpL-Sx4zWN1OR90xwUreHBpYOhuSm6Kxfq-vPAL6ApLk3eCNU6Je_dSxHVPxVP/4d6/iT1LvOUTQyGAUJ1z5GG5OQ/h1/h001.i1GgKdoM7peHeKtqKtuAF1jz_wXXk1C1JUHmlIEOrqE)

If this past election taught us anything, it’s that we need more candidates who understand the needs of voters―and too often, everyday people don’t have the connections or resources to run for office and represent their communities. **That’s why we end up with millionaires in elected office who can spend a lot of money on ads and mailers, but don’t actually understand the needs of the communities they serve.**
[**Whether it’s $5 or $400, every donation goes a long way toward training future leaders to run for office. Rush a donation today and help us expand February’s Rooted in Community Campaign School to train more working-class women of color and BIPOC candidates with the lived experience to serve our communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv8B2U1BBuL1L5M7fYmQ1FhjC74f-7xzn1i_ZbTyxsrGZIeGlkuLYnfjyjgjO60CgyVjlX8ojf7_hbAe5kNMmruVt3mVDcPKIFtFK0jS7A7c1cqJpvYUCypCixI61sBwZMsw2Nz_XmeY3ELYEhlsA6T07zjX9ywEbUlYOk5hkJfd1KoQN9NiUv4Z5GVXUIdWHNo4pPdjpa-Zdf0yb1CKhgWDEkNVpIY-YLhXjovzSjBO6w5Njnnv_R_IqVBfS8FfsWDcd76hFfmk016CYe5DIsC5Jd8Vt7BHESvd_sHcYUbjof5n5DDsWTZGhS96cA2rPSc7dnSwRowa8mKHDqRVzDVGg-GFOvOZNvoXtcXCRKmQzXr6RXN-lQzyInM3dPEhKIBxr6v1QvQEUE8S0_XIOuP4G8MK6HYCTecaTCM4N_UUq-VIByYMi9uk04gsuHGUC6fYvoqEJviYGXF1SflwyI_fnzF2Lw1-Rv7EL-Y7SLMw8-S35n_N67NA_W_BVXoaO8DJXCtICFQMlie2ECJwkeG/4d6/iT1LvOUTQyGAUJ1z5GG5OQ/h2/h001.G4BgvdlBeNKVfNLP0jgBIeuZqk8QL9jupTLrkoFVEBs)

From: **Rashida Tlaib**
Date: Tue, Jan 14, 2025
Subject: We’ve budgeted to train 15 candidates, but we received a record number of applicants. Help us meet the moment.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This week we’re interviewing applicants to our Rooted in Community Campaign School―a _free_ in-person program to train progressive candidates running for local and state office.
**While we budgeted to train 15 candidates, we received a record number of applicants and we’d love to expand this year’s Campaign School further.**
The cost per trainee is just $400, which means that every donation, whether it’s $5 or $400, goes a long way toward training future leaders to run for office. As billionaires keep spending more to influence our elections, we need to keep supporting candidates who can’t typically afford the high costs of running for office. That’s why we provide our Rooted in Community Campaign School for free.
**The Rooted in Community Campaign School focuses on training women of color and BIPOC* candidates with the lived experience needed to serve our communities.** This month-long course will take place over five Saturdays in February and March.
[**Will you donate to help fully fund this free program for progressive candidates?
