name: Pramila HQ
subject: Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and “DOGE” 🙄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
DOGE’s spending cuts are impossible to achieve without slashing funding for Medicaid and the Affordable Care Act.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250115-4671-footer&t=1&akid=4671%2E420207%2EEkI9fi)
Peter, you've almost certainly heard about Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency,” aka DOGE. 🙄
They have previously threatened to slash anywhere from $500 billion to _$2 trillion_ in federal spending. **Those spending cuts are impossible to achieve without slashing funding for Medicaid and the Affordable Care Act:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250115-1?refcode=em20250115-4671&amount=3&refcode2=4671_420207_EkI9fi&akid=4671%2E420207%2EEkI9fi)
**Pramila is counting on grassroots supporters like you to help her fight back and rally support for _expanding_ health care, _not_ cutting it. [Will you pitch in $3 before tonight’s mid-month deadline to support her work in Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250115-1?refcode=em20250115-4671&amount=3&refcode2=4671_420207_EkI9fi&akid=4671%2E420207%2EEkI9fi)**
We’ll be honest: With MAGA Republicans holding the majority in both chambers, it’s possible they could do this even with uniform opposition from Democrats.
But we’ve been in this situation before. Last time Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act, **we rallied public opposition** and pressured even some Republicans into voting to save it.
We have to do the same thing now — but that kind of work takes resources, so it’s critical that we continue to hit all of our fundraising goals.
[**Peter, can we count on you to help us reach our mid-month goal before tonight’s deadline so Pramila can keep fighting to defend our progressive values as Donald Trump heads back to the White House?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250115-1?refcode=em20250115-4671&amount=3&refcode2=4671_420207_EkI9fi&akid=4671%2E420207%2EEkI9fi)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250115-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250115-4671&refcode2=4671_420207_EkI9fi&akid=4671%2E420207%2EEkI9fi)**
In solidarity,
Pramila HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250115-4671-footer&t=2&refcode2=4671_420207_EkI9fi&akid=4671%2E420207%2EEkI9fi)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
Let's do this together, and let's start today. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100446433/522790932/2025016054?refcode=WUEFE127_20250115_KEGSigner_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055603&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTY2MDhmYS02ZmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JcbbUoBfFDKCwG1JEKh0uCed6q_qPpzwZ4_8CXlp24=) Hi Peter,

It's Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand.

You and I both know: Democrats have a lot of work to do. We've got a House and Senate to win back in 2026, and the road will be rough. But here's what else we both know: We've got friends in the fight.

EMILYs List has been changing the face of power in American politics for 40 years now. Their mission to elect more women by investing early in their campaigns, when dollars go the furthest, has been revolutionary. I'm an EMILYs List endorsee myself — I know firsthand how vital the support of this community can be! [**I'm writing to you today, Peter, because it's the perfect time, this early in the election cycle, to donate to EMILYs List. They will put your dollars immediately to work recruiting, training, and supporting women candidates nationwide. And here's a bonus: If you donate today, you'll get a personalized EMILYs List membership card in the mail! Make your contribution now:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100446435/522790933/2025016054?refcode=WUEFE127_20250115_KEGSigner_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055603&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTY2MDhmYS02ZmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JcbbUoBfFDKCwG1JEKh0uCed6q_qPpzwZ4_8CXlp24=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100446436/522790934/2025016054?refcode=WUEFE127_20250115_KEGSigner_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1055603&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTY2MDhmYS02ZmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7JcbbUoBfFDKCwG1JEKh0uCed6q_qPpzwZ4_8CXlp24=)

As the new chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, I will spend the next two years laser-focused on helping Democrats win back the Senate, and I know EMILYs List will be right there with me in the fight. We only need to flip four seats to take back the chamber, and looking at the Senate map, **we'll have several good chances to flip Republican-held seats**.

This is about stopping extremism, Peter. It's about defending our fundamental freedoms, and stopping the takeover of our government by bad actors who prioritize partisan posturing over the freedom of their constituents.
[**Please join me by investing in the future of our party by investing in EMILYs List and their work to elect more women. This point in the cycle is exactly the right time to give if you want your gift to make the most lasting impact. Women will run and win based on what we do right now, today. I'm an EMILYs List endorsee myself — I know firsthand how vital the support of this community can be! = | = As the new chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, I will spend the next two years laser-focused on helping Democrats win back the Senate, and I know EMILYs List will be right there with me in the fight. We only need to flip four seats to take back the chamber, and looking at the Senate map, we'll have several good chances to flip Republican-held seats. This is about stopping extremism, Peter. It's about defending our fundamental freedoms, and stopping the takeover of our government by bad actors who prioritize partisan posturing over the freedom of their constituents. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, Kirsten = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Team WFP
subject: Tell Congressional Republicans: Stop politicizing disaster aid for California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, It’s been over a week since the LA wildfires began, and families all across southern California are still reeling. As of this Sunday, 62 square miles — an area larger than San Francisco — have been destroyed. Entire neighborhoods are no more. And the death toll is now up to 25. Amidst this suffering and devastation, Trump and his Republican allies are spreading misinformation and conspiracy theories, and trying to use this crisis to score political points.1 Just this week, House Speaker Mike Johnson said that there “should probably be conditions” placed on federal aid to the communities that have been destroyed.2 This comes at the same time that Republicans are going all in to do the bidding of billionaires like Elon Musk — proposing $5 trillion in cuts to health care and other services all so they can slash the taxes of multi-billionaires.3 And California's Republican Congressional delegation? They've been quiet in the face of these threats from their own party. [**It’s unconscionable that Republicans would try to use the destruction we are seeing in these communities to try and win notches on their belt in Congress. Add your name today and demand that Republicans in Congress stop politicizing the disaster, and start sending aid to families in need.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9wMxB-Gfsjt7Lzo7fFA5No7co9vIUaVPqRAISPuH_a50QmWXLpCyCnwq_a-fcJPxvMysAxxgwFycWL0-Jd-OWw2ZzbtkXAN7-AW7H41Y32sekY8WDMac8FIe8Sum1YRTA_ATEWTtYCIehh8E2h7nb1X1d4ttc67jXn7tKfdJctsa4dkuiodc1j7CjQ6UCEYbnqqY5hkqW8lL975wz7y4W9zB6jsmm-wXpoQHnxEmxen6oFTWAtGVdTfioLth-NgpXh8HLdwRZgjealvynMAxIO1Qz9STCImoHKukzWRtM5CIe5CtmFCW93evbNbVWDkRPuqCjayJFpjrmRzIx_wRZmwzwrKbh6bXUIUbZqmO0zsE8pdOwxVZoeCi-t5ebRkHed-_12sgf067VT4K1_vrLolVomHCrSV-GCC8KKEaSVzQ/4d6/-NHLhTlIShaNk3T1E6N26g/h0/h001.eP567m1pbESb3_MFz-lpvyobXchnKERk4WDdpfeqtJE) **[Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIq_Rq3KohZ4y2Iu5_arjN9wMxB-Gfsjt7Lzo7fFA5No7co9vIUaVPqRAISPuH_a50QmWXLpCyCnwq_a-fcJPxvMysAxxgwFycWL0-Jd-OWw2ZzbtkXAN7-AW7H41Y32sekY8WDMac8FIe8Sum1YRTA_ATEWTtYCIehh8E2h7nb1X1d4ttc67jXn7tKfdJctsa4dkuiodc1j7CjQ6UCEYbnA7o1OVO-RaupJeYtlom1WaMOaZx2I_1MZuMhj2R0vSuF3qp4cbGetLM3n1TxG142eYoKJTNbpuz7WNlpPcrCv1WqmCJX6jCSVsf9ddISSO-1FsSLzWREvbBMbcp4KtSIKRnuMOglT45V42f5NKb1BnNIVAVKzOW6Uz_sSBcXjsZihJUjy-T3Iyhww4iZAMniChlSTJXFHeTj-wnFnOAFYm0t5lptohOiRL08d_d-yiQ/4d6/-NHLhTlIShaNk3T1E6N26g/h1/h001.TqlGXdy_gtnC_Oek6JcO1UDVSbct5HiVEZ2PnEUeFpc)** You’ve already done so much to help those affected by the wildfires, Peter. And for that, we thank you. **WFP members alone have already contributed over $25,000 to various on-the-ground organizations and crisis centers.** [And if you haven’t already, please split a donation with those groups here if possible.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqugw92OTn3eBVs4NDg9Yvc074MKrd3L6bZyRmm9MhvidPjGm-dnB-OfAx1ch1xUqKCnv3vMrASi3QPcZUvClP5c9ZNaJGniko2bHKyfe6_0j1vvH2mGS8tfhbMouOe1n-LU7ggGhJFdNvnNOzA-yT1tYtrV6Zvv32BtXmH8nEORfnjsLJ6qTdKbtT9zXNWvZeo6VGqxH4NhtD8KxwGO7QjFX6Y9t8-N6_dgcJQTl5xN9OobO1qMs_-7f209Ar_ap2P9_USAgrTmLBfk-4SNRmAGIj7DSYudn7BhXFhYuz_Hvd5iTwSsdTyk27SMeZ9AcW8OvxnWKBLaBGbu1aiKx__-Zi8cKLSCl34pf5vhUhEKls9i4e5XmcnlUMSUyGXAS7g7iXuIQwjaLNVAISwaGX3mYvLCWmD2j70khnF3RA8K6Q/4d6/-NHLhTlIShaNk3T1E6N26g/h2/h001.WBx22fH6dbrSTHyG4_sRoyTHZ58m1LysYfS80xz_Q7o) In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s been over a week since the LA wildfires began, and families all across southern California are still reeling. As of this Sunday, 62 square miles — an area larger than San Francisco — have been destroyed. Entire neighborhoods are no more. And the death toll is now up to 25. Amidst this suffering and devastation, Trump and his Republican allies are spreading misinformation and conspiracy theories, and trying to use this crisis to score political points.1 Just this week, House Speaker Mike Johnson said that there “should probably be conditions” placed on federal aid to the communities that have been destroyed.2 This comes at the same time that Republicans are going all in to do the bidding of billionaires like Elon Musk — proposing $5 trillion in cuts to health care and other services all so they can slash the taxes of multi-billionaires.3 And California's Republican Congressional delegation? They've been quiet in the face of these threats from their own party. You’ve already done so much to help those affected by the wildfires, Peter. And for that, we thank you. WFP members alone have already contributed over $25,000 to various on-the-ground organizations and crisis centers. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , KQED, January 15, 2025 2\. , The Independent, January 14, 2025 3\. , Politico, January 10, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . I take my role in these committees as a tremendous opportunity to bring diverse stakeholders together, forging compromise and working with colleagues across Maryland and the country to deliver for our district and communities nationwide.

| I'm excited to share an update about my new responsibilities in the 119th Congress with you.

This week, I was named to the **Armed Services Committee.** As the daughter and granddaughter of Army, Navy, and Air Force veterans, I deeply respect those who serve our country. This important committee is responsible for many decisions that will address the needs of our country’s service members and military families and meet the national security challenges of our time. I’m honored to have the opportunity to advocate for those who dedicate their lives to protecting our nation.

I’m also thrilled to join the **Natural Resources Committee.** Throughout my career, I’ve prioritized enriching our natural resources — from protecting forests, oysters, and state parks to revolutionizing how we approach critical Chesapeake Bay restoration — and I’m so grateful for the partnerships and results. I’m glad to bring my experience and continue my work to help preserve our natural resources and support our local economies in Congress.

I take my role in these committees as a tremendous opportunity to bring diverse stakeholders together, forging compromise and working with colleagues across Maryland and the country to deliver for our district and communities nationwide. But I can’t do this without your support.

[_**Will you contribute $25 or more today as a 2025 Congressional Founding Donor to help us start the new year strong?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100446916/522792650/-1717512322?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTYzMWMwMS03MmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uO6gneoJvEBfT6IeEn5kuJYETLgzBMMKu3OpTd-xuMA=)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Announcement: “It Takes Chutzpah” book launch!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Ron Wyden
body:
|
---
| | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100446989/522792844/98355855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTE0MDYzYS03MmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8KkSB7drGOpen3RXU3tZYteGrEpuq1K5VeqcK_imqM=&emci=956052e3-acd2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2114063a-72d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364)**I've sent a lot of emails over the years on a wide range of issues - always about our mission of how we can improve our democracy and nation -**but I've never written you an email like this!** I'm excited to announce that I've written a book, "[It Takes Chutzpah](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100446990/522792845/98355855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTE0MDYzYS03MmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8KkSB7drGOpen3RXU3tZYteGrEpuq1K5VeqcK_imqM=&emci=956052e3-acd2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2114063a-72d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364)", which has at its heart the 12 Rules of Chutzpah that I hope will assist all Americans - in any walk of life - to achieve worthy objectives for themselves, their families, their businesses and organizations, and their towns, state, and country. You've never heard me say quite like this, but I believe Chutzpah is an indispensable instrument for improving America. It's special because it helps all of us self-confidently embrace the possible despite the odds. To me, Chutzpah is exactly what America needs a big dose of right now. [**"It Takes Chutzpah" is out now, and it would be a big honor if you would join me in helping to create a Chutzpah nation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100446991/522792846/98355855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTE0MDYzYS03MmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8KkSB7drGOpen3RXU3tZYteGrEpuq1K5VeqcK_imqM=&emci=956052e3-acd2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2114063a-72d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364) You've been in my corner throughout my years of public service - and I'll always be grateful. Thank you! _Ron_ P.S. There is also an audio version available, and you can [hear a sample here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100446992/522792847/-1037125039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTE0MDYzYS03MmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8KkSB7drGOpen3RXU3tZYteGrEpuq1K5VeqcK_imqM=&emci=956052e3-acd2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2114063a-72d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364) \- I hope you enjoy! |
---|---|---

[**Contact us here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100446996/522792851/-343049579?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTE0MDYzYS03MmQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X8KkSB7drGOpen3RXU3tZYteGrEpuq1K5VeqcK_imqM=&emci=956052e3-acd2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2114063a-72d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=9818364).

subject: The Clock is Ticking; Trump is Coming.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress

| | |
---
**America stands at a crossroads—will we protect our democracy or allow it to be reshaped by unchecked power?** Hello from Gay Valimont, candidate for Florida’s 1st Congressional District, here to tell you the developments unfolding on Capitol Hill are a direct threat to the democratic principles our nation was founded upon. The _planned expansion of executive power,_ _replacing career civil servants_ with political loyalists, and _bringing independent agencies_ under presidential control is _deeply concerning_. But it is not hopeless. **April 1st we have the ability to change that, but today we have the opportunity to get the ball rolling with YOUR help.**
---
---
The notion of deploying the **military for domestic purposes** , such as **enforcing immigration laws** and deportations, raises significant legal and ethical concerns, and further erodes trust in our government institutions. The **implementation of "Project 2025,"** which seeks to restructure the federal government around a narrow ideological framework, represents an **alarming consolidation of power** that could jeopardize the _voices of everyday Americans._ **Only WE can change this.**
**[ Pledging $5 today can help get a Democrat into Congress to STOP Project 2025 and STUNT TRUMP. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Voting rights at the state level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
NPR: With the Voting Rights Act facing more threats, advocates renew a push for state laws [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011525_1&amount=25]
Team, you don't need us to remind you about all the assaults on the Voting Rights Act. From Supreme Court cases to state laws and the recent 8th circuit ruling that citizens don't have a right to sue for their right to vote, the last decade-plus has been one attack after another.
That's why we've so quickly turned our focus to the state legislative sessions that kick off next month. Several states have enacted state-level voting rights acts over the past two decades, and Michigan is working hard to be next.
2025 is going to be a huge battleground for our right to vote. With attacks likely at the federal level in all three branches of government, our opportunities to go on offense will be in the states. We have to pass state laws wherever we can to defend and expand our right to vote while fighting suppressive legislation in states like Florida, Georgia, Texas, and more.
We're already hard at work, mobilizing to defend voting rights as state legislative sessions start across the country.
Team: Will you fuel our work and chip in $25 or whatever you can today to protect our fundamental rights? >> >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011525_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011525_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011525_1&amount=25]

Team: Will you fuel our work and chip in $25 or whatever you can today to protect our fundamental rights? >> >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). #
Peter,
Vet Voice Foundation and our partners have worked relentlessly over the last several years to expand federal protections for our public lands. Thanks to that work, President Biden designated both Chuckwalla and Sáttítla National Monuments yesterday. This action helped cement his status as our public lands president.
This is a huge victory — for Veterans and non-Veterans alike, and for generations to come.
Veterans have a long history with our public lands and have been central figures in efforts to create, expand, safeguard, and use them — from fellow Veteran President Teddy Roosevelt, who used the Antiquities Act to protect millions of acres during his presidency, to World War II veteran Earl Schaffer, who became the first person to thru-hike the Appalachian Trail following his service to “walk off the war,” to Veterans today who are found utilizing and enjoying public lands in all corners of the country.
But all of this progress is now under threat. Project 2025, a policy blueprint backed by powerful interests, outlines a sweeping plan to dismantle public land protections. The agenda includes privatizing federal lands, removing safeguards for wildlife, and expanding drilling, mining, and commercial development in some of the nation’s most cherished natural spaces.
If implemented, this plan would fundamentally alter the character of public lands across the country, stripping away protections that ensure these spaces remain open, accessible, and preserved for future generations.
So... what can we do?
The first step is to organize. We’ll be working around the clock as a bulwark against Project 2025 and any efforts to sell our nation’s treasures off to the highest bidder.
These lands belong to all of us, not a handful of billionaires. We need you. Will you join us?
[**Sign on here, add your name, and join Vet Voice Foundation as we fight tooth and nail to defend our public lands.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250115_vvf_em_publiclands/?source=em250115-1-90&akid=34084%2E3013755%2EJq0i2i)**
| [JOIN US](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250115_vvf_em_publiclands/?source=em250115-1-90&akid=34084%2E3013755%2EJq0i2i)
---
With gratitude,
Janessa
Janessa Goldbeck
CEO, Vet Voice Foundation
Marine Corps Veteran

PAID FOR BY VET VOICE FOUNDATION
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=34084%2E3013755%2EJq0i2i).

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop Hollywood from reaching into your living room
body:
Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb509b9ac01f4f7f8e230347e126182c&_e=c0TyRbxYoP8GE4Xk5JyuexzTDfgmYYlyiTjBjq5-li-A8NyPD7opxTF0GMdRfaxYdt_UwrUkWJL5K46I-lc93DH6Dd4RLI78jJ7bQ7nixKeNuUWuZYEeTY7mzqhEPxsMmfIxvHO_ugSScbUal8iYAFtyLV1TuGgCQepQSDD_Eg4XBI064vC8jhmoQUXWhpnun-rdsmYwK4xGCLC51e1Tq-w7whthdxXEZPpvrGao1HC59JcIfxZ0qbzTSSSpAC-WepenZ0k2gmA_H96SPpcr_QFPxjso5GJvy8O6Jwh9Lv5tvbcNNTjWtIAv9Uq2LhEMTbKS9UUkyWHLD1f9zm5MG0LhE7IIPkBypGLVFydmWI9s5DPCExw-6m3LYi_wAv_XtFA0dMkONoYAMmNOXDNpsg%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb509b9ac01f4f7f8e230347e126182c&_e=c0TyRbxYoP8GE4Xk5JyuexzTDfgmYYlyiTjBjq5-li-A8NyPD7opxTF0GMdRfaxYdt_UwrUkWJL5K46I-lc93DH6Dd4RLI78jJ7bQ7nixKeNuUWuZYEeTY7mzqhEPxsMmfIxvHO_ugSScbUal8iYAFtyLV1TuGgCQepQSDD_Eg4XBI064vC8jhmoQUXWhpnun-rdsmYwK4xGCLC51e1Tq-w7whthdxXEZPpvrGao1HCTjUpXNwA0gvLhvt7L6VeM6Om9Jtkt-HFEkdSZtwElgK0zove5SQaCp1kFOlh4p8s972dMN0AwSmgVyhNEBP_k8OqqIxXWdw5GNZM37c8YQr2GJgeHp8ELzsbwtXb3TmcuPKLGZp3ITvBaoq4dZJ03-TI4fas2XhAC1whJaLGo7g%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb509b9ac01f4f7f8e230347e126182c&_e=c0TyRbxYoP8GE4Xk5JyuexzTDfgmYYlyiTjBjq5-li-A8NyPD7opxTF0GMdRfaxYdt_UwrUkWJL5K46I-lc93DH6Dd4RLI78jJ7bQ7nixKeNuUWuZYEeTY7mzqhEPxsMmfIxvHO_ugSScbUal8iYAFtyLV1TuGgCQepQSDD_Eg4XBI064vC8jhmoQUXWhpnun-rdsmYwK4xGCLC51e1Tq-w7whthdxXEZPpvrGao1HCGgW_-ORqvA1WI0pGo9Q4iyFdNUS_R3twmtPJIPq466x9406ezq6lGF5iC-WZLzBNEy8x600Rbcohji84VYZ6s_LAoadqUP7gQZxfr7q3QUkfDPRe-ASYpki9BYapX0czpYhjeARrBaO4hZ5wFFJL5EtU1FaXhHN9yIodfaIdKYA%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb509b9ac01f4f7f8e230347e126182c&_e=c0TyRbxYoP8GE4Xk5JyuexzTDfgmYYlyiTjBjq5-li-A8NyPD7opxTF0GMdRfaxYdt_UwrUkWJL5K46I-lc93DH6Dd4RLI78jJ7bQ7nixKeNuUWuZYEeTY7mzqhEPxsMmfIxvHO_ugSScbUal8iYAFtyLV1TuGgCQepQSDD_Eg4XBI064vC8jhmoQUXWhpnun-rdsmYwK4xGCLC51e1Tq-w7whthdxXEZPpvrGao1HBAJIbcVtzQVwac0Q_e-T0lSvfpMISG_ywgOuC6-4Vf9pbSCTGeJs1BeSlvqCyUGKMdaxs5E_Yf8NL5iag7jkuOsf1kRED0MGeFFst6u6pUPIoU1bJNbKkkh2Xj_NNsbsJMrzFAtSXUxqwafu1CQgCEDTfhF1qoquBVwiMA8s26ow%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cb509b9ac01f4f7f8e230347e126182c&_e=c0TyRbxYoP8GE4Xk5JyuexzTDfgmYYlyiTjBjq5-li-A8NyPD7opxTF0GMdRfaxYdt_UwrUkWJL5K46I-lc93DH6Dd4RLI78jJ7bQ7nixKeNuUWuZYEeTY7mzqhEPxsMmfIxvHO_ugSScbUal8iYAFtyLV1TuGgCQepQSDD_Eg4XBI064vC8jhmoQUXWhpnun-rdsmYwK4xGCLC51e1Tq-w7whthdxXEZPpvrGao1HDPcMxtaWhT68KN0QeR-R6u0glGndBe-ClGfww78knfuWZ9Bnw86TcxI_1QeDwrCabnFTI_v4dNEA3wtAG7297xyhrYu3A2dZ8gOlgpoSCs-S7PoeVXvuO3eAjMPRBLZE5KNXTc7xiklrufhxVSiA2NYg8YsMIqJf7J0IhPhyH00Q%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.

name: Congressman Mark Takano
subject: hard truths:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
The American people are pissed off

| On Monday, Donald Trump will be sworn in, and Republicans will have a governing trifecta in Washington. **But I want to make one thing clear:**

In 2025, the fights we have to take on won’t just be about Trump. Our most important fights will be over redefining the core values and principles of our two parties, and demonstrating to the American people that Democrats are still far and away the better option for working families in the country.

**The American people are pissed off.** The economy doesn’t work for most folks. The top 1% of Americans own more wealth than the bottom 50%; homelessness skyrocketed 18% in 2024 alone; the cost of groceries, gas, and everyday items have ballooned; meanwhile, wages stagnated and jobs were cut.

**It’s exactly why** I just had the closest re-election of my career and Riverside County flipped to the GOP and Trump for the first time since 2008.

**If other Democrats can’t square those truths with the election results, then we’re doomed.**

Trump and his MAGA cronies will own a trifecta in just under one week, _but that doesn’t mean we should throw up our hands for the next two years_.

I’m not wasting time to get back to start building back trust with working families in Riverside county and across the country. If you’re sick of getting emails with empty words linked to an ActBlue page, I won’t blame you. [**But I'm hoping you'll see that this isn't one of those emails. clean_body: The American people are pissed off | On Monday, Donald Trump will be sworn in, and Republicans will have a governing trifecta in Washington. But I want to make one thing clear: In 2025, the fights we have to take on won’t just be about Trump. Our most important fights will be over redefining the core values and principles of our two parties, and demonstrating to the American people that Democrats are still far and away the better option for working families in the country. The American people are pissed off. The economy doesn’t work for most folks. The top 1% of Americans own more wealth than the bottom 50%; homelessness skyrocketed 18% in 2024 alone; the cost of groceries, gas, and everyday items have ballooned; meanwhile, wages stagnated and jobs were cut. It’s exactly why I just had the closest re-election of my career and Riverside County flipped to the GOP and Trump for the first time since 2008. If other Democrats can’t square those truths with the election results, then we’re doomed. Trump and his MAGA cronies will own a trifecta in just under one week, but that doesn’t mean we should throw up our hands for the next two years. I’m not wasting time to get back to start building back trust with working families in Riverside county and across the country. If you’re sick of getting emails with empty words linked to an ActBlue page, I won’t blame you. = Enough with the platitudes. Let’s roll up our sleeves and really get to work. * **TOP NEWS**

"**Rep. Dustin Burrows voted Texas House speaker in blow to insurgent GOP movement,** " Texas Tribune's**James Barragan** ,**Jasper Scherer** ,**Renzo Downey** and **Robert Downen** -- "Rep. **Dustin Burrows** , R-Lubbock, was elected speaker of the Texas House on Tuesday, concluding a bitter and intense power struggle within the Republican Party that came down to an extraordinary floor vote to decide who would fill one of the most powerful positions in state government.

In his acceptance speech, Burrows focused on his desire to keep the House an independent institution, where lawmakers could feel free to disagree with one another without fear of repercussion.

"This is the people's House," said Burrows, who was joined by his wife Elisabeth and three sons for his swearing-in ceremony.

He promised to work with every member of the Legislature, leaving his door open even to those who opposed him.

"I commit to you today, every member will have a voice," he said. "Every district will have a seat at the table."

Burrows' win marks a disappointing defeat for the insurgent wing of the party, which has spent years working to wrest control of the lower chamber away from establishment Republicans. That faction, which aims to push the House further to the right, ousted more than a dozen GOP members in last year's primaries who were aligned with Burrows and his predecessor, Rep. **Dade Phelan** of Beaumont, riding a wave of conservative backlash over the House's impeachment of Attorney General **Ken Paxton** and failure to pass a private school voucher bill.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/3e8d79b7-5dd6-4d5f-8399-b4ab24ce2f4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
After the record turnover, hardline conservatives saw this year's speaker race as perhaps their best chance ever to depose the current House leadership. They selected as their standard-bearer Rep. **David Cook** of Mansfield, who vowed to follow through on insurgent demands to strip power from Democrats -- including barring them from chairing committees -- and weaken the speaker's means of controlling the chamber.

But while the insurgent crowd succeeded in forcing Phelan to give up the gavel, the elevation of his close ally signals a similar power structure will likely remain in place.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/3e8d79b7-5dd6-4d5f-8399-b4ab24ce2f4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Burrows won the speaker's race after two rounds of voting, edging out Cook by a vote of 85-55. During the first round, Rep. **Ana-Mar ia Rodriguez-Ramos**, a Richardson Democrat, received 23 votes from fellow Democratic members -- enough to keep Burrows and Cook from reaching the majority threshold of 76.

In the ensuing runoff round, twelve Democrats who had voted for Rodriguez-Ramos switched to Burrows. He also netted two more GOP votes from members who defected from Cook. Nine members marked themselves present without voting for either option, and one member, **Yvonne Davis** of Dallas, was marked as absent.
Burrows' winning coalition was made up of 49 Democrats and 36 Republicans, drawing instant backlash from hardline members and activists who vowed revenge in next year's primaries.

"Today, the RINO (anti-MAGA) Establishment laughed in the faces of our Republican grassroots. They chose Democrat chairs and Lobbyist buddies over their voters," Rep. **Shelley Luther** , a freshman Republican from Tom Bean who had vowed to oppose the Phelan-Burrows leadership team, [wrote on social media](https://substack.com/redirect/ab86dec6-3356-4bc5-a6e7-655455fc494c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). "I look forward to seeing if they're still laughing after the next round of primaries. The fight starts today."

Burrows' support from Democrats will likely become major ammunition for his Republican critics aligned with the party's right wing who warned that the new speaker should be chosen by a majority of GOP votes. On Tuesday, conservative activists sent buses full of Cook supporters to the Capitol to urge their lawmakers to support their preferred candidate.

Activists wearing red shirts that read "Ban Democrat Chairs" and "Betrayed by Dade" referencing Phelan filled the halls of the Capitol.

Paxton, a top state Republican leader who had [traveled the state urging people to pressure their lawmakers to vote for Cook](https://substack.com/redirect/cf6ee077-bb14-4bfa-807b-06fe9d30c32c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), criticized Burrows for winning the speaker's gavel with Democrat support and for going against Cook who had been the House Republican Caucus' endorsed nominee. He called on Burrows to prove his conservative bona fides and warned that he would keep fighting to "reform the Texas House."

"It is now important that Speaker Burrows and his leadership team pass every conservative legislative priority in a timely manner to make our state more secure and more prosperous," he said. "That is what Texas Republicans expect."

Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick** , an archconservative who presides over the Senate, was also critical of Burrows' reliance on Democrat votes to win the speaker's race. He said he expected Burrows to help the House pass legislation supported by social conservatives including: school vouchers, banning cities and counties from hiring lobbyists to advocate for them in Austin, bail reform, election integrity bills, putting the Ten Commandments in school classrooms, banning the teaching of Critical Race Theory in the state's colleges and universities and banning people from countries that are adversaries of the United States from owning land in Texas.

"Each of these bills will be passed again by the Texas Senate," Patrick said in a statement. "The voters will hold our new speaker accountable to keep his promise of being the most conservative speaker in Texas history."" ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "Rep. Dustin Burrows voted Texas House speaker in blow to insurgent GOP movement, " Texas Tribune'sJames Barragan ,Jasper Scherer ,Renzo Downey and Robert Downen -- "Rep. Dustin Burrows , R-Lubbock, was elected speaker of the Texas House on Tuesday, concluding a bitter and intense power struggle within the Republican Party that came down to an extraordinary floor vote to decide who would fill one of the most powerful positions in state government. In his acceptance speech, Burrows focused on his desire to keep the House an independent institution, where lawmakers could feel free to disagree with one another without fear of repercussion. "This is the people's House," said Burrows, who was joined by his wife Elisabeth and three sons for his swearing-in ceremony. He promised to work with every member of the Legislature, leaving his door open even to those who opposed him. "I commit to you today, every member will have a voice," he said. "Every district will have a seat at the table." Burrows' win marks a disappointing defeat for the insurgent wing of the party, which has spent years working to wrest control of the lower chamber away from establishment Republicans. That faction, which aims to push the House further to the right, ousted more than a dozen GOP members in last year's primaries who were aligned with Burrows and his predecessor, Rep. Dade Phelan of Beaumont, riding a wave of conservative backlash over the House's impeachment of Attorney General Ken Paxton and failure to pass a private school voucher bill. After the record turnover, hardline conservatives saw this year's speaker race as perhaps their best chance ever to depose the current House leadership. They selected as their standard-bearer Rep. David Cook of Mansfield, who vowed to follow through on insurgent demands to strip power from Democrats -- including barring them from chairing committees -- and weaken the speaker's means of controlling the chamber. But while the insurgent crowd succeeded in forcing Phelan to give up the gavel, the elevation of his close ally signals a similar power structure will likely remain in place. Burrows won the speaker's race after two rounds of voting, edging out Cook by a vote of 85-55. During the first round, Rep. Ana-Mar ia Rodriguez-Ramos, a Richardson Democrat, received 23 votes from fellow Democratic members -- enough to keep Burrows and Cook from reaching the majority threshold of 76. In the ensuing runoff round, twelve Democrats who had voted for Rodriguez-Ramos switched to Burrows. He also netted two more GOP votes from members who defected from Cook. Nine members marked themselves present without voting for either option, and one member, Yvonne Davis of Dallas, was marked as absent. Burrows' winning coalition was made up of 49 Democrats and 36 Republicans, drawing instant backlash from hardline members and activists who vowed revenge in next year's primaries. "Today, the RINO (anti-MAGA) Establishment laughed in the faces of our Republican grassroots. They chose Democrat chairs and Lobbyist buddies over their voters," Rep. Shelley Luther , a freshman Republican from Tom Bean who had vowed to oppose the Phelan-Burrows leadership team, . "I look forward to seeing if they're still laughing after the next round of primaries. The fight starts today." Burrows' support from Democrats will likely become major ammunition for his Republican critics aligned with the party's right wing who warned that the new speaker should be chosen by a majority of GOP votes. On Tuesday, conservative activists sent buses full of Cook supporters to the Capitol to urge their lawmakers to support their preferred candidate. Activists wearing red shirts that read "Ban Democrat Chairs" and "Betrayed by Dade" referencing Phelan filled the halls of the Capitol. Paxton, a top state Republican leader who had , criticized Burrows for winning the speaker's gavel with Democrat support and for going against Cook who had been the House Republican Caucus' endorsed nominee. He called on Burrows to prove his conservative bona fides and warned that he would keep fighting to "reform the Texas House." "It is now important that Speaker Burrows and his leadership team pass every conservative legislative priority in a timely manner to make our state more secure and more prosperous," he said. "That is what Texas Republicans expect." Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick , an archconservative who presides over the Senate, was also critical of Burrows' reliance on Democrat votes to win the speaker's race. He said he expected Burrows to help the House pass legislation supported by social conservatives including: school vouchers, banning cities and counties from hiring lobbyists to advocate for them in Austin, bail reform, election integrity bills, putting the Ten Commandments in school classrooms, banning the teaching of Critical Race Theory in the state's colleges and universities and banning people from countries that are adversaries of the United States from owning land in Texas. "Each of these bills will be passed again by the Texas Senate," Patrick said in a statement. "The voters will hold our new speaker accountable to keep his promise of being the most conservative speaker in Texas history."" name: Team Moulton
subject: [please read] Seth’s re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Folks,

Seth Moulton is officially running for re-election – and he needs your support. As a consistent champion for better wages, better healthcare, and more working class opportunities, Seth has always believed that the Democratic Party must do more than just hold the right policies.

We must also learn to communicate more effectively, reach folks where they are, and stand for the issues that matter most to everyday Americans.

Seth knows we can’t afford to lose touch with the communities we serve. As Democrats, we can’t push forward popular policies without being able to win elections. And to win, we must rebuild our connection with working Americans and make sure that our message is clear and compelling.

In a time when so many people are feeling disconnected from the political process, this challenge is more important than ever.

Will you make an early investment in Seth’s re-election campaign by contribution $5, $15, or whatever is meaningful to you right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

Seth is likely to have several primary challengers. He’s ready to meet those challenges head-on but he needs to know we have his back.

Together, we can keep fighting for the future of our country and to ensure that our voices are heard. If we are able to learn our lessons from last month and course correct, we can win big in the midterms.

Thanks for standing with Seth.

-Team Moulton

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: LA wildfires (how to help)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
World Central Kitchen and United Way are providing relief on the ground. They need our support to keep helping the families impacted by the fires.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250115-1&t=1&akid=1635%2E587540%2EqWisU4)
Peter, our hearts are breaking for everyone impacted by the California wildfires.
At least 24 people have died and entire communities have been utterly destroyed. As Los Angeles grapples with this incomprehensible devastation, we’re directing our efforts to provide immediate relief services for families impacted by the fires.
**[World Central Kitchen and United Way of Greater Los Angeles are providing direct relief, including meals and emergency housing, to families on the ground. If you’re in a place to give, please help make a real impact with a contribution.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250115-1?refcode=em20250115-1635&amount=5&refcode2=1635_587540_qWisU4&akid=1635%2E587540%2EqWisU4)**
Peter, World Central Kitchen is a leader in providing critical food resources where they’re needed most – from war-torn regions like Ukraine and Gaza to communities here in the United States reeling in the wake of natural disasters.
United Way of Greater Los Angeles is raising critical funds to provide immediate relief, like housing and financial assistance, and long-term recovery and support.
These organizations are critical to the current efforts to help the individuals and families whose lives have been tragically upended in the face of these wildfires.
**[If you’re able to support these efforts, your contribution will make a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250115-1?refcode=em20250115-1635&amount=5&refcode2=1635_587540_qWisU4&akid=1635%2E587540%2EqWisU4)**
**We’re in this together.** Thank you for making a difference in these difficult times.
Leaders We Deserve
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250115-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250115-1635&refcode2=1635_587540_qWisU4&akid=1635%2E587540%2EqWisU4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1635%2E587540%2EqWisU4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1635%2E587540%2EqWisU4)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Team Crow
subject: So close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eb221012c4c04afa852511f3ff6da9d3&_e=TfeKz_yNVueSzpPK2NytuZQpH-Mv7EYGHoJVekZfhxoHVplNC4eDj5cg0GbWkM-b3nAvt-_wAg1RsYwDjNV6mj1ZmlS6ErDvqapKUxZGommN7Po2Y-IHPhvVaM3YDjszNZpZ0J5W-771jIURatNv6hgRb5lTkcvnTB9TrztsnQwy2mnynmNMjFR-tF47pGnDVmDqdUODN8FeQ9QeAf6ZwhYHp2RmJk-janJERLXzkHsTYGnQjU33yVKhTf_mcCHm0TbHkXhaqqFGzEPE_JHsMeb-cJvUqE9fJyd1TCzAFEPWqzmH721VIbgZ4iX8PD3NuvlzVgBinUgdqbsWS438MneAzgYrbyFmRzGsGRyu015_ABMo4dEDAts-rlX7l72H2gk9qdB5SDuGry5QIb7goRqD3RIMuwKa4sBIx45o6xw%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eb221012c4c04afa852511f3ff6da9d3&_e=TfeKz_yNVueSzpPK2NytuZQpH-Mv7EYGHoJVekZfhxoHVplNC4eDj5cg0GbWkM-b3nAvt-_wAg1RsYwDjNV6mj1ZmlS6ErDvqapKUxZGommN7Po2Y-IHPhvVaM3YDjszNZpZ0J5W-771jIURatNv6hgRb5lTkcvnTB9TrztsnQwy2mnynmNMjFR-tF47pGnDVmDqdUODN8FeQ9QeAf6ZwhYHp2RmJk-janJERLXzkHsTYGnQjU33yVKhTf_mcCHmrPndQh4bUWbkUbx1MiglF70SsHfU3UaAexwZB3lyn8aEujCvFSxGx4Ci0Oujv1s5rFq0xsfB-beMjKp8U6U2lxRboGviXS5ivXX-5Nga_9GfG5Hc7cPAo8Pqmdzpqwfr2wkxcL-G9gExVgV6WLS_4mhXQZnIREt_u7z_ezP0yqo%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eb221012c4c04afa852511f3ff6da9d3&_e=TfeKz_yNVueSzpPK2NytuZQpH-Mv7EYGHoJVekZfhxoHVplNC4eDj5cg0GbWkM-b3nAvt-_wAg1RsYwDjNV6mj1ZmlS6ErDvqapKUxZGommN7Po2Y-IHPhvVaM3YDjszNZpZ0J5W-771jIURatNv6hgRb5lTkcvnTB9TrztsnQwy2mnynmNMjFR-tF47pGnDVmDqdUODN8FeQ9QeAf6ZwhYHp2RmJk-janJERLXzkHsTYGnQjU33yVKhTf_mcCHm_zIcp92THQThvhT_0LGwYMVtuQrxqfWnMRJnYCDq9YSKRWTBpdlerw8UqckzfnSs6W9QPfiwAzaTD7EUC9asoYfRUPgQY1ehPS1IDkO4GEoi7C1qo419uILzwDdp4-ZmIbJszllu5uX21OY2Giz-4g6JgdLdzuksQXtJc_rSk34%3D)**

name: Bethany Hamilton
subject: God had my back
body:
I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again.| | | But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back.
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8c222e42e24190ad3f5dda024e92c9&_e=tkG7YC5MNzgydPiWGnxRo4TNhgrbJevoDxoh8INOGkCCxjCJGmBRdFKdqKocu1WpR7tVN-Db1VeHgz_5IueO7d-VRwTtsbVSDY6m8gPle2z2bOJW2d6-Rs4uUgj86VIccI3nlkaPvQe1ecRvOFGeeoDPu2utPAWuSooAN6SAKr2ZxKtA8YPzqlh6V1-SC536LwJ6FD4K-QsMWSJMDmYQxfHcboR1_psvmhXT21e4iuY01SxVI7608yXL93r9jMv3RkrHhABrNJa2oh-ItFrpWRdjo4ONZfUolRWjWgKvEY6xFA9BNY-hbxHEXfMrF675CwIqsBioZp_nT_79NkkdlpDPS3r5FCQ4yfB7wg9ndjSmDmH6nO_DQTej2u6Sz60XslHmFin0kO4FD627rm4rfg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend, I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again.But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| | Dear Friend,I was just 13 years old when I lost my arm in a shark attack. A lot of people thought I'd be too scared to ever surf again. But just 4 weeks later I was back in the water.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8c222e42e24190ad3f5dda024e92c9&_e=tkG7YC5MNzgydPiWGnxRo4TNhgrbJevoDxoh8INOGkCCxjCJGmBRdFKdqKocu1WpR7tVN-Db1VeHgz_5IueO7d-VRwTtsbVSDY6m8gPle2z2bOJW2d6-Rs4uUgj86VIccI3nlkaPvQe1ecRvOFGeeoDPu2utPAWuSooAN6SAKr2ZxKtA8YPzqlh6V1-SC536LwJ6FD4K-QsMWSJMDmYQxfHcboR1_psvmhXT21e4iuY01SxVI7608yXL93r9jMv3emAmla7-Q37WPgdSzSI0DTRSn9lATuUVuut6uKib6-It6nLV9IEj7D0WBqgDWd_DeGOb5kaZV0Ye0uQyu5ohL4icHVWTN65suJ_IU2xK6mawgpdqBTiqE6NNfxqZ5KkWkMlevZymBBAkQePIiBKveA%3D%3D)
---
| | It was partly due to my parents’ unconditional support and my love of the ocean. But the biggest reason I kept surfing was my belief that God had my back. And I want more children to hear that message because too many of them are being trained up in fear, _not_ _faith_. That's why I wrote a children's book called "Surfing Past Fear" with an amazing Christian publisher called **Brave Books**. [**_I hope you'll consider giving a gift of $100 or any amount you can afford to support Brave Books_**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8c222e42e24190ad3f5dda024e92c9&_e=tkG7YC5MNzgydPiWGnxRo4TNhgrbJevoDxoh8INOGkCCxjCJGmBRdFKdqKocu1WpR7tVN-Db1VeHgz_5IueO7d-VRwTtsbVSDY6m8gPle2z2bOJW2d6-Rs4uUgj86VIccI3nlkaPvQe1ecRvOFGeeoDPu2utPAWuSooAN6SAKr2ZxKtA8YPzqlh6V1-SC536LwJ6FD4K-QsMWSJMDmYQxfHcboR1_psvmhXT21e4iuY01SxVI7608yXL93r9jMv3xUd69uWHUO-GiqOj3W_ErmaTeXHhdMzekLHM8k0zB4AyyHAMk8rL2QofQiyGh8temLRWiLiaPpqZXqm6z0Mx6qDDSVTJQwGwAkH7UvHH5R7PQZgAJV279Etvw08ftWhTlBc_xHpP2lutR_v25QKbqQ%3D%3D) as they help parents raise strong, resilient, God-loving children. In courage,
---
| | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8c222e42e24190ad3f5dda024e92c9&_e=tkG7YC5MNzgydPiWGnxRo4TNhgrbJevoDxoh8INOGkCCxjCJGmBRdFKdqKocu1WpR7tVN-Db1VeHgz_5IueO7d-VRwTtsbVSDY6m8gPle2z2bOJW2d6-Rs4uUgj86VIccI3nlkaPvQe1ecRvOFGeeoDPu2utPAWuSooAN6SAKr2ZxKtA8YPzqlh6V1-SC536LwJ6FD4K-QsMWSJMDmYQxfHcboR1_psvmhXT21e4iuY01SxVI7608yXL93r9jMv3d3c2JPHtojXNwwxzGDxEMuWodpeFRBdGhSjdLvvIJ7DJFAmAoDtIn9wcYb-m0QjJ43BFe8bS_vchCR54482i4d0uuuIgshHD1zHvN3k7S6vTgXzocgYnRoUqmvTWSNKFnNaeHMSXoP9TE9vGyB_TZQ%3D%3D)
---
**Bethany Hamilton** Professional Surfer and Mother
---
|
---
| | P.S. I've set aside a small number of copies of "Surfing Past Fear" just for the friends of **Brave Books**. **[When you support their work today with your gift of $100 or more, it'll be my honor to send you one.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8c222e42e24190ad3f5dda024e92c9&_e=tkG7YC5MNzgydPiWGnxRo4TNhgrbJevoDxoh8INOGkCCxjCJGmBRdFKdqKocu1WpR7tVN-Db1VeHgz_5IueO7d-VRwTtsbVSDY6m8gPle2z2bOJW2d6-Rs4uUgj86VIccI3nlkaPvQe1ecRvOFGeeoDPu2utPAWuSooAN6SAKr2ZxKtA8YPzqlh6V1-SC536LwJ6FD4K-QsMWSJMDmYQxfHcboR1_psvmhXT21e4iuY01SxVI7608yXL93r9jMv3bx_umWk2kX75DHZpqz8MRKxQAA27ztAWBhAXL-Lq_dWf5iZT5AogLBW1qbgmKwZpR1dkGKzUN-fMnEUjeNdPWePnjHzw-KV_Wqj3cY3olYyTVjUFh-JnPByFcl3ZcRQ-tSdu_RiGL3kzgn5i4RBVJQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for helping America's children learn that God "has not given them a spirit of fear!" (2 Timothy 1:7) -- Bethany
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4c8c222e42e24190ad3f5dda024e92c9&_e=tkG7YC5MNzgydPiWGnxRo4TNhgrbJevoDxoh8INOGkCCxjCJGmBRdFKdqKocu1WpR7tVN-Db1VeHgz_5IueO7d-VRwTtsbVSDY6m8gPle2z2bOJW2d6-Rs4uUgj86VIccI3nlkaPvQe1ecRvOFGeeoDPu2utPAWuSooAN6SAKr2ZxKtA8YPzqlh6V1-SC536LwJ6FD4K-QsMWSJMDmYQxfHcboR1_psvmhXT21e4iuY01SxVI7608yXL93r9jMv3xJ0mcvRmVr5k7eY_wIq_GqsW951XOfd8OsYMIZxm3xPjKKIqoZh8SVRBU05FevIvwUPRyNRMMuFRGplmC4tH-inbdSfLewn5-0ot7AQyr0bE1sAUAZdQZz4HtaV--0aq-3XFUXftbLNparvZPfjxzw%3D%3D)

subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9fe9c736e3df4c8985acb440a1e5d697&_e=aizuI1BdlG_SmKe6sm_pAJQTJMP1V2Dex4Azr5EOVm02JpkU1Ogul7-cHD2Zc17vMIC4-SeofO1cBn5Cr7Qm9tjx6zEDT7HZZO0WeTn9oNWn3NBZaYLGJwyZOGyVs1WVKmnpSvaT0f7mnRR5wbAg1YRJUHk4pauB9TuiCGbMyRZr-8tKOI03nNUymCPd1JL_b1XTCE97yt7W2c8etS9karwJIlRH0Xcv_BqVAaiyQNTpE_sXTIBVlYVe94CmRHbGjNYcAOsDCI8bPFED6U5GcCe-iuDruOPNEJLK2l7GNj3llAWfUkg-m8wxbAC0EJT6xCe7R05sCkE_5Zv9blFxdooAWywgOl_DB0af7IYplHue_rgb95B8nLDg6ufwxNT55sA1hP6fpML-AwKoB2_deNv5aVJ5YgX2fUcDDV_7qxrq_9bdbTzgfpBPjTqAvpYU)
---
| | Dear Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9fe9c736e3df4c8985acb440a1e5d697&_e=aizuI1BdlG_SmKe6sm_pAJQTJMP1V2Dex4Azr5EOVm02JpkU1Ogul7-cHD2Zc17vMIC4-SeofO1cBn5Cr7Qm9tjx6zEDT7HZZO0WeTn9oNWn3NBZaYLGJwyZOGyVs1WVKmnpSvaT0f7mnRR5wbAg1YRJUHk4pauB9TuiCGbMyRZr-8tKOI03nNUymCPd1JL_b1XTCE97yt7W2c8etS9karwJIlRH0Xcv_BqVAaiyQNTpE_sXTIBVlYVe94CmRHbGjNYcAOsDCI8bPFED6U5GcMEYU7uyySrUwJYyAu0-wLM-uLnmivrpIP_NzcwIjhb2nl_wy1Sf68fcpXIUxSzyLj3uMoytzFIcGnlggBidLJmoxmWHsIQ1aqGOw3Xl_XXgMHFumKMgOTQI1Mjclltr_uuW-45lv7H_NzVQWY6T0PTLtV5zgWcpo6xsESFgw-6r)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9fe9c736e3df4c8985acb440a1e5d697&_e=aizuI1BdlG_SmKe6sm_pAJQTJMP1V2Dex4Azr5EOVm02JpkU1Ogul7-cHD2Zc17vMIC4-SeofO1cBn5Cr7Qm9tjx6zEDT7HZZO0WeTn9oNWn3NBZaYLGJwyZOGyVs1WVKmnpSvaT0f7mnRR5wbAg1YRJUHk4pauB9TuiCGbMyRZr-8tKOI03nNUymCPd1JL_b1XTCE97yt7W2c8etS9karwJIlRH0Xcv_BqVAaiyQNTpE_sXTIBVlYVe94CmRHbGjNYcAOsDCI8bPFED6U5GcIHBARfPSAdJ0gdnTv56c3antxAgZFYl-Di4ZEpHqHqa_JpN_brWZUAgdtVM0PPRhgbsk0rh1ZrkFJb_P3QdMcAJbGNzsS3lSh_bvYWHp6pGvSrllu6LAFgxnNZ3Nssu8V8Xy9Kt0mcwTkNIRbQa2qgKKwu83iWxcTJBzW95fBxq)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9fe9c736e3df4c8985acb440a1e5d697&_e=aizuI1BdlG_SmKe6sm_pAJQTJMP1V2Dex4Azr5EOVm02JpkU1Ogul7-cHD2Zc17vMIC4-SeofO1cBn5Cr7Qm9tjx6zEDT7HZZO0WeTn9oNWn3NBZaYLGJwyZOGyVs1WVKmnpSvaT0f7mnRR5wbAg1YRJUHk4pauB9TuiCGbMyRZr-8tKOI03nNUymCPd1JL_b1XTCE97yt7W2c8etS9karwJIlRH0Xcv_BqVAaiyQNTpE_sXTIBVlYVe94CmRHbGjNYcAOsDCI8bPFED6U5GcHfWkqDkEHvVufgSMMD0vVb1LB5Pcg-eLu3Tp1h-iUzTuRgyrxLtcYWI2mxAPALxj9rMEjPtuQ8ch04Q3NR7HNjU_hUVZxkpptyYdgp00vSczJ0qnIzp8u0ApsazwMBtfQAdHmEbPrBw3-Ppg8Eev8pONjlbDe8IcXVwd0lVyOEJ).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=9fe9c736e3df4c8985acb440a1e5d697&_t=_jw8TVnKuYEDY4YyoqM3RBAf5v2vmi31Vg4fGwEWGAptPGoLqLYeS-3oKml10Zvi5JiYovRcGqeLU6YqX9BeFBwvly92XkmnxtWijuf7STfD5zVSJeIjTkr0s39ppN6m)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I still have to reach out (from time-to-time)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Now that campaign is over, you’ve probably noticed that you hear from me a bit less than you used to. That’s not a bad thing from your side, I hope
#

Peter, it’s Ruben.
Now that campaign is over, you’ve probably noticed that you hear from me a bit less than you used to. That’s not a bad thing from your side, I hope — I think you probably appreciate the lighter pace.
But here’s the thing: I do still need to reach out, from time-to-time. I’ll be reaching out with actions you can take, like surveys and petitions. I’ll be letting you know what I’m up to. And, yes, I’ll be asking for donations sometimes, too.
We built a really incredible operation over the last two years — a campaign that overperformed the top of the ticket, a team that won in a state where we easily could have lost, and a team that can make a real difference. It was something special. And to keep that going, I need two things: You to continue being involved, and the resources to sustain my campaign (because these don’t come free, believe it or not).
Today is one of the days when I’m going to ask you for a donation, since we’re right up on our mid-month deadline. I don’t expect you to give every time I ask — never have. But I do need the folks who can afford it to give what they can, when they can.
So, I’m asking: Can I count on you today, Peter?
[**If you’re still with me, would you please chip in $5 before our mid-month deadline hits at midnight tonight? It’d be a real help, and it adds up fast when everyone chips in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan25.N6iRGd&refcode=em250115-1-90&t=1&akid=3653%2E734936%2E6OwH-d)

clean_body: Now that campaign is over, you’ve probably noticed that you hear from me a bit less than you used to. That’s not a bad thing from your side, I hope Peter, it’s Ruben. Now that campaign is over, you’ve probably noticed that you hear from me a bit less than you used to. That’s not a bad thing from your side, I hope — I think you probably appreciate the lighter pace. But here’s the thing: I do still need to reach out, from time-to-time. I’ll be reaching out with actions you can take, like surveys and petitions. I’ll be letting you know what I’m up to. And, yes, I’ll be asking for donations sometimes, too. We built a really incredible operation over the last two years — a campaign that overperformed the top of the ticket, a team that won in a state where we easily could have lost, and a team that can make a real difference. It was something special. And to keep that going, I need two things: You to continue being involved, and the resources to sustain my campaign (because these don’t come free, believe it or not). Today is one of the days when I’m going to ask you for a donation, since we’re right up on our mid-month deadline. I don’t expect you to give every time I ask — never have. But I do need the folks who can afford it to give what they can, when they can. So, I’m asking: Can I count on you today, Peter? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks, Peter. Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
Please watch

Governor Newsom was on with Jen Psaski last night and there are a few clips we thought it'd be helpful to share — and to ask if you can share them as well.
Republican discussion about conditioning federal aid to California on raising the debt ceiling:
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4052?t=1&akid=2296%2E4767699%2EmV5bnH)
The lies about water availability and some "magical spigot" that needs to be turned on when California's reservoirs are at or near historic highs.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4053?t=2&akid=2296%2E4767699%2EmV5bnH)
Governor Newsom's invitation to Trump to come out to California.

Team Newsom

name: Save NPR via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Save NPR from Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Musk is “gunning” for NPR and PBS, according to The New York Times. But to
kill our public media, he’ll have to get Congress to slash millions in
funding. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21074?source=email-011525&t=1011&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]And we are NOT going to let him get away with it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21074?t=1012&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ][IMG]

Musk famously said “you are the media now” — signaling he thinks all the
news we need is from his own Twitter “X” or Trump’s Truth Social. And with
billionaire buddies like Jeff Bezos busy censoring cartoons as owner of
The Washington Post and Mark Zuckerberg putting an end to fact-checking at
Facebook, his plan is quickly falling into place.

It’s not hard to see why PBS and NPR are Musk and Trump’s next targets –
they’re some of the few outlets they don't have control over. By gutting
this public service, Trump and Musk and their oligarch friends will be
free to take over even MORE of our media, lining their own pockets and
making it even easier for them to spread their own propaganda.

The good news is we’ve stopped these threats before and we’re ready to do
it again — but it’s going to take ALL of us to do it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21074?source=email-011525&t=1013&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Free and independent media is more vital than ever, but for Trump and
Musk, it’s one of the last remaining obstacles standing in the way of
their totalitarian dreams. WIll you urgently send a message straight to
Congress to save PBS and NPR?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21074?source=email-011525&t=1014&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]ADD YOUR NAME

Republicans have dreamed of gutting our free, fact-based independent
public media for YEARS. But they’ve never been able to do it because it
turns out, people on BOTH sides of the aisle (even in Congress!) believe
in a public media that is required by law to be objective and free from
corporate or political agendas.

When Trump tried to slash public media funding during his first term,
millions mobilized to stop him. Trump lost that fight, but this time could
be different as Republicans line up behind him and Musk pushes harder than
ever for major cuts.

To save these beloved institutions, we need to mobilize in even bigger
numbers than ever before.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21074?source=email-011525&t=1015&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]We're already hard at work mobilizing record breaking numbers and
relentlessly lobbying Congress to keep public media alive. Will you add
your name to send a message straight to Congress?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-011525.LoF1WJ&t=1007&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-011525.4UIxX-&t=1008&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-011525.cu19KX&t=1009&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-011525.JtZU4C&t=1010&akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7532%2E5885482%2EsNAF1C

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

name: Response Requested (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Public opinion of the Supreme Court is near an all-time low – a recent poll found that 48% of Americans disapprove of the Court. With Trump about to be sworn in, it’s crucial that we restore trust. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Recent revelations about conservative Supreme Court Justices Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito accepting lavish gifts from wealthy MAGA benefactors have shaken Americans’ trust in the Court’s ability to remain impartial during a second Trump administration. **Public opinion and confidence in the Supreme Court are near an all-time low – a recent poll found 48% of Americans disapprove of the Court.** Here’s the truth: Supreme Court Justices serve life-long terms and make decisions that impact millions of people – they should be held to a higher standard. **We want to hear what grassroots supporters in local think:**
| **Do you support a binding Code of Ethics for the Supreme Court?

** Yes
No
Unsure
**[Take the survey →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzRBi1I12trvGpCMAmsq3z5bVlz5v_uNvNqzUTk9QNVxWVj4gBLmdoeiXKKP32sTX23IMLSI9QgQEem757Jq6Bn4E4_o5ebHyKI4nqSBfJus38ISIqNS0DzQm_aqi4PUdDBsJprWO_X0CcK7vXOzfsRvdFYkClq4b5OfGM-sKwJXf3l8l82n-oLhIaXf1iD7UkKFE98BNwvY3572ZUlBsFgkmBUsxVlA3wfBv2Lh4TRUCk0EzZ5iAupEfNIbVOpwe_SBitmEOT_ZJ2W7_BsvFHUAIlVhBYL_xweC9YrLZMU2t5vTjNCrtedisJkqq4CGtUzbuoAEOniPc-3U0M1Mq8I/4d6/HV5UZsfZQnCtnNm0P9Vchg/h0/h001.7eO2K-1hBKfgy97sKE8ecZVh2A9szOWWgMowHBRxzw8)**
