name: Jim Jordan
subject: “TOSS-UP” MAJORITY
body:
Two years of fighting could be for *nothing* in just two short months.

Two years of fighting could be for *nothing* in just two short months.
| **_AN EMERGENCY BRIEFING FROM THE DESK OF JIM JORDAN_**
---
Friend:
---
I’m not one to raise the alarm without good reason, so I hope you’ll spare just a moment to hear me out.
---
I’ve received word that the Democrats’ midterm plan to STEAL the majority now hinges on this inescapable reality:
---
**_CNN: “[Republicans] will oversee _narrowest_ House majority in nearly 100 years” _**
---
And now, the Democrats know they’ll get their chance to crack our “narrow” majority in just a few short months...
---
**It’s a simple calculus: With multiple special elections on the books for early this year, the “narrowest majority in a century” could __already__ fall to a mere _TOSS-UP_.**
---
After such a historic victory in November, the Left is hoping, begging, that we’ll rest on our laurels and become complacent so that they can **FLIP** the majority! _We cannot let that happen. Period._
---
That’s why I’ve prepared this briefing to urge every America First patriot to keep their eyes peeled. Don’t let the Radical Democrats take advantage of this feeling of victory.
---
Trust me, I understand just how much time, effort, and resources from hardworking Americans like YOU went into securing such a big victory this November.
---
_That’s why I pulled**$2.5 MILLION** from my own 2024 campaign funds to help defend our majority from Kamala and the Democrats' warchest._
---
**But I REFUSE to allow all our hard work over the last _two years_ be unraveled in just _TWO SHORT MONTHS_. So now, I’m looking for _2.5 MILLION patriots_ to join me!**
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of any size toward our FIRST goal of the year to match my commitment to DEFEND our new House majority that could soon fall to a mere TOSS-UP.**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9P49/?__vbtrk=MjcwMDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwMDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9P49/?__vbtrk=MjcwMDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwMDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9P49/?__vbtrk=MjcwMDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwMDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9P49/?__vbtrk=MjcwMDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwMDc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Jim Jordan

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Here’s the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
From the moment I launched my first campaign, this team has been powered by donations from generous supporters like you.
#

Team —
I’m writing to ask you to make a donation — $3 or whatever you can afford — before our mid-month fundraising deadline hits at midnight tonight.
Here’s why:
From the moment I launched my first campaign, this team has been powered by donations from generous supporters like you. People chipping in $5, $10, even $25 or more to emails like this one.
That hasn’t changed. Matter of fact, it’s more important than ever.
Now that we’re staring down the second Trump Administration and everything that comes with it, that grassroots support is going to become even more important as we hold the line on the issues that matters most to us.
I know we just came out of a tough election cycle, but we’ve got to stick together if we’re going to defend the progress we’ve made. And if everyone reading this chips in what they can afford,we’ll crush our goals and be ready for anything that comes our way.
So, I’m respectfully asking you:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight tonight? I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan25.ChccGr&refcode=em250115-1-180&t=1&akid=5944%2E6688874%2EPkGtsD)

Here’s why: From the moment I launched my first campaign, this team has been powered by donations from generous supporters like you. People chipping in $5, $10, even $25 or more to emails like this one. That hasn’t changed. Matter of fact, it’s more important than ever. Now that we’re staring down the second Trump Administration and everything that comes with it, that grassroots support is going to become even more important as we hold the line on the issues that matters most to us. I know we just came out of a tough election cycle, but we’ve got to stick together if we’re going to defend the progress we’ve made. And if everyone reading this chips in what they can afford,we’ll crush our goals and be ready for anything that comes our way. So, I’m respectfully asking you: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** I can’t thank you enough for your help. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

subject: The single most powerful thing you can do to defend parental rights

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=79e7e1a6691f4bb1b21812789da043fe&_e=0m520s2yVXAOOJBOEmSLZzjRVQOPVV597xzntuBCtMwJLXqGPSqWyQ10lGvmT8WZTtafgCYhYv2vuKko_zgxwXfoq0ax7vk-GoPAVqWjjWTXOoMlGlgrclm4mi1_4m44ZF2DuvUYfzR1EzGfInDv3gG9k7ZeTozyf3bbRSV5xLTHajIRM79HfxS0oY7zMHmLX0UIXUBQVVfZiqgA0qFk_zCrlGpG5JDzPscBUXunZ9fX4mupMl3-yqSzCuJUUYVnn7s4qVI6ZkA_CauRDaraFa5XqBcu9tHK4gfuT0_GY7sKD0rJDxp4crROSOAqfC5ylW4MA6qICRu6-bUebo98crEWWX340rYXG3mgn4-Mh9Y%3D)

Fellow American,

There is nothing more important than the freedom we enjoy as Americans.

It's why I ran for governor in the great state of Arizona and why I consider myself blessed beyond measure to have served in that capacity through some of the state's toughest times.

It's also why I'm such a staunch supporter of the Goldwater Institute!

I know that they are 100% committed to restoring America's education system through their trademark education savings accounts and school choice programs.

As the Governor of Arizona, I had no greater ally in passing conservative, common sense policies that helped the citizens of our state live freer, happier lives than the Goldwater Institute.

[Can you join me by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $500 to support the Goldwater Institute today? Your gift will help the Goldwater Institute meet their fundraising goal of $27,000 this month and continue their mission of making school choice the law of the land. Click here to donate now! >>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=79e7e1a6691f4bb1b21812789da043fe&_e=0m520s2yVXAOOJBOEmSLZzjRVQOPVV597xzntuBCtMwJLXqGPSqWyQ10lGvmT8WZTtafgCYhYv2vuKko_zgxwXfoq0ax7vk-GoPAVqWjjWTXOoMlGlgrclm4mi1_4m44ZF2DuvUYfzR1EzGfInDv3gG9k7ZeTozyf3bbRSV5xLQLkO7a9gRw7HL1CEytJkIAe4fmDm_MAErtQFifV4ISTo3FUj39m1xrNiGAkRJpziDbz5_3FWmQcskCDQqSWuG-TQzcG5E9-spVmbvUy3hjH_o2bprcioLRPdjmxKX2-A8D1MVHlBdhI7K6rbaOo20QfVTwKfZ_Fbd0xKxdvQEHpuiwdtTh1a98xni5K-ux6NLuDTQrx3zaDMMHyBZ6p0SP)

For over 30 years, the Goldwater Institute has been the nation's pre-eminent liberty organization, scoring real wins for freedom from coast to coast.

As Governor, I am proud to have passed critical school choice legislation that paved the way for parental rights across the nation. The Goldwater Institute was a key ally in this battle to empower parents and students.

The legislation I signed into law establishes universal Education Savings Accounts (ESAs), which provide all families with the freedom to pursue excellence in education for their children, regardless of their socioeconomic status.

**Since then, the Goldwater Institute has helped pass ESAs and other school choice legislation in more than 20 states, and they 're not slowing down.**

[Donate to Goldwater Institute ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=79e7e1a6691f4bb1b21812789da043fe&_e=0m520s2yVXAOOJBOEmSLZzjRVQOPVV597xzntuBCtMwJLXqGPSqWyQ10lGvmT8WZTtafgCYhYv2vuKko_zgxwXfoq0ax7vk-GoPAVqWjjWTXOoMlGlgrclm4mi1_4m44ZF2DuvUYfzR1EzGfInDv3gG9k7ZeTozyf3bbRSV5xLR_grJKA4G81Yl-TFK14ocpye4b6B-m9MspRiZMU-a-o48UwCK7wnUwPaIPxdhfZh1tDowVMB8b5ROHOW-74B1-dOlwlJYWFpHzb6CdPcdwMQWOQT-XsXJJqUrUPKbYBQGUTNA2ydX9oNNmwXUqcrS_VKhHAGoKu1PW-Gfpw1a1Qij4AhE6Gl9tVOFB3uq3FgKjj67QNbcmjk-Qu3TuEdhX)

From taking on the teachers' unions to exposing radical critical race theory (CRT) indoctrination in classrooms, the Goldwater Institute has made it their mission to preserve the integrity of American education.

Thanks to their work, what we started as a pilot program in Arizona has now spread to states across the country.

The Goldwater Institute's school choice policies are vital for ensuring that children can receive an education free from indoctrination, such as the following:

_In Boston, a teacher hung a poster in the classroom promoting anti-Americanism with slogans like, "The American Dream is a scam" and "America was built on genocide and slavery."

In Arizona, the Attorney General is trying to block parents from using their Education Savings Account funds on common sense curriculum materials and school supplies.

In Maine, school staff secretly gave a chest binder to a 13-year-old girl and encouraged her to switch genders, much to the surprise of her parents. _

School choice is the #1 way to fight this indoctrination and give education back to parents.

Today, I'm proud to partner with the Goldwater Institute to ask you to join us in the fight. Help us ensure that no kids are stuck in failing schools and that parents have the freedom of choice when it comes to their children's education!

[Freedom is on the line in America, and it's up to you and me to stand with organizations like the Goldwater Institute to provide a freer and happier future for our kids. Please join me in supporting their work. Even a gift of just $10 puts us that much closer to meeting the goal. This is exactly what we as New Dems are about: Working across the aisle to deliver real solutions to protect everyday Americans.

clean_body: Rep. McBride is the first new Member to introduce legislation - and it’s bipartisan | = Last week, New Dem Rep. Sarah McBride became the first freshman Democrat to introduce a bill in the 119th Congress! = | = Even more exciting, it’s a bipartisan consumer protection bill:The Ending Scam Credit Repair Act. It cracks down on fraudulent practices from companies that prey on vulnerable consumers with high fees. This is exactly what we as New Dems are about: Working across the aisle to deliver real solutions to protect everyday Americans. Like Rep. McBride, in 2025, we’re committed to delivering commonsense-solutions to put progress over partisan distractions. Supporting candidates who put people over politics is how we’ll flip GOP-held seats and take back the House majority next year — but that work depends on the resources we can collect now. I would never expect you to chip into every email from my team and me. Yesterday on the House floor, Nancy Mace threatened to physically fight me when I called her out over her obsession with transgender people and her struggling campaign coffers.
_**Bless her heart.**_
**I’ve spent my political career standing up to bullies** — from Greg Abbott and anti-choice extremists in Texas to Nancy Mace, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Donald Trump in Washington. Rep. Maxwell Frost is standing up to bullies alongside me, even calling out Nancy Mace for trying to incite violence in the committee.
When it comes to bullies, if you give an inch, they’ll take a mile.
That’s why I introduced an amendment to reinstate the Oversight Subcommittee on Civil Rights and Civil Liberties. And that’s why I refuse to stand down to Nancy Mace’s bullying and threats of violence.
**If you agree that bullies must be held accountable, please stand with me and Maxwell Frost at this critical moment. Whether on a school playground or in the halls of Congress, a bully is a bully and must be held accountable.**
[**_I will always fight back against bullies like Nancy Mace, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Donald Trump, and others. But I need your support, so will you split $10 or more between my campaign and Maxwell Frost today? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/7yxfH3-0We7FELE6ckewbg~~/AAPPAAA~)

If you agree that bullies must be held accountable, please stand with me and Maxwell Frost at this critical moment. Whether on a school playground or in the halls of Congress, a bully is a bully and must be held accountable. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | ~~ | ~~ | ~ Nancy Mace’s campaign coffers are struggling. That’s why she keeps bringing up the trans issue. And that’s why she flipped out and threatened to fight me yesterday on the House floor. I’m not done fighting. Thanks for fighting with me, Jasmine Crockett | Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today? | ~ ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. # AMANDA CHASE

# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello Want to know what bills are coming up on Thursday?
Just click above on each of the committees and subcommittees for a full listing of bills coming up tomorrow.
You can watch the committees, subcommittees and session live using the links below.
Be sure to tune in to session tomorrow as a gun bill SB744 sponsored by Senator Favola will be debated. This bill pertains to "Firearms transfers to another person from a prohibited person."
If you're interested in where your taxpayer money is being spent, you will want to tune in Thursday morning at 7:30am to the Health & Human Resources Subcommittee for a briefing of the Governor's proposed budget. All things pertaining to health and human resources and social services will be covered.
Every Thursday, the Senate Health and Education full committee meets 30 minutes after session adjourns. If you want to speak on a bill, you will have to do so in a subcommittee meeting. Those will meet after session on Thursday.
The full committee typically only hears subcommittee reports by chairs and typically no public comment is allowed. This is different that most committees.
So make sure you attend or call in to the Health & Education subcommittees.
SB738 Pekarsky is a bill that deals with student possession of cell phones in elementary and middle school. This bill will come up in the Subcommittee on Public Education.
SB749 Mulchi bill deals with student participation in women's sports.
SB755 Muchi allows school resource officers to carry a firearm.
SB1031 Pekarsky is a bill that goes after parents who chose to homeschool their children under the religious exemption option.
SB1048 Pekarsky is a bill that requires each local school board to send a text reminder to secure prescription drugs and firearms.
SB1066 Peake is an excellent bill which includes in the curriculum of a video recording of an ultrasound of a live human fetus in the uterus.
SB1079 Peake is another excellent bill which prohibits men in women's sports.
SB874 Hackworth. Local sales and use tax, capital projects for schools; Pulaski County
Need more detail about these bills? Please click the bill links above.
Tomorrow, in the full Senate Health and Education Committee, there are bills regarding reproductive health care services.
---
| |
---
|
---
While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you.
I do my own research and writing. So I promise there will be typos.
With the quick turn around time involved in reading bills on the docket for the next day and getting the info out in a timely manner, there's not much time for proofreading by others. Thanks for your grace and patience.
I'm currently publishing this on a voluntary basis and to help you hold your government accountable.
While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you.
Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance.
We must now save Virginia. Let's do this.
---

If you want to speak on a bill, you will have to do so in a subcommittee meeting. Those will meet after session on Thursday. The full committee typically only hears subcommittee reports by chairs and typically no public comment is allowed. This is different that most committees. So make sure you attend or call in to the Health & Education subcommittees. SB738 Pekarsky is a bill that deals with student possession of cell phones in elementary and middle school. This bill will come up in the Subcommittee on Public Education. SB749 Mulchi bill deals with student participation in women's sports. SB755 Muchi allows school resource officers to carry a firearm. SB1031 Pekarsky is a bill that goes after parents who chose to homeschool their children under the religious exemption option. SB1048 Pekarsky is a bill that requires each local school board to send a text reminder to secure prescription drugs and firearms. SB1066 Peake is an excellent bill which includes in the curriculum of a video recording of an ultrasound of a live human fetus in the uterus. SB1079 Peake is another excellent bill which prohibits men in women's sports. SB874 Hackworth. Local sales and use tax, capital projects for schools; Pulaski County Need more detail about these bills? Please click the bill links above. Tomorrow, in the full Senate Health and Education Committee, there are bills regarding reproductive health care services. | | | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you. I do my own research and writing. So I promise there will be typos. With the quick turn around time involved in reading bills on the docket for the next day and getting the info out in a timely manner, there's not much time for proofreading by others. Thanks for your grace and patience. I'm currently publishing this on a voluntary basis and to help you hold your government accountable. While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you. Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance. We must now save Virginia. Let's do this. | | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | | == | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Not good…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
I named this project The Long Run because I know that real change takes time
#
Friend — Today is January 15th, which means we’re halfway through the first month of 2025.
Usually at this point in the month, we’d be at about 40% of our monthly fundraising goal. But so far we’re barely at 20%. **That’s really not good news.**
I don’t know what it is. Maybe people are still tired from the election in November. Maybe people don’t see a path forward for our movement now that Trump is set to take over.
**I’m here to tell you that we can’t give in to that kind of thinking.**
I named this project The Long Run because I know that real change takes time. It doesn’t happen in one election cycle or one moment in time.
Think about the civil rights movement, the women’s rights movement, or the fight for gay marriage. These were long fights that took sustained efforts over years if not decades to achieve the progress we now enjoy today.
Those folks didn’t give up — they didn't have that luxury. And to be honest, we don’t either. If we’re going to beat back the rising tide of fascism in America, we have to stay in the fight.
That’s why The Long Run is still laser-focused on electing changemaking progressive up and down the ballot in crucial battleground states who can tip the political scales away from the far-right and towards our future. We’re asking for your help in that mission.
[**So, will you step up and make a contribution to The Long Run today? It doesn’t matter how much you give, because every donation will show that our movement is growing stronger instead of weaker. That we are ready to take on Trump and win.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan25.IJ0kth&refcode=em250115-1-150&t=1&akid=5453%2E196590%2EPl92c2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

****
Thank you for anything you can do today to help us get our fundraising back on track.
— Mandela Barnes
Founder, The Long Run PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=5453%2E196590%2EPl92c2). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=5453%2E196590%2EPl92c2)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cd1cf702b98d46358247585968542cf7&_e=gLr9KKwEI0m5rU4sK53MUGPCMLLShl22jSyq1hWzZIxCqz4_uLeJip8sMGCarO2tHzEitgOeW0Od8jQO7HdujxegE_TMeNqKeOtUJMXceYWvgkgv9EaK5QBT1JPOL1yQZjN9VznRS75YrfMZBM1mU06QhNBraGh7Z-_PmCo1089CJv9wSXcyuj9egDOJ5MaMv_CS6p8UYj16KvqyUVaFe-i45gUvhsJCECvQfp7ivcEZJTXXQLMp04e5c2hEN4TWu4vB6-fh1R_mAz6wpbBVBQb5YUuuUYuXtmru561e9Qe4iAdYRVq6f0fa1x3ThbGg1fSFGLrZzA8OlgPUJuAJDBLz2bCMNkdAOmJGE9qDbHsdAQu56MAoM2KG4ow9yPGMNe-9Hw3AcX9Bdz6EpmvbfQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cd1cf702b98d46358247585968542cf7&_e=gLr9KKwEI0m5rU4sK53MUGPCMLLShl22jSyq1hWzZIxCqz4_uLeJip8sMGCarO2tHzEitgOeW0Od8jQO7HdujxegE_TMeNqKeOtUJMXceYWvgkgv9EaK5QBT1JPOL1yQZjN9VznRS75YrfMZBM1mU06QhNBraGh7Z-_PmCo1089CJv9wSXcyuj9egDOJ5MaMv_CS6p8UYj16KvqyUVaFe-i45gUvhsJCECvQfp7ivcE1CIwVmVJZzVLi_ti3hWYk_AAl2K4KCPnmWVoDKKd9QhdFmtGd9JAUJSbA9X7umE2ZG0A6aEXNCHX_lDln6EKPCP_xScaDWfMvEBeSFUCTHxbNZY6q6vGDt1WnaVOaNESCqIUDMTAZW_IZu4PFZ9fG20OfRtb7opzUZWEWklIkpw%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cd1cf702b98d46358247585968542cf7&_e=gLr9KKwEI0m5rU4sK53MUGPCMLLShl22jSyq1hWzZIxCqz4_uLeJip8sMGCarO2tHzEitgOeW0Od8jQO7HdujxegE_TMeNqKeOtUJMXceYWvgkgv9EaK5QBT1JPOL1yQZjN9VznRS75YrfMZBM1mU06QhNBraGh7Z-_PmCo1089CJv9wSXcyuj9egDOJ5MaMv_CS6p8UYj16KvqyUVaFe-i45gUvhsJCECvQfp7ivcFByORSFbCJHSW2znC24LP-gN-DuJWjigFwdxM6JU76rdd_IlluzG35mnkFnHMAdQpxD48NnntC7YrE8-g448fQhzUAQ7bTOxyUKceJmF3oxpfuUnnadRPLAUA9oKsOQ_BIZ8_V6zv8mbDSR45cNfVze2ymCDC_AQ5TkZQU83JF7A%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cd1cf702b98d46358247585968542cf7&_e=gLr9KKwEI0m5rU4sK53MUGPCMLLShl22jSyq1hWzZIxCqz4_uLeJip8sMGCarO2tHzEitgOeW0Od8jQO7HdujxegE_TMeNqKeOtUJMXceYWvgkgv9EaK5QBT1JPOL1yQZjN9VznRS75YrfMZBM1mU06QhNBraGh7Z-_PmCo1089CJv9wSXcyuj9egDOJ5MaMv_CS6p8UYj16KvqyUVaFe-i45gUvhsJCECvQfp7ivcEUvzVfP4xbSckn-9Nlv8AJbVCGiZFLic2LLDYIhmFxWHVxv3TKDk-jiVvCv6eVKAirDJM4d_PwcOnRe31ysd6BzQPeuTwqHowRwT1iKfx0_EsCmojZiI5g0sd4oKq5fthEJNCotqow14jHOhXNfOTyb2OCftHpWXpWk2DHI9sqeQ%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cd1cf702b98d46358247585968542cf7&_e=gLr9KKwEI0m5rU4sK53MUGPCMLLShl22jSyq1hWzZIxCqz4_uLeJip8sMGCarO2tHzEitgOeW0Od8jQO7HdujxegE_TMeNqKeOtUJMXceYWvgkgv9EaK5QBT1JPOL1yQZjN9VznRS75YrfMZBM1mU06QhNBraGh7Z-_PmCo1089CJv9wSXcyuj9egDOJ5MaMv_CS6p8UYj16KvqyUVaFe-i45gUvhsJCECvQfp7ivcE4vOrhhivOd13fFF5WR0ywBApKDvn3WBEfZxu5vLI23Xt7uDXgksrlgS-QumZZN7GrMY64ARNJpqg_tEBB53BWzq8ibZ3Sil8qdsHRRAuu94cjrjnfY13RV6gd797wD2jaq0v0gl_Ra9AlWKkBWKP3Ek4q292XAT36M2VFSSVgjg%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cd1cf702b98d46358247585968542cf7&_e=gLr9KKwEI0m5rU4sK53MUGPCMLLShl22jSyq1hWzZIxCqz4_uLeJip8sMGCarO2tHzEitgOeW0Od8jQO7HdujxegE_TMeNqKeOtUJMXceYWvgkgv9EaK5QBT1JPOL1yQZjN9VznRS75YrfMZBM1mU06QhNBraGh7Z-_PmCo1089CJv9wSXcyuj9egDOJ5MaMv_CS6p8UYj16KvqyUVaFe-i45gUvhsJCECvQfp7ivcHeHwQsEoIdNtKyYSvko111snPxUZYwuE6GECzBlHR7rWvLBmj4mHeI6sONwsV1GjU9mgWFnjG8T6CfDmf611APDP0jPunZ6chW3PlQ2gnrArV7vK75DxNVkzCZkE726XGIjgLOefUa2v_x8fLuHanFNiwNs1VpNyiwfquP8AqiWA%3D%3D)

| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cd1cf702b98d46358247585968542cf7&_e=gLr9KKwEI0m5rU4sK53MUGPCMLLShl22jSyq1hWzZIxCqz4_uLeJip8sMGCarO2tHzEitgOeW0Od8jQO7HdujxegE_TMeNqKeOtUJMXceYWvgkgv9EaK5QBT1JPOL1yQZjN9VznRS75YrfMZBM1mU06QhNBraGh7Z-_PmCo1089CJv9wSXcyuj9egDOJ5MaMv_CS6p8UYj16KvqyUVaFe-i45gUvhsJCECvQfp7ivcEVonAsYR1jYDqeAU6_YtdlO7fzeyFXT8op09MwkJXn1N7z2LCusGD28Yr260CpOut2SnfFYUyNID8HhD7TqdYciP8oTkXnAIpZRVV1ADyNh7WnJhi54Ei1rCSWwpm0Cy1lJwFskZpzSKkvDDGXKamSu5K6QjldO66WIZC6kSkdmQ%3D%3D)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[**Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=cd1cf702b98d46358247585968542cf7&_e=gLr9KKwEI0m5rU4sK53MUGPCMLLShl22jSyq1hWzZIxCqz4_uLeJip8sMGCarO2tHzEitgOeW0Od8jQO7HdujxegE_TMeNqKeOtUJMXceYWvgkgv9EaK5QBT1JPOL1yQZjN9VznRS75YrfMZBM1mU06QhNBraGh7Z-_PmCo1089CJv9wSXcyuj9egDOJ5MaMv_CS6p8UYj16KvqyUVaFe-i45gUvhsJCECvQfp7ivcHOfxXmGgoZRAASLtQYszgfjG65UDrPRrLq9F3vhnvsZ4FcOGtCkN7Nt_KHQN6kE4FAKpnCFWulQiq3TXZogV7aLD19Ozzo2B5OcXc0vyeZbmCHdP7PA0gX8Mmi0cxG8FsDjCxYNR3md_Q2PDKHjoxvRzHYyhARWock-N-vYFccqA%3D%3D)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: The fight begins now
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
In just a few short days, Donald Trump will be inaugurated, and Day One of the new ULTRA-MAGA clown show begins.
Jim Jordan and his cronies will have free rein to push their dangerous agenda, and we know exactly what’s coming: chaos, division, and policies that hurt everyday Americans.
I won’t mince words – this is going to be a tough fight.
But you know me, I’m not backing down. I’ve got my sights set on holding Trump’s #1 crony, Jim Jordan, accountable for his years of failure and enabling ULTRA-MAGA extremism.
This is why I need you with me.
Will you contribute $25, $50, or more today? Every dollar helps us launch the next phase of our movement to stop Trump, Jordan and their harmful agenda in its tracks. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250115_mm_da_link1]
Let’s be clear: Jordan isn’t here to fight for everyday people.
He’s here to amplify Trump’s every whim and distract from the fact that he hasn’t accomplished anything for us in 18 years.
While they’re gearing up to shred our rights and destroy programs that working families, seniors, and veterans rely on, we’re preparing to push back and protect what matters most.
We know what we’re up against, and we’re ready to rise to the challenge.
Together, we’ll build a movement strong enough to hold these extremists accountable and remind them that the power lies with the people—not the ultra-wealthy or the elite.
So, will you chip in today to help us kick off the next phase strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20250115_mm_da_link2]
Let’s show them that we're paying attention and that we’re ready to fight back.
Thank you for being in this with me.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

[] Let’s be clear: Jordan isn’t here to fight for everyday people. He’s here to amplify Trump’s every whim and distract from the fact that he hasn’t accomplished anything for us in 18 years. While they’re gearing up to shred our rights and destroy programs that working families, seniors, and veterans rely on, we’re preparing to push back and protect what matters most. We know what we’re up against, and we’re ready to rise to the challenge. Together, we’ll build a movement strong enough to hold these extremists accountable and remind them that the power lies with the people—not the ultra-wealthy or the elite. So, will you chip in today to help us kick off the next phase strong? [] Let’s show them that we're paying attention and that we’re ready to fight back. Thank you for being in this with me. Working for US, Tamie Wilson alt [] Donate to Tamie Today [] ©2024 Tamie Wilson for US, all rights reserved To contribute via check, please address to: Tamie Wilson For US 273 Saratoga St Delaware, OH 43015 United States www.tamiewilson.com [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe:

name: Indiana Dems
subject: We’re the party fighting for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

Peter, The new state legislative session began last week, and Democrats have launched an agenda to put working families first, and protect them from corporate greed and Republican mismanagement. We’re calling for full transparency and accountability for the thousands of vulnerable Hoosiers who have lost their care because of bureaucratic incompetence by the Republican supermajority. Now Republicans want to punish these same Hoosiers for their own mistakes. **It’s unacceptable.** **[If you agree that no vulnerable Hoosier should wait for care when we have billions of dollars in surplus, chip into our efforts today. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100454570/522814818/405560545?refcode=250115working&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzA0NWE2Zi04OGQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_75RhD7EcbnPutF1HlHrElIl_9YH7a14NrH6R15xLQ=)** Instead of handouts to wealthy families to go to private schools, let’s fully fund pre-K access for every family in our state. Let’s support our community public schools, invest in child care, and put working families at the center. **[If you agree, chip into our grassroots fund today to help build a better Indiana.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100454571/522814819/405560545?refcode=250115working&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzA0NWE2Zi04OGQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_75RhD7EcbnPutF1HlHrElIl_9YH7a14NrH6R15xLQ=)** Thanks,

name: Bruna, United We Dream Action
subject: 6 million households will be affected by Trump’smass deportations
body:
Mass deportations cost people their jobs, families, and lives. | | | Peter, over six million households — **more than 22 million people** — will be affected by Donald Trump’s mass deportations. _It won’t just be those fleeing persecution at the border who will be affected, either._ Your children’s school teachers and undocumented classmates, your coworkers with temporary status, the woman who bags your groceries, the man who delivers packages to your doorstep, and your friends and neighbors will ALL be impacted. The reach of these deportations is massive and devastating. Already, Trump's allies in Congress are planning to waste taxpayer dollars by allocating a whopping**$100 billion for mass deportation** in the next spending bill. His authoritarian agenda will cost people their jobs, families, and lives. Politicians will not save us, Peter. The House just recently passed House Resolution 29 (HR 29), to indiscriminately target immigrant communities. **It will take all of us, including everyday Americans, to do something.** For the next four years, we’re going to be fighting a battle on so many different fronts: Stopping deportations, protecting our asylum systems, enforcing human rights at the border, organizing against anti-immigrant legislation, and more. **[We can’t do this work without the support of this team. We have to be ready for anything and everything. Pitch in to fuel the fight against Trump’s anti-immigrant extremism for the next four years right here:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDXOrxvu15qkfRG0mOl08vz9ix5rEjvpI7fI2gtZ0uExMbVWKO_PK8zyRfSK8BAZwfr40dALM6RWvwElWiKQNpx5CyeoKzK5q4rQ-Dgvfz3M60pexTMx5mZeNkqt303W5khIT96U5RNbsTIvGy9TVjHl4_DYowZANLQhldQfgFFe13hj0Whcra-10kpJSRCG1Hw2NJM5gARzUvz9xCyQsEwtnWnVAr06gtbgeu1iRMmjCeArP7upl1ETp7XH4pvJLJQxW2dQeDrmkgl0iF_ZNBf9NUJgbS39p2wN6feOhuj8oFB_nmkJDy8HXP5p8_XqHGD6eRoR_w332tZPSdzwp-LizMkpdyNQTscW0nBxNxpJOJqygIWp73_HPGYcbSLXu2Ckr7vYrgaXwnq7FKeh4mi7/4d6/P4h0PGerR7O2G9Zwx48CQQ/h0/h001._wjt9WPzajQ-X_TsKrWlo-Kwdqt_kp18B2DV2IN-Dd0)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDXOrxvu15qkfRG0mOl08vz9sUjYMeNuA0okAokS2iuUropR_w2Oqbl5d96_fGOdzDlIUEmP4CVwlJKfK-g_8FYZkZ5EYyGuKvHYnAFUjw6X0DExRaOi-0PkR5F8MMw3EtqvVjDSonINk7k6sVXSMope2rXAv_N17vLRDjWRgMf2jKUi2BLJXlEOl2m0zpCS9S1dLkXLy1M0gfifTlvG-sjckdnSlAvJB0XnOfPnzOswXW_t_7flBMrrLL6U8GrKstnJwrjUcF-UyC8MItDKlaXcmlNssEuE2oU8hTIAvXp2S5HiaP3UT4w8WcmjCGGjEWKEF4Ob_RuCwtK5DaQiXO91M0Af7lbElxqE1C3rneqMd7SV4JOXpu6higpTun8RKXbrABEpAumHt4LN-qTDDCQJX6ed3MG0JLLeMFblPwNsCtib5W-CH2eNPhh4vQahlkE/4d6/P4h0PGerR7O2G9Zwx48CQQ/h1/h001.WW3Eqd-Yw-9TuxBzAArgY_EA-iY5H1RsBDjjATe0o7A)

clean_body: Mass deportations cost people their jobs, families, and lives. | | | Peter, over six million households — more than 22 million people — will be affected by Donald Trump’s mass deportations. It won’t just be those fleeing persecution at the border who will be affected, either. Your children’s school teachers and undocumented classmates, your coworkers with temporary status, the woman who bags your groceries, the man who delivers packages to your doorstep, and your friends and neighbors will ALL be impacted. The reach of these deportations is massive and devastating. Already, Trump's allies in Congress are planning to waste taxpayer dollars by allocating a whopping$100 billion for mass deportation in the next spending bill. His authoritarian agenda will cost people their jobs, families, and lives. Politicians will not save us, Peter. The House just recently passed House Resolution 29 (HR 29), to indiscriminately target immigrant communities. It will take all of us, including everyday Americans, to do something. For the next four years, we’re going to be fighting a battle on so many different fronts: Stopping deportations, protecting our asylum systems, enforcing human rights at the border, organizing against anti-immigrant legislation, and more. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Collective acts of courage and love for one another are how we’ll defeat Trump’s agenda and move toward a future where all of us have the freedom to stay in our homes, to work, and to thrive. Thank you for taking part in our movement, Bruna, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m heartened to see so many folks step up to support wildfire recovery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39389%2E3422442%2E6u4mOi)
Derek,
The LA wildfires have been devastating and I know there’s a lot of dark and depressing news out there right now.
**But I’ve been so heartened to see that we’ve collectively raised more than $110,000 for wildfire victims and firefighters.** Thank you SO MUCH to every single person who chipped in. Here are the two organizations we have been able to support:
1\. **[The California Fire Foundation.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250115-wildfires?refcode=em20250115-39389&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39389_3422442_6u4mOi&akid=39389%2E3422442%2E6u4mOi)** This organization supports families of firefighters who are killed or injured in the line of duty. They also provide eligible fire victims with $250 gift cards so they can get essentials like clothing and groceries.
2\. **[California Community Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250115-wildfires?refcode=em20250115-39389&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39389_3422442_6u4mOi&akid=39389%2E3422442%2E6u4mOi)** This group supports underserved communities with short term emergency assistance and supports long term recovery.
**[If you are safe and able to do so, please split a donation to the California Fire Foundation and the California Community Foundation Wildfire Relief Fund. Your support today will help firefighters on the frontlines and families in need.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250115-wildfires?refcode=em20250115-39389&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39389_3422442_6u4mOi&akid=39389%2E3422442%2E6u4mOi)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250115-wildfires?refcode=em20250115-39389&refcode2=39389_3422442_6u4mOi&akid=39389%2E3422442%2E6u4mOi)
Thank you so much for your support of LA’s recovery,
Katie Porter

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people.
---

---

Pam Bondi, Trump's nominee for attorney general, **[clashed with Democrat Sen. Mazie Hirono](https://substack.com/redirect/538ccebe-a0c1-4453-8593-ca83dffdb4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during today's confirmation hearings over previous statements Trump has made.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/538ccebe-a0c1-4453-8593-ca83dffdb4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Trump has said that **['illegal immigration is poising the blood of our nation'...](https://substack.com/redirect/538ccebe-a0c1-4453-8593-ca83dffdb4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** do you agree with that statement?" Hirono asked Bondi.
Bondi began recounting the "horrific conditions she saw when she visited the border, adding a personal jab towards Hirono.
"I'm sure you've been to the border as well, so you know that," Bondi said sarcastically.
Hirono also pressed Bondi on what she would do if Trump asked her to investigate his political adversaries, to which Bondi responded by highlighting Hirono's refusal to meet with her before the hearing to discuss the matter.
"You were the only [senator] who refused to meet with me. We would've discussed this," Bondi stated.
Bondi emphasized **[her commitment to restoring integrity to the Justice Department,](https://substack.com/redirect/538ccebe-a0c1-4453-8593-ca83dffdb4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** promising, "If I am confirmed as attorney general, it will be my job to not only keep America safe but restore integrity to that department."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/538ccebe-a0c1-4453-8593-ca83dffdb4bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Pam Bondi REFUSES to take CRAP from Adam Schiff, humiliates him in front of America**
Pam Bondi **[utterly emasculated Sen. Adam Schiff](https://substack.com/redirect/c43e2107-89df-484f-9283-3e3ecfccb5fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a heated clash at today's confirmation hearing.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c43e2107-89df-484f-9283-3e3ecfccb5fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The confrontation came as Schiff questioned Bondi about potential investigations into former Special Counsel Jack Smith, who led federal probes against Trump. Bondi responded by emphasizing her commitment to facts over political motives, stating, "Senator, I haven't seen the file. I haven't seen the investigation, I haven't looked at anything. It would be irresponsible of me to make a commitment regarding anything without..."
**[Schiff, known for his Trump Derangement Syndrome, pressed further,](https://substack.com/redirect/c43e2107-89df-484f-9283-3e3ecfccb5fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** asking if she would investigate Smith. Bondi fired back by questioning the premise of his inquiry, "Are you aware of a factual predicate to investigate Jack Smith, yes or no?"
"Senator, what I'm hearing on the news is horrible. Do I know if he committed a crime? I have not looked at it," she added, maintaining her position that she would not pursue investigations without cause.
**[Watch the full battle below:](https://substack.com/redirect/c43e2107-89df-484f-9283-3e3ecfccb5fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c43e2107-89df-484f-9283-3e3ecfccb5fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Thanking my longtime friend, President Donald J. Trump
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4e9e0353-d7b2-4c86-8d7e-4dce67437e20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump posted a message of support for Giuliani, Sunday on Truth Social.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..uVZ9r2URRGCBHcJYvGB4YHJJGpYLJw7gXbb6t9WYXKI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=154911807)
In these tumultuous times, when so many in the political press and within the Democrat Party seem to be teaming up against me, it's comforting to know that I have friends who stand by me, unconditionally. I want to take this moment to express my deepest gratitude to Donald J. Trump, a man I've known for decades, and who has recently shown his unwavering support by posting "SAVE RUDY" on Truth Social.
Firstly, let me say, Mr. President, your gesture means more to me than you could possibly know. It's not just about the post; it's about the message it sends. It's about loyalty, something that's been the bedrock of our relationship from the very start. When I was the Mayor of New York City, you were there whenever we needed you. You understand the city's pulse, just as I did. We've walked through the streets of Manhattan together, not just as two New Yorkers, but as friends who shared a vision for a better, safer city...

"I'm sure you've been to the border as well... haven't you?" Bondi fired back at the democrat senator. | Jan 15 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Pam Bondi, Trump's nominee for attorney general, during today's confirmation hearings over previous statements Trump has made. "Trump has said that do you agree with that statement?" Hirono asked Bondi. Bondi began recounting the "horrific conditions she saw when she visited the border, adding a personal jab towards Hirono. "I'm sure you've been to the border as well, so you know that," Bondi said sarcastically. Hirono also pressed Bondi on what she would do if Trump asked her to investigate his political adversaries, to which Bondi responded by highlighting Hirono's refusal to meet with her before the hearing to discuss the matter. "You were the only [senator] who refused to meet with me. We would've discussed this," Bondi stated. Bondi emphasized promising, "If I am confirmed as attorney general, it will be my job to not only keep America safe but restore integrity to that department." Could Musk Be Eyeing Silver? | | ---|---|--- Elon Musk knows He sees the trends. The patterns. The moments others miss. And now, some experts suggest silver might be in his sights. Here's what's happening: Silver demand is surging, driven by tech and clean energy innovation. Supply chains are tightening, creating scarcity that could reshape markets. Some believe silver could become critical to industries Musk already leads. But if silver is the next big move, what does that mean for your savings There's a story unfolding here. One you don't want to miss. So if you're interested in that? Pam Bondi REFUSES to take CRAP from Adam Schiff, humiliates him in front of America Pam Bondi during a heated clash at today's confirmation hearing. The confrontation came as Schiff questioned Bondi about potential investigations into former Special Counsel Jack Smith, who led federal probes against Trump. Bondi responded by emphasizing her commitment to facts over political motives, stating, "Senator, I haven't seen the file. I haven't seen the investigation, I haven't looked at anything. It would be irresponsible of me to make a commitment regarding anything without..." asking if she would investigate Smith. Bondi fired back by questioning the premise of his inquiry, "Are you aware of a factual predicate to investigate Jack Smith, yes or no?" "Senator, what I'm hearing on the news is horrible. Do I know if he committed a crime? I have not looked at it," she added, maintaining her position that she would not pursue investigations without cause. Thanking my longtime friend, President Donald J. Trump By Rudy W. Giuliani** | | ---|---|--- Trump posted a message of support for Giuliani, Sunday on Truth Social. In these tumultuous times, when so many in the political press and within the Democrat Party seem to be teaming up against me, it's comforting to know that I have friends who stand by me, unconditionally. I want to take this moment to express my deepest gratitude to Donald J. Trump, a man I've known for decades, and who has recently shown his unwavering support by posting "SAVE RUDY" on Truth Social. Firstly, let me say, Mr. President, your gesture means more to me than you could possibly know. It's not just about the post; it's about the message it sends. It's about loyalty, something that's been the bedrock of our relationship from the very start. When I was the Mayor of New York City, you were there whenever we needed you. You understand the city's pulse, just as I did. We've walked through the streets of Manhattan together, not just as two New Yorkers, but as friends who shared a vision for a better, safer city... body:

#
---
Nomination hearings for Donald Trump’s incoming administration began yesterday. At the Senate Armed Services Committee, Mazie questioned _Fox News_ host and Trump loyalist Pete Hegseth, Trump’s pick for Secretary of Defense. Hegseth is astonishingly unqualified to serve in this role. He has faced allegations of workplace intoxication and sexual misconduct, and has stated on several occasions that women are not capable of serving in combat roles. **Yet he is just one of several unqualified MAGA loyalist yes-men that Trump has nominated to serve in his cabinet and other important government agencies.** Instead of nominating qualified individuals to these crucial positions, Trump has chosen a flurry of right-wing billionaires and yes-men who will greenlight his cruel and extreme agenda. body:
---

name: Tobias Read
subject: Thank you for everything. Now let’s get to work!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250115em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250115em]
I was honored to be sworn in as Oregon’s 30th Secretary of State last week.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250115em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250115em]
The past few years have shown that our democracy is fragile and must be constantly renewed. That starts by ensuring that government works for the people and delivers real, tangible results to improve Oregonians' daily lives.
My commitment as your Secretary of State is to help build the kind of government that Oregonians deserve—one that enables them to build the lives they want and earns their confidence not through words but through actions.
Over the next four years, I’ll focus on three key areas where we can make a difference together:
1. Protecting the integrity of our elections and encouraging full participation in our representative democracy.
2. Ensuring accountability to build a more efficient, transparent, and impactful government.
3. Facilitating a healthy democracy with robust participation across the aisle and from every walk of life.
But this moment isn’t about me or my agenda. It’s about you.
Thanks to you, we won this election. And thanks to you, we’ll continue to build a stronger Oregon for future generations. But our work isn’t finished.
I’m counting on each of you to be part of our larger team, reminding Oregonians that we need everyone coming in from the sidelines to build a better state. So, if you’re as ready as I am to get to work, can you help me keep Oregon moving forward by chipping in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250115em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250115em]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250115em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250115em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

body:
Extremists are ready to make due on their promises in 2025. Peter,

Now that I’ve been sworn into Congress and am officially representing MO-01 in the House, the real work has begun.

It’s an incredible honor to serve you in Washington, but let me tell you — things have been busy. **That’s why this is the only email I’m sending ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline.**

Peter, here’s the deal: Extremists – _including some of my new colleagues_ – are already plotting how to stall progress and set the stage for Trump's second term as president.

Republicans will stop at nothing to impose their dangerous MAGA agenda. That means we really can’t afford to slow down. My team and I have set a crucial mid-month fundraising goal to raise $8,500 by midnight tomorrow to stay on track. clean_body: Extremists are ready to make due on their promises in 2025. Peter, Now that I’ve been sworn into Congress and am officially representing MO-01 in the House, the real work has begun. It’s an incredible honor to serve you in Washington, but let me tell you — things have been busy. That’s why this is the only email I’m sending ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline. Peter, here’s the deal: Extremists – including some of my new colleagues – are already plotting how to stall progress and set the stage for Trump's second term as president. Republicans will stop at nothing to impose their dangerous MAGA agenda. That means we really can’t afford to slow down. My team and I have set a crucial mid-month fundraising goal to raise $8,500 by midnight tomorrow to stay on track. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for your continued support, Wesley = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s prosecuting Trump AND my husband
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac7763b15e92411e9ea29f3bfad65fb9&_e=hf_9k-VHuhRllgnnT4b6J0FLhWmPj6cLyS-WTXqnji15y4oxU-C3VoKY7mkIXVBKopDzlF1dtneB2vlnYCHUUpGUXhlz6zRN8FVr1ql05uZhVaPjfKmQtYrlVbVAPCpr0YTCMGtnlqOPbiabnKo__050jyq-bap1M8cMLD0r59Lw_Hzs3tt3_ZYTDeuBxAJAIygXWKvbKFH6HnOONMs-zee5hLdLTyIZc6BqhAxa3MKB7R54VVLxeTSiFXhPb90HbpQ0RjnlbleXnWX3p6a5z5yEO27QkWlxujCpJFm0h0rqdHQY2V5KifApid9Wh8PrLKXbEspeWtamX2CwR4OijQ0f1sMJTbqtXYS75JcGxKEXJFLOottA4CZLv25tfz30)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac7763b15e92411e9ea29f3bfad65fb9&_e=hf_9k-VHuhRllgnnT4b6J0FLhWmPj6cLyS-WTXqnji15y4oxU-C3VoKY7mkIXVBKopDzlF1dtneB2vlnYCHUUpGUXhlz6zRN8FVr1ql05uZhVaPjfKmQtYrlVbVAPCpr0YTCMGtnlqOPbiabnKo__050jyq-bap1M8cMLD0r59Lw_Hzs3tt3_ZYTDeuBxAJAIygXWKvbKFH6HnOONMs-zee5hLdLTyIZc6BqhAxa3MLxv6tTt3D0VL3nJwigms3Toq0WB0IinoMHVFgZCndE044sq_V4CZWTlbQYP7K9OiPflhCGke6g30cMX_YkvfcGhe99DxrjMdGnJ1Z9fv5G__cMz4wPxkvvP-O_mqwRxjDbvl7ayT1krtVugmvtQzLd)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac7763b15e92411e9ea29f3bfad65fb9&_e=hf_9k-VHuhRllgnnT4b6J0FLhWmPj6cLyS-WTXqnji15y4oxU-C3VoKY7mkIXVBKopDzlF1dtneB2vlnYCHUUpGUXhlz6zRN8FVr1ql05uZhVaPjfKmQtYrlVbVAPCpr0YTCMGtnlqOPbiabnKo__050jyq-bap1M8cMLD0r59Lw_Hzs3tt3_ZYTDeuBxAJAIygXWKvbKFH6HnOONMs-zee5hLdLTyIZc6BqhAxa3MKns-cH56X01pGj2jfJ_PMqIcYRX7Tm8r2csnLYyiAmlcPP1JUgQGz_R_G9AIWjPpnsb7g1htyQCimb7x9UgvInWti_jzBWP6NejvvD3v8wy-0G69vV-7P_fAjOVv8ZLjT9kJhXHsbrbgRbDMK6cFR2)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac7763b15e92411e9ea29f3bfad65fb9&_e=hf_9k-VHuhRllgnnT4b6J0FLhWmPj6cLyS-WTXqnji15y4oxU-C3VoKY7mkIXVBKopDzlF1dtneB2vlnYCHUUpGUXhlz6zRN8FVr1ql05uZhVaPjfKmQtYrlVbVAPCpr0YTCMGtnlqOPbiabnKo__050jyq-bap1M8cMLD0r59Lw_Hzs3tt3_ZYTDeuBxAJAIygXWKvbKFH6HnOONMs-zee5hLdLTyIZc6BqhAxa3MKyEwBsfrHbdGwlwKH-AWfGs6BxDyjWRvIXySBe7GZn6EL6_MhaWeqEdmlSwEyHUCz-YQH1jcFb_H8AImYtGDQGmo5sX3cY4QOcHXxp9FAYBhLhfsOcMGLKDKK3eMOR8aTz4NtalOOMY9IxAxrdZeJE)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac7763b15e92411e9ea29f3bfad65fb9&_e=hf_9k-VHuhRllgnnT4b6J0FLhWmPj6cLyS-WTXqnji15y4oxU-C3VoKY7mkIXVBKopDzlF1dtneB2vlnYCHUUpGUXhlz6zRN8FVr1ql05uZhVaPjfKmQtYrlVbVAPCpr0YTCMGtnlqOPbiabnKo__050jyq-bap1M8cMLD0r59Lw_Hzs3tt3_ZYTDeuBxAJAIygXWKvbKFH6HnOONMs-zee5hLdLTyIZc6BqhAxa3MJWBj53m9qCV9wENx5OM2TEMPXAoMKrc5vD5FX0dt2abvZrlQArcBxKsmYm3VA0tQqPydeIV6zum0hCk61cfIpPUI5BA4rBqvaFsLAaACLS_JO1qi8buAG7HIALHbTBcyeeyXxCiWho8aIt01yyEXVj)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac7763b15e92411e9ea29f3bfad65fb9&_e=hf_9k-VHuhRllgnnT4b6J0FLhWmPj6cLyS-WTXqnji15y4oxU-C3VoKY7mkIXVBKopDzlF1dtneB2vlnYCHUUpGUXhlz6zRN8FVr1ql05uZhVaPjfKmQtYrlVbVAPCpr0YTCMGtnlqOPbiabnKo__050jyq-bap1M8cMLD0r59Lw_Hzs3tt3_ZYTDeuBxAJAIygXWKvbKFH6HnOONMs-zee5hLdLTyIZc6BqhAxa3MLHTfo22k9NfdrLRO6GLv8ZtiHhp2WNp4aNRusya_B5gWWz1mqRYJyhT4QaSU1OuGdY8k693B_vhEZ3YjCZWxFhiXg1IBs1LogxzcvCfZoDbGZG-S3hYMMKcKmyt5zBD3-T5iRSco30TBp1uZNkPa71)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ac7763b15e92411e9ea29f3bfad65fb9&_e=hf_9k-VHuhRllgnnT4b6J0FLhWmPj6cLyS-WTXqnji15y4oxU-C3VoKY7mkIXVBKopDzlF1dtneB2vlnYCHUUpGUXhlz6zRN8FVr1ql05uZhVaPjfKmQtYrlVbVAPCpr0YTCMGtnlqOPbiabnKo__050jyq-bap1M8cMLD0r59Lw_Hzs3tt3_ZYTDeuBxAJAIygXWKvbKFH6HnOONMs-zee5hLdLTyIZc6BqhAxa3MIpbeEFFAWsp7VHuvih7FWWECwvvjozCn2ydy_4OIuA6y3Mn_CqA6DhO6sO0ffkLYBPdBUmT56OXdxkOd2dRLYkFJWyFrXMeMM_klqzpsyck5q5QvI6J9WejQy-FkLfTllj8bvVsMML56levtX0SAbP)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
