clean_body: Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Dear Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! name: Diane Sare
subject: Mobilize Your U.S. Senators: Confirm Gabbard and Patel!
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240115_liars&n=1)

| Friend – In the coming days, the U.S. Senate will be holding hearings to confirm President-Elect Donald Trump’s choices for important posts within his administration. Former FBI and CIA Director William Webster (of "Iran-contra" notoriety and sworn enemy of Lyndon LaRouche) has recently written to members of the U.S. Senate urging them to reject the nominations of **Tulsi Gabbard** for Director of National Intelligence and **Kash Patel** for Director of the FBI. Clearly, since he is 100 years old, he must feel very strongly about preventing these appointments! **The LaRouche Organization has therefore just released a white paper,["The Liars’ Bureau"](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXYvEBvw1V4YzP41gFotuQMtXvxK6p2WV5A7S3POuthfc&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240115_liars&n=2), answering the question "Who wants to block the confirmations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel, and what are they trying to hide?"** As president of the LaRouche Organization and as a United States citizen who has had immediate family members deployed in Iraq in the U.S. Army, I would ask you to think deeply about how you would explain to the family members of the nearly 5,000 U.S. soldiers who were killed in that war why their loved ones died. Why did members of congress vote to send them into a war, which former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi admitted years later, was not only based on a lie, but it was a lie that the “Gang of Four,” including herself on the House Intelligence Committee, knew was a lie at the time it was told? Many people in the U.S. intelligence community knew at the time that lies were being told to justify a war which not only would kill thousands of Americans, and hundreds of thousands of Iraqis, but which would change the political landscape in the Middle East for generations to come, displacing millions of people and creating a breeding ground for terrorist organizations. But they persisted in these lies, even doubling down to protect their false narrative by creating more wars, and doing greater harm to the safety and reputation of the United States. Not only did they lie about Iraq’s possession of “weapons of mass destruction,” they lied about Libya, and specifically Benghazi. They lied about Syrian President Assad using chemical weapons. They lied about the Russians hacking the DNC server, and they were emboldened so much by the lack of any pushback from our august representatives, who should have been holding hearings and conducting investigations, that 51 of these people even signed a public letter saying that the very real Hunter Biden laptop was a Russian pre-election ploy. Let's boldly challenge our representatives in the U.S. Senate: Why on earth would you listen to any of these people, whose lies have literally killed thousands of Americans, and irreparably harmed or even ended the lives of millions of people around the world, when it comes to selecting a Director of National Intelligence or a Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation? Both former Congresswoman Lt Col. Tulsi Gabbard and former federal prosecutor Kash Patel have had the courage to stand against the tide of manipulated public opinion to question the narratives which have proven to be very harmful to the well-being of our people and our Republic. This is what qualifies them both to serve in the posts for which President-Elect Donald Trump has nominated them. A speedy confirmation of Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence and Kash Patel as Director of the FBI would be the appropriate response to the wailing and gnashing of teeth coming from people who have a lot to hide. I am confident that most Americans agree with me._**[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXYvEBvw1V4YzP41gFotuQMtXvxK6p2WV5A7S3POuthfc&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240115_liars&n=3)**_
### What you can do:
Locate the local offices of both **[U.S Senators](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6NLhla_0SV3yQ4GD29XidHF4JffQZjfz-3lD0_it3SB_kwUQBlIWwBevyAKFKjUr&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240115_liars&n=4) ** in your state as well as the phone numbers and email addresses of their Washington D.C. offices. **For the local offices:** Print out the PDF copy of the report and hand deliver it to the staff at the local offices near you. **For the Washington offices** : Call both your senators' offices in Washington and email them the PDF copy of the report. | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0oVnr8Kx-L0MD1TUz4DI27ij19CZN2rKCP6NUsdJ93DPJlO_jUn7fWDGtCnRHIYi3uAwefChQRYekI1wEQiMDCvQ&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240115_liars&n=5 "DOWNLOAD ") [DOWNLOAD "THE LIARS BUREAU" PDF](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0oVnr8Kx-L0MD1TUz4DI27ij19CZN2rKCP6NUsdJ93DPJlO_jUn7fWDGtCnRHIYi3uAwefChQRYekI1wEQiMDCvQ&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240115_liars&n=6)

body:
The photos and videos from Southern California are heartbreaking.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100456756/522822201/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ0MzdhOC05MWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oHIYe-fNvSWW5lcaB9kfK9fqz1aDLmj70VcCuUUIhpI=&emci=3e549240-85d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=9ad437a8-91d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=7731215)

| | Over the last week, the Los Angeles area has been devastated by catastrophic, destructive wildfires, and they're still fighting to contain them today. The photos and videos from Southern California are heartbreaking. Seeing them took me back to our 2020 Labor Day fires here in Oregon, where I traveled 600 miles and never got out of the smoke, saw towns, homes, and businesses burned to the ground, and sat with families who had to flee for their safety. Deep gratitude to the first responders—especially those who traveled from Oregon to help—who are working tirelessly to protect communities, and to the volunteers and community members who are providing support to those impacted. We need to address why these natural disasters are becoming more severe. The Earth is warming, and weather is becoming more and more unpredictable. Places like Southern California and Oregon are ripe for more fires and destructive weather if we do not act. **Scientists keep sounding the alarm as the Earth's temperature continues to rise, and the increasing frequency and severity of natural disasters each year are clear signals that we are not doing enough to address climate chaos.** Climate chaos is creating longer, hotter, and more severe fire seasons across Oregon and the West, and we need our communities to be prepared. I'm working in the Senate to pass bills that would protect our communities like the Wildfire Resilient Communities Act. [**In the meantime, if you'd like to help out, here are a few ways you can help the people in the Los Angeles area recover from these horrific fires by clicking here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100456757/522822202/1607476452?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ0MzdhOC05MWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oHIYe-fNvSWW5lcaB9kfK9fqz1aDLmj70VcCuUUIhpI=&emci=3e549240-85d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=9ad437a8-91d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=7731215) Thank you, _Jeff_ |

clean_body: The photos and videos from Southern California are heartbreaking. | | | | Over the last week, the Los Angeles area has been devastated by catastrophic, destructive wildfires, and they're still fighting to contain them today. The photos and videos from Southern California are heartbreaking. Seeing them took me back to our 2020 Labor Day fires here in Oregon, where I traveled 600 miles and never got out of the smoke, saw towns, homes, and businesses burned to the ground, and sat with families who had to flee for their safety. Deep gratitude to the first responders—especially those who traveled from Oregon to help—who are working tirelessly to protect communities, and to the volunteers and community members who are providing support to those impacted. We need to address why these natural disasters are becoming more severe. The Earth is warming, and weather is becoming more and more unpredictable. Places like Southern California and Oregon are ripe for more fires and destructive weather if we do not act. Scientists keep sounding the alarm as the Earth's temperature continues to rise, and the increasing frequency and severity of natural disasters each year are clear signals that we are not doing enough to address climate chaos. Climate chaos is creating longer, hotter, and more severe fire seasons across Oregon and the West, and we need our communities to be prepared. I'm working in the Senate to pass bills that would protect our communities like the Wildfire Resilient Communities Act. Thank you, Jeff | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

Donald Trump’s inauguration is next Monday, so you could say we’re feeling just a *tad* apprehensive.
#
Donald Trump’s inauguration is next Monday, so you could say we’re feeling just a *tad* apprehensive. 😅
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250115?refcode=em20250115-1694&amount=5&refcode2=1694_21716_kPALd3&akid=1694%2E21716%2EkPALd3)
Here’s the thing about Trump though: Despite all his bizarre and reckless stunts, he doesn’t actually have any policy solutions for the challenges facing Americans. That’s why Sarah’s work in Congress is so important.
**While Trump grandstands, Sarah is fighting for workers, protecting retirees, and working to lower costs for everyday Delawareans.**
Last week Sarah became the first freshman Democrat to introduce a bill in the new Congress. She’s already hard at work — and she needs your help to keep going, _especially_ with Trump back in office.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: A temporary ceasefire is both long overdue and simply not enough.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It was just announced that a ceasefire agreement has been reached:

A temporary ceasefire is both long overdue and simply not enough.

For Palestinians facing genocide to finally get a break from Israel's
bombing and for hostages to be reunited with their families is something
to celebrate.

But there's no justification that a ceasefire did not come 15 months
earlier to save countless more lives.

The Israeli government was never going to stop this genocide until every
Palestinian life was lost and they annexed an entire nation.

It was always clear that pressure from its biggest weapons supplier was
the greatest path we had to end this violence. Instead, the Biden
administration continued to arm them with billions more in bombs and
weapons.

Even waiting until January 19 gives the Israeli military 4 more days to
wreak havoc on an already obliterated Gaza and occupied West Bank. The US
must ensure they don't.

There's no military solution to this conflict, this is made even clearer
after Israel achieved none of its alleged goals.

What must come immediately is rapidly sending aid to the Palestinian
people, rebuilding of critical infrastructure in Gaza, holding war
criminals accountable at the ICC, a return of all Palestinian and Israeli
hostages to their families and homes, and preventing death for the
millions still at risk—including restoring US funding to UNRWA and
ensuring they can enter the Gaza Strip.

This conflict won't end as long as Israel is allowed to govern as an
apartheid state, occupy and annex the West Bank, blockade Gaza, enable
settler violence, and receive a blank check from US taxpayers.

The Palestinian people deserve a permanent ceasefire and freedom once and
for all.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250115-36326-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36326_1203867_GSxWyw&akid=36326%2E1203867%2EGSxWyw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36326%2E1203867%2EGSxWyw

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Hi, Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee –

I wanted to send you one last message before my first fundraising deadline of the year at midnight.

This may not be how we pictured 2025 would look like. Donald Trump is days away from taking office, Republicans in Congress have a majority in the House and the Senate, and the future looks unclear.

Despite the challenges we face, I will never give up on delivering lasting solutions for my constituents. That means funding our education system, protecting the right to choose, and securing funding to prepare North Carolina for the future.

If those issues matter to you, then I need your help. [My campaign’s mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and right now we’re short of our $5,000 goal. name: George Latimer
subject: We aren’t backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=HGL9cw259bNnLn9IpZrm3h%2BqIqisieBLs6AmQlcdnEwI%2F9qwb%2BWr8K0nrwyhULnLOz8hECC8vVyTLNfrnQIUiYADY4rF40UnPBmzEKQSSb436P0bjRTbj%2Bt2XDg3evhAA55RJREl1ieiCbYjaUdahQLeFxBIwP9KMpmSx4fUWzu2cqTjOXd1YMrBLAMRdUOc2XLTk2qvENoMR%2FOP1R%2FstNUk6m0PoNWS3SLoxCEwJlsaLSaSxZbGADxTZX2EunpFiuj823jky8%2FKrqipA3LvkK%2FSIGoyOyxxQAj5okTyzm6nluwJdx0jN85Y88O27KafaWw3%2Fck5aVllQjMD0fj%2Bo1nKbI%2BS9pMU1J%2FtRhtzvtF9eu%2B70R4jxCIsjT71EtcpLWIFpxDZ5jesnCaxbaJLf3rNaGfxuWC4yDljq01gP7SVtUs08hjSlYECLfbN%2F8iY]

# [#]
Peter, it’s George. I wanted to personally reach out one more time before our first fundraising deadline of 2025 at midnight tonight.

The GOP’s House majority is paper-thin. That means every single seat counts, and they can’t afford to lose any in 2026 — so they’re going to go ALL-IN on spending to try and hold onto their majority and expand it.

Tonight’s fundraising deadline is our first opportunity of 2025 to show that our movement is strong, and that we aren’t backing down, which is why I’m asking you to make a contribution and become a 2025 founding donor before tonight’s deadline.

So, if you can, will you please chip in $ or any amount to become a 2025 founding donor before midnight?

Here’s a link you can use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-jan25?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-jan25?amount=]

Thank you for your time,

George
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. From architects of Project 2025 to election deniers and extremists — Trump’s unqualified picks are a threat to the future of our democracy. And it’s not just about filling positions — it’s about his plans to reshape our country in ways that undermine equality, stability, and our democracy.

Trump wants to hand control of our military to Pete Hegseth, a former Fox News host, and put RFK jr., an anti-vaxxer with no medical qualifications, in charge of protecting our nation’s health. These reckless nominations aren’t just misguided—they’re dangerous.

We need better leaders at the helm of our most important institutions—stewards who will guide us towards progress, not tear it down. [_Sign on today if you agree that our nation deserves leaders who work for us, not against us →_](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38pcR1fykN8wkh47gDz94GeSWYP7ejEJCRznvgMnh5kTp1o_uOu53ncr9fD57B9IpsCTppijWrruWKCPnRV2MA23xDeM9DI2fLmVf3IbzigKf4VYLCj3wYk6HM-lHaQwlktAUAo9A-8CI9oXbDsv4OkOYujndFa-gx8Lil54T_LIuNlaCSBkyQGm_2ITQYWqMX_Dn-929QYhobR8wtF9PmERZdnsgpj-jl4ldT_1ICnc3RVk6ioMmIeBHAtTC_9HB4bQ800RXc3K23VL_IZpRFMbl4uq8e9NAUiumAgAFHbzY8DYxM75BqqlXnVCP8P1H4/4d6/Ohj2dl50TFKeaREzlXD1Uw/h2/h001.tNvkqqBE-wZSfX6D0VNYtmQBartCqUP0Iegdle1S2ZU) ** | | [SIGN ON→](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38pcR1fykN8wkh47gDz94GeSWYP7ejEJCRznvgMnh5kTp1o_uOu53ncr9fD57B9IpsCTppijWrruWKCPnRV2MA23xDeM9DI2fLmVf3IbzigKf4VYLCj3wYk6HM-lHaQwlnD3XH8PPV2FUjbtU9O_DEB7NjFusxLUPKrpbv4AHt2dIyots_ox80H0ZTRsyqtlwU5jzJzYXMAkKlvz2bcADy78t_dX7nx080Ccbx5CcBzZPvVCDroIs8PsR2werSUOzUWIIRGxsC1kII-N9NdMesdsXKIVbezoNVlaKEdF1xZJt6ZNm7I1BLwgPqOP3n73ug/4d6/Ohj2dl50TFKeaREzlXD1Uw/h3/h001.wVuiOgxDOt7lUgD167hGCcTXMu9WTf0xryMuZSYPzWU)

**Let’s fight for the future our country deserves.

— The Collective PAC **
* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPpKbs5gvJMH2zLywJTtNKP366VGPUukmZafuDAmQ-DjK4pyCdPva434JLaNdTriwvDDWUrb2oacNkAkgUXk5XX7I-prFZTKDgwHyCVR24swKLS6meXLpG9YdCCJET9ISbvK6M2DX2bppOGyjTa6N21H0df_TXjEpiYnUFHobWR2cAdiFC2jtesb8TqEg1IUkHOKnBg3qYW1DNYO5ov5xG-yh7c9JmjRLPKy6F75ABN-cBTM8MyzraugS8ArKbXsiLjb8LkGFSnTosaydPqOd5lFcMijozHG24eyWfs6vdxf6IKio2HkzRmzYKVSrt3BhyE/4d6/Ohj2dl50TFKeaREzlXD1Uw/h4/h001.BKw3fBn-0guFwlwjkTQMursPK_K86ig22lmiv1CImq8) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Can you believe who Trump and the Republicans are trying to put in charge, Peter? From architects of Project 2025 to election deniers and extremists — Trump’s unqualified picks are a threat to the future of our democracy. And it’s not just about filling positions — it’s about his plans to reshape our country in ways that undermine equality, stability, and our democracy. Trump wants to hand control of our military to Pete Hegseth, a former Fox News host, and put RFK jr., an anti-vaxxer with no medical qualifications, in charge of protecting our nation’s health. These reckless nominations aren’t just misguided—they’re dangerous. We need better leaders at the helm of our most important institutions—stewards who will guide us towards progress, not tear it down. | | Let’s fight for the future our country deserves. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . body:
Unacceptable

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100457846/522825658/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVmYmJkMjItOTVkMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f6a1ZTsPTPp1Ov_-klQYdaI6ukZPAWU1YwcSqz-c6xU=) | Peter, The wildfires in Southern California continue to rage on, and the damage has been nothing short of devastating. Entire communities have been destroyed. People have lost their homes and their livelihoods. **And Donald Trump has decided to play politics - it’s absolutely disgusting. Emergency disaster funding should NEVER be a pawn in political games. Our California communities need help just like all other states have in the past.** Here on Team Harder we're sickened at how Republicans, led by Trump, have been talking about this tragedy. It doesn't help the victims, it just perpetuates MAGA's nastiness. **[This is no time for political games. Sign our petition to tell Donald Trump and Mike Johnson to leave politics out of this!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100457847/522825659/-1127095106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVmYmJkMjItOTVkMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f6a1ZTsPTPp1Ov_-klQYdaI6ukZPAWU1YwcSqz-c6xU=&emci=37e1e5ea-52d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2efbbd22-95d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652)** [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100457848/522825660/-1127095106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVmYmJkMjItOTVkMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f6a1ZTsPTPp1Ov_-klQYdaI6ukZPAWU1YwcSqz-c6xU=&emci=37e1e5ea-52d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2efbbd22-95d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652) Peter, when people are dealing with a devastating natural disaster, there should be no room for politics. **It shouldn’t matter whether you live in a red state or a blue state. When people are in need, our government has a duty to pass relief funding as quickly as possible. It’s cruel and inhumane to let people suffer for political motives.** **[If you’re as outraged as we are, please add your name to our petition and tell Trump to leave politics out of this!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100457849/522825665/-1127095106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVmYmJkMjItOTVkMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f6a1ZTsPTPp1Ov_-klQYdaI6ukZPAWU1YwcSqz-c6xU=&emci=37e1e5ea-52d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2efbbd22-95d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6455652)** \- Team Harder

Fifteen days into 2025, we’ve already seen our first big election in Virginia. Two of our endorsed Democracy Defenders — Kannan Srinivasan and JJ Singh — won special elections to help Democrats keep control of the state legislature and fend off a Republican trifecta.
As Attorney General Eric Holder said, _“This election underscores the continuing historical fact that the fight for our democracy is never over — as long as the people continue to participate.”_
**With a state supreme court election in Wisconsin right around the corner — and more races in Virginia and Pennsylvania this fall — we must keep working all year long to elect Democracy Defenders. **
[**The NDRC supports candidates who will protect our rights and strengthen our democracy. clean_body: Will you make an urgent donation to help power our efforts nationwide? | Peter, Most people don't consider odd-numbered years to be election years. But as a dedicated member of this grassroots team, you understand that state-level elections are happening this year, and they are vital for our democracy. From Virginia to Wisconsin to Pennsylvania, 2025 will be critical to our 10 Year Plan to win fair maps — and the candidates we endorse will be counting on the support of this grassroots team. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Fifteen days into 2025, we’ve already seen our first big election in Virginia. Two of our endorsed Democracy Defenders — Kannan Srinivasan and JJ Singh — won special elections to help Democrats keep control of the state legislature and fend off a Republican trifecta. As Attorney General Eric Holder said, “This election underscores the continuing historical fact that the fight for our democracy is never over — as long as the people continue to participate.” With a state supreme court election in Wisconsin right around the corner — and more races in Virginia and Pennsylvania this fall — we must keep working all year long to elect Democracy Defenders. = — NDRC Election Watch = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: It’s time to get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Fasten your seatbelts! We’re about to blast off!

| | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,**Fasten your seatbelts!** _We’re about to blast off on a mission to restore American strength and prosperity the likes of which this federal city hasn’t seen in generations._ Even before the Inauguration, our new Republican Majority has already been reshaping global politics:
* Last month, Mexico staged the biggest seizure of fentanyl in history
* Just today, it’s being reported that Hamas has agreed to a ceasefire
* And, also today, the stock market rose by more than 700 points – a resounding vote of confidence from the business community.

**Frankly, it’s exciting to be in the center of things.** After being sworn in on January 3, it’s been a whirlwind of activity – meeting other Members of Congress, securing assignments on the Foreign Affairs, Judiciary, and Education and Workforce Committees. The Big Spending, Big Government lobbyists and insiders have been put on notice that it’s a new day in Washington and their antics are not going to work anymore. _If it raises prices for the American people, tangles up healthcare in more red tape, or makes our national defense more expensive and inefficient, it has no place here._**I am pleased to report that one of my very first votes in Congress was to help pass the Laken Riley Act - a bill that allows law enforcement to move quickly against undocumented criminals.** With the Inauguration just five days away, there is a long list of priorities I need to work on with the new Administration. I have already signed on to a bill to require the “Remain in Mexico” effort to be reinstated – so asylum seekers stay on the southern side of the border. There is more coming to seal the border and stop the flow of illegal drugs.**Last night I had dinner with Judiciary Chairman Jim Jordan**. I can tell you that he is serious about passing legislation to restore safety and civility to American cities.
---
| I did have time to get home for the weekend and hold a listening town hall meeting – the first of the dozens I have planned for the next two years. **I work for you and I want to hear from you!**[**It’s time to get to work! If you agree with my priorities, will you send some support to my campaign?**](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=380ddcb1d6&e=5a45b9550e) _There’s much more to be done!_ In addition to border security and immigration reform, I’ll be advocating for tax cuts and clawing back regulations so we can get our economy back on track. Lastly, I’ll make sure that in all discussions of energy policy, government officials celebrate our clean hydropower - instead of the absurd and damaging talk about breaching our dams!It may seem early, but the more donations I have in my account, the more I can focus on my work in Congress. Republicans have a very, very slim majority and I promise you that the Democrats are already drawing up maps and starting to plot which districts they’re going to target for 2026. Typically, they start by going after freshman members. I am going to keep my name off their lists by starting early and beginning to amass support now! [Your online donation, no matter how large or small, would be a big help!](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=b140b33e86&e=5a45b9550e)**Thanks so much! I’ll be fighting for our shared conservative values every day!** Sincerely,
---
| P.S. It is the honor of a lifetime to be representing Eastern Washington in Congress!
---
[DONATE](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=1f3a358abe&e=5a45b9550e)
|
---
| Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203
---
| | | | | | | | You can [update your preferences](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&e=5a45b9550e&c=133774cf25) or [unsubscribe](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=62bfedeea6&t=b&e=5a45b9550e&c=133774cf25)
---
|
---
|

name: State Dems HQ (via DLCC.org)
subject: What can we say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Electing state Dems is more important than ever. The fight for our future is happening in the states, and it’s happening now. Is there anything we can say to convince you to support state Democrats? | | |
---
| |
---|---
**With only six days until Donald Trump takes office, is there anything we can say to convince you to** [make a gift of $7 to support state Democrats? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZlxREBaN--bZkmJC37ykJpa3Q_EOpw1MfeayczG2YxqwHvtHIfMizxlDliifvOrmUv6PD4x7juJknzobeD-hGZ3pju3LFqrLfGsvFqwE-E9VFmTsA4TU8XKA1A2SAkPXAfdR31twE0bvVReE1CQHUpLjCabmf2CNXnC-PlWtFaR8x-7SGwm4DxnEipaH1hT9DPP9juP6zgOQAhkR_ndCqO-G-hmXeTPwTTRW2rNRmJkGicpnXM16eVenR6gU98KW-IbVIQ50_61jxmnSeXui2YxnMifSvMGLdK7dqp5lR9J7_D-X6KEONd-G42jFJhmap-QjJP6RsU1Uc-bbRF5KdQjbtl9CpwutdxS7cFHXzzRMFVVvZ1lhMnGmPFjz_gnGZYr-V3NDVCXKFdqVaNJnkQGUHtiy01JQl8EQmo_RAlHg72G_CdtrFcoT924gHOjVa0QPHuwrid1rHaPbGFay3o6I7vQe22YprOw7EZ1QshH5/4d6/49fl9jttTqulW118VpSrCA/h0/h001.FmTa52kkq4_GXGOTiPdtHTcBicIpMnIgHQKITfSn_xY) What if we told you that we needed to win in upcoming special elections in states like Minnesota to defend Democratic-held seats and fend off a GOP takeover? What if we told you state legislatures are the building blocks of our democracy – and that the far-right is using our statehouses as a path to undermine our sacred institutions? What if we told you right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk could pour _millions_ to compete for chamber control because they know the power and impact of this level of the ballot? What if we told you the only way to block the GOP from pushing their extreme agenda in the states is to elect state Democrats who will block their dangerous attacks on our fundamental freedoms? **And what if we told you we can’t secure victories in upcoming elections without you on our grassroots team?** [If we told you all that, would you chip in $7 to help fund our work?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZlxREBaN--bZkmJC37ykJpa3Q_EOpw1MfeayczG2YxqwHvtHIfMizxlDliifvOrmUv6PD4x7juJknzobeD-hGZ3pju3LFqrLfGsvFqwE-E9VFmTsA4TU8XKA1A2SAkPXAfDpjgBGAuAkM8yjtz0K98SpjhTFlKT6ANmg4RD3ZnTbjptB1x6t7FiIrdpuGl1zgdsAfgd5rFgm7KLEkpqtBMQgNXZRH4CnEtAOBo0RX_KzfEXpWT_H_sTasNcOi5LXDyc7vHgF2q9jNDG6LXhr2Tr1l_pNBap-uepwNcubA8iWk8r8C1EFZVAr8qWXs7KAAKg-VHC4EolXdAtpqKyiSh85kvKM1SJaWbKFbaDEMv9qMuL7Jr3jypiq06sDmj9szZ0laCbeVj-Wp_q8dXlDghRa6aE6-9S3Z4UCE_DwCGt6IQqy08iYXGDuHuFrAI2LtzH7ONHmsmpvyJ96_dNqHZejlLGOKtKbkr6pJbI7NFvo/4d6/49fl9jttTqulW118VpSrCA/h1/h001.ytEztYnp8xwiZvr2KQ_OdT46HMPu7-AKXi--45znkOM) **[Send $7 now »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPfr0A4dBpd_CC4Uqnpn8KTZlxREBaN--bZkmJC37ykJpa3Q_EOpw1MfeayczG2YxqwHvtHIfMizxlDliifvOrmUv6PD4x7juJknzobeD-hGZ3pju3LFqrLfGsvFqwE-E9VFmTsA4TU8XKA1A2SAkPXAZK9_szshUygSfFRL9Jheh_44857-dXLQ9jvmu-qdCFYbIErw450TCJ-xne8iN4zmGpbmFwJQIdEbnwbSnkBc8B9fA9OdhUdOh3xyFIIbaK1eDGDjf4YXfK5XSJV9oGwhkRfJJSzFJ-1Hw0EurtWH1VitjnQGTGtOnmS3XSbBeOvwCQyWtIbvjjN1fuqVicUaSsGSoLkr3WJ1C-lpF2FUcKvZESHJNXCRdcYkVmX3ZQ_Wgz-DF9V7m8IEqlcDwhFe9yl3b3nSbhiE2w0jTl-OFq2fDJwtHtJGHQdrM0SAZx3V7h4ieSy7Nq6q1FwNQTqTNoYpfdszraX-OK5EqfQ4NlxFUkGQXd7WoYpqlEEPkfm/4d6/49fl9jttTqulW118VpSrCA/h2/h001.o80ylzXnJiMRZ4a4ioX8cMiRF--PZmE6x6rA37_odSg)** **Electing state Democrats is more important than ever. clean_body: Electing state Dems is more important than ever. The fight for our future is happening in the states, and it’s happening now. Is there anything we can say to convince you to support state Democrats? | | | | | ---|--- With only six days until Donald Trump takes office, is there anything we can say to convince you to What if we told you that we needed to win in upcoming special elections in states like Minnesota to defend Democratic-held seats and fend off a GOP takeover? What if we told you state legislatures are the building blocks of our democracy – and that the far-right is using our statehouses as a path to undermine our sacred institutions? What if we told you right-wing billionaires like Elon Musk could pour millions to compete for chamber control because they know the power and impact of this level of the ballot? What if we told you the only way to block the GOP from pushing their extreme agenda in the states is to elect state Democrats who will block their dangerous attacks on our fundamental freedoms? And what if we told you we can’t secure victories in upcoming elections without you on our grassroots team? Electing state Democrats is more important than ever. We must start rebuilding our re-election campaign early to make investments in critical infrastructure that will help us keep NY-04 blue.

We’re almost halfway to our FIRST major deadline of 2025. Political experts at Roll Call named our district one of the most competitive battleground races for 2026. We need your support to ensure we can build a solid foundation for our campaign.

Flipping this seat blue was _only_ possible with your support—that’s why it’s crucial to reach our first $25,000 fundraising goal of 2025 to show early signs of strength. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A monumental step toward saving lives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today a ceasefire and hostage deal was reached by Israeli and Hamas negotiators.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250115-4674-footer&t=1&akid=4674%2E420207%2EDLNYp2)
Peter,
**Today a ceasefire and hostage deal was reached by Israeli and Hamas negotiators.** Above all else, this is a monumental step toward saving lives and ending over a year of deep pain and suffering. Too many lives have been lost since the horrific October 7th attack, and today I thank the negotiators from the United States, Egypt, and Qatar who have worked tirelessly to broker this deal.
I first called for a ceasefire 10 days after Hamas’s horrific attack on Israel. It was clear to me then that innocent civilians on all sides would continue to pay the price for this war — and that has sadly been the case as hostages have been killed and others held for over a year, more than 46,000 Palestinians have been killed, Gaza has been pushed to famine, entire families have been killed, and rising regional tensions have threatened more civilians throughout the Middle East.
I have made it a priority to meet with families impacted by this horrible conflict, both of hostages, including in my own district, and those who have lost loved ones in Gaza and the West Bank to hear their stories and bear witness to their grief. Today I celebrate with the families who will be reunited with their loved ones, and mourn with those who will not have that opportunity.
**We must make clear that even with this ceasefire framework, our work is not done.** We must do everything in our power to ensure that both sides uphold their commitments, and the violence comes to a permanent end. We must commit to rebuilding Gaza and to quickly and urgently getting humanitarian aid to the thousands on the brink of starvation. We must condemn and prevent the rising antisemitism and Islamophobia that we have seen as a result of this conflict. We must also ensure that those responsible for war crimes and violations of international law are held fully responsible.
This is a hopeful day after more than a year of horror. Let us lead with our hearts, to move forward and commit to a true and sustained peace for Israelis and Palestinians.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250115-4674-footer&t=2&refcode2=4674_420207_DLNYp2&akid=4674%2E420207%2EDLNYp2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4674%2E420207%2EDLNYp2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4674%2E420207%2EDLNYp2)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: John Fetterman
subject: MichaelScott.gif
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I know you’re tired of getting fundraising emails, and it’s ok — because I’m tired of sending them!
#
Hi Derek, it's John. I know you’re tired of getting fundraising emails, and it’s ok — **because I’m tired of sending them!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250115?refcode=em20250115-9800&refcode2=9800_434096_lFLeVP&akid=9800%2E434096%2ElFLeVP)
_^ How I feel when the team tells me I need to ask you for money_
**But we’re coming up on an important mid-month deadline tonight** , and Donald Trump is set to re-enter the White House in less than a week.
The Trump administration and GOP Congress are going to try to do a lot of things I disagree with, and meeting this goal is critical to helping me keep this seat 🔵 so I can continue to stand up for Pennsylvanians.
[**Will you kick in $5 or anything you can before midnight to put us over the top? Even a little bit goes a long way.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250115?refcode=em20250115-9800&refcode2=9800_434096_lFLeVP&akid=9800%2E434096%2ElFLeVP)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250115?amount=5&refcode=em20250115-9800&refcode2=9800_434096_lFLeVP&akid=9800%2E434096%2ElFLeVP)**
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250115-9800-footer&t=1&refcode2=9800_434096_lFLeVP&akid=9800%2E434096%2ElFLeVP)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

clean_body: What an honor to welcome President Trump| | | Peter, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Peter, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President-elect's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... ... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people. To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president-elect: DONALD TRUMP. Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA: Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states, Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25! But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! ** Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Getting to Work!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
| | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Friend,
The 119th Congress is hitting the ground running! In the few short weeks that we have been in session, several top legislative priorities that I campaigned on have passed the House, and we’re only just getting started!
On my first session day, I voted in support of the Laken Riley Act, which passed the House with a vote of 251-170, and is now in the Senate for consideration. Just yesterday, I voted to support the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act, which passed the House by a vote of 218-206-1, and is headed to the Senate for consideration.
Like I said, we’re only getting started! I’ll be sure to update you as we advance common sense legislation to help everyday Americans.
---
| I also want to thank everyone who came out to show their support at my Swearing-in Celebration in the district. I know that with your continued friendship and support, we will be a leading voice for the 7th District on the national stage.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| Sincerely,
Ryan Mackenzie

name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Tune in tomorrow for Governor Healey's State of the Commonwealth!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
Tomorrow night, January 16th at 7pm, Governor Healey will be giving her annual State of the Commonwealth address, where she'll reflect on the Healey-Driscoll administration's accomplishments in 2024 and preview the work ahead in 2025.
Governor Healey knows how important it is that the work she does is reflective of Massachusetts values, especially in the face of the incoming Presidential administration. As Democrats and engaged citizens, tuning in tomorrow night will be an easy way to demonstrate to her that you stand with her in this fight.
The State of the Commonwealth will be broadcast online tomorrow night at mass.gov/sotc [mass.gov/sotc] .
Watch the State of the Commonwealth at 7pm on 1/16 HERE!
Another easy but incredibly important way to support the Governor is to amplify her message on social media. Team Healey/Driscoll has put together some sample social media posts that can be shared to your feed at the click of a button- you can find those by clicking here [https://app.sosha.ai/toolkit/b8037cc1-fb0b-43ef-a635-a0e40e589898?emci=a05e010f-6dcf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001] ! She also invites you to take a look at the Year in Review 2024 webpage [https://www.mass.gov/2024-in-review?emci=a05e010f-6dcf-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001] , which lists many incredible accomplishments that you can amplify.
I hope you'll join me tomorrow in tuning in for the State of the Commonwealth and showing Governor Healey how proud we are to have her as the leader of our Party.
Onward,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/kaPRTc7b2EuhMpLt4_5XZQ2?unsubscribedata=VTtVJNPB3Jy6LeoM3pk1q5oHDQrsSFePedrk8%2FIpYT9I%2BQcCY5pemJPqaGu9Kpw0wi2Rv0qQfmzgquJgpK6oGXNpUxECK5A723PNCpnQ%2BYVv8Wp7c2%2BxysE21qArZ686y%2Fk%2FV1LIfPLc5cJhOQi1JU3PcVIZ2tTJMW4f9Bgje%2F7RBbkrN%2BGJWTyPIBTC1fqBB2tZqQP%2Fwtc6m3DCHr58dwSZvEfZjXdiVKMXu6fpQD1HTgZWmDKJC9aCqj820AxiHydkola%2FnzfBO7znSunXDRP2qMGKK8VcMT90kRMEEJutokdHfE%2FanwKYV0S92SyY1zc9PcmlZsk5NdTkoqniMb%2Bx6K81BqXzD%2BEhr0XaH1sVH7fidyEZnffmIG5wwnlHGq3jeTb1vYmTc%2B4OEq6vzCE9URpSuBDerrD%2FZ0P3v97xstih6f%2F%2BnhFZ3Z5y2y9%2B .

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100458602/522827928/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDYyMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU1MzhiMzgtOTlkMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Qs1HwlY8hQp2yONPu4q-MMjaemlO3EIbktk_YiufT-0=&emci=12287051-91d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=5e538b38-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=10957263)
---
| | **Listen/Watch _Warrior Money _Episode 9** _Warrior Money_ , hosted on Yahoo Finance by Patrick Murphy and Dan Kunze - A show that supports and offers financial advice to the veteran community.
---
| |
---
| | Peter, This week on _Warrior Money_ , my co-host Dan Kunze and I interview SECOR Asset Management's Andrew Bang. Andrew is a retired Army Captain, graduate of both West Point and Cornell University, and currently advising institutional investors with assets under management of over $30b. In our conversation, we discuss how transitioning veterans can land a job in financial services, find their purpose in the sector, and discuss how Andrew's career can serve as a positive example for all our transitioning veterans. We hope our conversation can help you and/or the veteran in your life. You can get _Warrior Money _episodes everywhere you get your podcasts. Links are below. Spotify: [HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100458603/522827929/1331894637?si=aca5c5afcb5d4b58&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDYyMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU1MzhiMzgtOTlkMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Qs1HwlY8hQp2yONPu4q-MMjaemlO3EIbktk_YiufT-0=&emci=12287051-91d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=5e538b38-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=10957263)YouTube: [HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100458604/522827930/1075153028?list=PLx28zU8ctIRq4s21MFggvp9vDtChW2cM4&si=ebgQsbMI2qSU-UB4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDYyMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU1MzhiMzgtOTlkMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Qs1HwlY8hQp2yONPu4q-MMjaemlO3EIbktk_YiufT-0=&emci=12287051-91d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=5e538b38-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=10957263) Apple Podcasts: [HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100458605/522827931/753024955?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDYyMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU1MzhiMzgtOTlkMy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Qs1HwlY8hQp2yONPu4q-MMjaemlO3EIbktk_YiufT-0=&emci=12287051-91d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=5e538b38-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=10957263) Thank you,Patrick J. clean_body: | | | | | Listen/Watch Warrior Money Episode 9 Warrior Money , hosted on Yahoo Finance by Patrick Murphy and Dan Kunze - A show that supports and offers financial advice to the veteran community. | | | | Peter, This week on Warrior Money , my co-host Dan Kunze and I interview SECOR Asset Management's Andrew Bang. Andrew is a retired Army Captain, graduate of both West Point and Cornell University, and currently advising institutional investors with assets under management of over $30b. In our conversation, we discuss how transitioning veterans can land a job in financial services, find their purpose in the sector, and discuss how Andrew's career can serve as a positive example for all our transitioning veterans. We hope our conversation can help you and/or the veteran in your life. You can get Warrior Money episodes everywhere you get your podcasts. Links are below. Spotify: : Apple Podcasts: Thank you,Patrick J. Murphy 32nd Undersecretary of the Army Former Congressman | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Guess which year was the hottest in Earth’s recorded history 😬
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Scientists are sounding the alarm.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100458613/522827997/1328794144?refcode=ea.530ca769-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.530ca769-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMGNhNzY5LTk5ZDMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KuxBIoHy9DsaqnvmncH6_z0u4ezGGyFhjJ8sUWiwi0Q=&emci=4e0ca769-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=530ca769-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=4823105)

_**NBC NEWS:** "NASA found that 2024 was hotter than any other year since at least 1880. Previously, 2023 had been considered the warmest on record."_ **[Rush a donation to fuel our fight for bold climate action before it’s too late.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100458614/522827998/2105508926?refcode=ea.530ca769-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.530ca769-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMGNhNzY5LTk5ZDMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KuxBIoHy9DsaqnvmncH6_z0u4ezGGyFhjJ8sUWiwi0Q=)** | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100458615/522827999/2105508926?refcode=ea.530ca769-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.530ca769-99d3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMGNhNzY5LTk5ZDMtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KuxBIoHy9DsaqnvmncH6_z0u4ezGGyFhjJ8sUWiwi0Q=)
---
* * *
In 2024, for the first time in recorded history, global temperatures averaged more than 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels over the course of a year. Scientists have long warned that crossing this threshold increases the risk of catastrophic climate disasters — from deadly heatwaves to devastating floods.
The impacts are undeniable. Intense heatwaves in Mexico and Saudi Arabia last year killed hundreds. Torrential floods devastated Nepal, Sudan, and Spain. **_Here in the U.S., we faced 27 climate-related disasters that caused over $1 billion in damages,_** including Hurricanes Milton and Helene.
And right now, Southern California is battling some of the most devastating and costly fires we’ve ever seen. Experts say these infernos, fueled by scorching temperatures and extreme drought, are a direct result of our warming planet.
The worst may be yet to come. In just five days, Donald Trump will take the White House. With a Republican-controlled Congress and Big Oil waiting in the wings, they’re ready to dismantle climate protections and double down on fossil fuel greed.
**But there’s still hope.** Scientists say we can still avoid the most catastrophic levels of warming, but countries must act swiftly and cut greenhouse gas emissions immediately. This is non-negotiable.
It’s why we need to act — _right now._
Here at JanePAC, we are laser-focused on electing and building a firewall of climate champions at every level of government. Leaders who will fight for bold climate action, challenge fossil fuel greed, and stop Trump and his allies from dragging us further into crisis.
**[This is the fight of our lives, and we cannot afford to lose. clean_body: Scientists are sounding the alarm. | NBC NEWS: "NASA found that 2024 was hotter than any other year since at least 1880. Previously, 2023 had been considered the warmest on record." = | = In 2024, for the first time in recorded history, global temperatures averaged more than 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels over the course of a year. Scientists have long warned that crossing this threshold increases the risk of catastrophic climate disasters — from deadly heatwaves to devastating floods. The impacts are undeniable. Intense heatwaves in Mexico and Saudi Arabia last year killed hundreds. Torrential floods devastated Nepal, Sudan, and Spain. Here in the U.S., we faced 27 climate-related disasters that caused over $1 billion in damages, including Hurricanes Milton and Helene. And right now, Southern California is battling some of the most devastating and costly fires we’ve ever seen. Experts say these infernos, fueled by scorching temperatures and extreme drought, are a direct result of our warming planet. The worst may be yet to come. In just five days, Donald Trump will take the White House. With a Republican-controlled Congress and Big Oil waiting in the wings, they’re ready to dismantle climate protections and double down on fossil fuel greed. But there’s still hope. Scientists say we can still avoid the most catastrophic levels of warming, but countries must act swiftly and cut greenhouse gas emissions immediately. This is non-negotiable. It’s why we need to act — right now. Here at JanePAC, we are laser-focused on electing and building a firewall of climate champions at every level of government. Leaders who will fight for bold climate action, challenge fossil fuel greed, and stop Trump and his allies from dragging us further into crisis. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Team JanePAC P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the fires in Southern California and need a break from our emails, Take care of what matters most, and we’ll be here when you're ready. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: I'm not going to pretend that I have all the answers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
I need you to take my 2025 Strategy Survey.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100458669/522828169/-1997846894?code=jtk1789-su-nd&refcode=jtk1789-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc4NTcwYS05YWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Y8CL2lX4-yXpWXePIlkuM3Iu5yoD9fqdkRNeSOIKRQ=)
---
Peter, the political climate we face in 2025 is more dangerous than ever.
With far-right extremists threatening everything from our reproductive freedom, voting rights, and the very foundations of our democracy, there’s one big concern that immediately comes to mind – and that’s _you_.
But the truth is, I don’t have all the answers, Peter – and I don’t pretend to.**That’s why hearing from you firsthand is crucial if we're going to stop far-right extremists from creating chaos and targeting the most vulnerable among us.**
**It’s incredibly important for me to hear from this community so that I can build a winning strategy and defend the values that matter most to**** _you_. _[So will you be one of the 100 fearless fighters I’m counting on from your area to join the fight for our rights by responding to my 2025 Strategy Survey before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100458670/522828170/756426392?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1789-su-nd&refcode=jtk1789-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc4NTcwYS05YWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Y8CL2lX4-yXpWXePIlkuM3Iu5yoD9fqdkRNeSOIKRQ=&emci=ec46b6d1-d5d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=a578570a-9ad3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=25369504)_**
| | [TAKE MY STRATEGY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100458671/522828171/756426392?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1789-su-nd&refcode=jtk1789-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc4NTcwYS05YWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Y8CL2lX4-yXpWXePIlkuM3Iu5yoD9fqdkRNeSOIKRQ=&emci=ec46b6d1-d5d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=a578570a-9ad3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=25369504)
---
In every new attack on our fundamental freedoms, every blatant attempt to undermine our fight for progress, I think of the New Yorkers who suffer the consequences as a result. _That's who I'm fighting for!_

But I won't try to pretend I can do this all on my own. I need your critical insights and opinions, Peter.
**_[My urgent survey closes at midnight, so please, don’t wait: Submit your response now to my survey and help me build a strategy that will keep moving New York forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100458672/522828172/756426392?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1789-su-nd&refcode=jtk1789-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTc4NTcwYS05YWQzLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Y8CL2lX4-yXpWXePIlkuM3Iu5yoD9fqdkRNeSOIKRQ=&emci=ec46b6d1-d5d2-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=a578570a-9ad3-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=25369504)_**
Thank you.
Letitia James

| President Trump is well aware of the geopolitical advantages that America would benefit from should we acquire Greenland as a U.S. territory. And when it comes to staying ahead of _**Communist China**_ , this move from DJT would be an absolute game-changer. That being said, the people of Greenland are also yearning for leadership change after years of neglect and alleged abuses by the Danish state. _**Even Greenland 's prime minister is warming up to the idea of closer ties to the United States.**_
**POLL:**_**Should America acquire Greenland as a U.S. Territory?**_

| **Meet Jim:** Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm.

| **A personal message from Rep. Jim Baird:** Peter, serving as your Representative in Indiana's 4th Congressional District has been the honor of my life. So when it comes to my service in Washington, it's the people's best interests that dictate every single decision I make on Capitol Hill. I can't thank you enough for your continued support in the good fight to restore glory to the world's greatest country in 2025 and beyond. clean_body: |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | | | | |ARCHIVE| | | | | | | It's safe to say that the tides have turned, Peter. | After four years of national decline under the radical-left Democrats, American prosperity is already making a comeback following the historical 2024 election. | President Trump is well aware of the geopolitical advantages that America would benefit from should we acquire Greenland as a U.S. territory. And when it comes to staying ahead of Communist China , this move from DJT would be an absolute game-changer. That being said, the people of Greenland are also yearning for leadership change after years of neglect and alleged abuses by the Danish state. Even Greenland 's prime minister is warming up to the idea of closer ties to the United States. POLL:Should America acquire Greenland as a U.S. Territory? | | So we're fielding a to garner national support for America's acquisition of Greenland this year. If we're able to collect 10,000 signatures by the end of this month, it would make a MAJOR impact on the level of support President Trump receives from GOP officials in Washington after he's sworn in on January 20th. | | Thank you for your support, Team Baird | | | Meet Jim: Congressman Jim Baird is a decorated Vietnam War Veteran and the proud representative for Indiana's 4th Congressional District in our nation's capital. A lifelong resident of West Central Indiana, Jim grew up on his family's farm and had the values of faith, family, and hard work instilled in him at an early age. He is an unwavering defender of America's Constitutional liberties and has spent the vast majority of his life serving our country. After earning both his bachelor's and his master's at Purdue University, Jim was assigned to the 523rd Transportation Company at Cha Rang Valley in Vietnam. He fought in two of the deadliest battles of Operation Lam Son 719 and lost his left arm during a convoy ambush in March of 1971. In a true embodiment of American sacrifice and patriotism, Jim Baird has put his life on the line time and time again fighting communism abroad. His belief in the American Dream and our American way of life go far beyond words. For the entirety of his life, Jim has fought the good fight for our country both physically and spiritually. And he wears his love for the world's greatest country on his sleeve each and every day that he shows up for work in Washington, D.C. Previously, Jim Baird spent eight years in the Indiana House of Representatives serving District 44 from 2010 to 2018. Prior to that, he was Putnam County Commissioner from 2006 to 2010. A fiscal conservative and America First Republican, Jim is incredibly proud to fight every day in DC to advance the best interests of Indiana's families through Congress. A loving husband to his wife Danise, a devoted father to his children, and the world's best pop-pop to his grandkids, Jim spends most of his free time in the company of his loved ones or tending to the family farm. | | A personal message from Rep. Jim Baird: Peter, serving as your Representative in Indiana's 4th Congressional District has been the honor of my life. For nearly all the time I've been on this Earth, all I've wanted to do is serve the country that has given everything to me. So when it comes to my service in Washington, it's the people's best interests that dictate every single decision I make on Capitol Hill. I can't thank you enough for your continued support in the good fight to restore glory to the world's greatest country in 2025 and beyond. | | If you're NOT in a position to donate, please refrain from doing so. I would never want you to cause financial strain for yourself or your family. There are a multitude of other ways you can contribute to the fight for IN-04 and the American people. name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: Breaking NEW poll has this race deadlocked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots
body:
The latest polling has Abigail Spanberger leading by the slimmest of margins, 42% to 41%, to her Republican opponent—a statistical tie!
**Peter, have you seen this?! A BREAKING NEW poll shows this Governor’s race is neck-and-neck.**
**The latest polling has Abigail Spanberger leading by the slimmest of margins, 42% to 41%, to her Republican opponent—a statistical tie!**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85257?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt)
**[SUPPORT ABIGAIL](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85257?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt)**
While it’s still early, this confirms what we’ve always known: this will be a close race. Back in 2021, Republican Gov. Youngkin won by less than two points, and the polls were tight all the way up until Election Day. Now, this poll shows us well within the margin of error.
Given these numbers, we’re gearing up for another highly competitive and hard-fought election in November. And all eyes will be on Virginia, meaning we’ve got to deliver. That’s why we’re building a strong campaign infrastructure now, so we’re ready for anything that comes our way.
**We know this race will get national attention and with that comes outside money for our opponent, so we must build the momentum and groundwork now for a winning campaign.[So, can we count on you to support Abigail’s campaign and Heartland Patriots to flip this critical seat blue in November?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85257?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85258?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85258?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85258?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85258?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85258?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85258?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85257?refcode=em20250115-8720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=8720%2E614464%2Es_5Nqt)

Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account.
